
1.1(1): 'dus pa rin po che'i rgyud gzer mig gi le'u 
1.2(1): ste bco brgyad pa bzhugs so/ /
1.3(1): @#/  /g.yung drung lha'i skad du na/ dza dur so na rtsi pi ta/ a dkar ha trag mu 
1.4(1): la ram/ gang zag mi yi skad du na/ 'dus pa rin po che yi rgyud/ gzer mig gi 
1.5(1): le'u bco brgyad pa'o/ /
1.6(1): 7 'khor ba'i sems can thams cad 'dren pa'i dpal/ gshen rab ston pa'i 
1.7(1): mchog la phyag 'tshal lo/ /spyir na sems can gyi las kyang grangs mang ste bsam gyis 
1.8(1): mi khyab pa'o/ /'jig rten gyi khams kyang bsam gyis mi khyab ste grangs mang ba'o/ /
1.9(1): ston pa'i bka' yang bsam gyis mi khyab ste grangs mang ba ste/ sngon dang po yang 
1.10(1): ston pa'i sku dang / bstan pa'i bon yang bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig dar zhing rgyas 
1.11(1): so/ /'jig rten gyi khams dang / srid pa'i grangs kyang bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig 
1.12(1): chags shing 'jig go /sems can gyi las dang bye brag gi las kyang bsam gyis mi 
1.13(1): khyab pa zhig 'khor zhing thar ro/ /dus 'di'i gong / srid pa 'di'i sngon/ 'byung ba 
1.14(1): 'di'i thog ma/ bskal pa 'di yi dang po la/ lha gang gi thugs rjes bzung nas/ ye 
1.15(1): lha sems kyi sgron ma can gyi thugs rjes bzung ngo / /bon gyi bstan pa gang dar na/
1.16(1): ston pa gto rgyal ye mkhyen gyi bstan pa dar ro/ srid pa'i rgyud gang 'phel na/ ye mu 
1.17(1): rgyung dkar po'i rgyud 'phel lo/ dus de tsam na yang / ston pa gto rgyal ye mkhyen 
2.1(1): gyis/ dug lnga'i nad kyis zin pa'i sems can rnams la/ thugs rje chen po rab tu 
2.2(1): bskyed nas/ sku yis 'dul ba rnams la/ bstan pa sku yi dpe'u tse bstan/ bstan 
2.3(1): pa de'i yon tan gyis/ sems can bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig 'khor ba las thar 
2.4(1): pa thob bo/ /sdug bsngal las bde gnas rnyed do/ /gsung gis 'dul ba rnams la/
2.5(1): bsgrags pa gsung gi dpe'u tse bstan no/ /bstan pa de'i yon tan gyis/ sems 
2.6(1): can bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig 'khor ba las thar pa thob bo/ /sdug bsngal las 
2.7(1): bde gnas rnyed do/ /thugs kyis 'dul ba rnams la/ sgrub pa thugs kyi dpe'u tse 
2.8(1): bstan no/ /bstan pa de'i yon tan gyis/ sems can bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig 
2.9(1): 'khor ba las thar pa thob bo/ /sdug bsngal las bde gnas rnyed do/ /dus de tsam 
2.10(1): na yang / ston pa'i sku dang gsung dang thugs dang / zhal mngon sum du bzhugs 
2.11(1): nas/ 'dren pa'i ston pa mdzad kyang / sems can gyi las bsam gyis mi khyab pas/
2.12(1): sems can kyang bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig 'khor ba las thar par ma gyur ro/ /sdug 
2.13(1): bsngal las bde gnas rnyed par ma gyur ro/ /ston pas kyang thugs rjes zin cing 
2.14(1): drangs par ma gyur nas/ ston pa yang shin tu thugs chad do/ /ston pa yang rab tu 
2.15(1): thugs chad do/ /shin tu sgyid lug go /rab tu sgyid lug go /
2.16(1): 7 de nas ston pa gto rgyal ye mkhyen gyis/ 'od chen 'khor lo gling brtsegs 
2.17(1): kyi/ g.yu khang pad+ma'i gzhal yas na/ ye lha sems kyi sgron ma can/ bzhugs pa'i 
2.18(1): spyan sngar thal gyis byon/ pus mo btsugs so/ /thal mo sbyar ro/ /zhal nas 'dzum 
2.19(1): pa phyung / dbu btud lha phyag lan gsum btsal/ me tog pad ma 'dab brgyad 
2.20(1): phul nas 'di skad ces gsol to/ /ye lha thugs kyi ye shes can/ bdag kyang skye ba 
2.21(1): snga ma la/ srid pa ye sangs gnas na mchis tsam na/ yab ni khri 'od do/ /yum ni 
3.1(1): kun shes so/ /bdag cag khye'u spun gsum mchis pa ni/ gcig ni khye'u dag pa'o/ /
3.2(1): gcig ni khye'u gsal ba'o/ /gcig ni khye'u shes pa'o/ /bdag cag khye'u spun gsum 
3.3(1): gyis/ g.yung drung bon gyi sgor zhugs nas/ sems bskyed dam pa gto rje slob dpon 
3.4(1): ni/ gto 'bum khri klog gi lce can la/ srid pa stong rtsis kyi bon nyan pas/ srid pa'i 
3.5(1): gto khams gsum gyi sems can la thug /sems can gyi las brtags pas/ shin 
3.6(1): tu sdug cing rab tu bsngal bar mthong / sems can gyi las ni/ la la ni skye/ la la 
3.7(1): ni rga/ la la ni na/ la la ni 'chi/ la la ni gsod/ la la ni bsha'/ la la ni 'tshod/
3.8(1): la la ni sreg /la la ni bkres/ la la ni skom/ la la ni 'khol/ la la ni spyod/ la la 
3.9(1): ni 'thab/ la la ni rtsod/ la la ni 'bros/ la la ni 'ded/ bltas pas shin tu sdug 
3.10(1): cing rab tu bsngal bar mthong / spun gsum ngus pas mchi ma khrag tu khol/
3.11(1): sems bskyed dam pa gto rje slob dpon zhal na re/ phe sha e ma ngo mtshar che/
3.12(1): dag pa gsal ba shes pa gsum/ snying rje chen po skyes tshod kyis/ tshad med bzhi dang 
3.13(1): ldan par nges/ tshad med bzhi yi thugs rje yis/ 'khor ba thar par 'dren pa yin/
3.14(1): sems can don la song zhig gsungs/ sems can rnams la snying rje skyes/ slob 
3.15(1): dpon lha yi bka' thob pas/ bdag cag spun gsum sdod nas mchis/ yab gcig 
3.16(1): srid pa khri 'od dang /  slob dpon gto yi zhal na re/ khyed cag spun gsum der sdod 
3.17(1): dang / ji ltar sems can snying rje yang / ston pa gnyis kyis bstan pa byed mi srid/
3.18(1): ji ltar sems can grangs mang yang / phung po gcig gis sems gnyis bsdus mi 
3.19(1): srid/ ji ltar mun pa'i tshogs che yang / nyi ma zung gcig gshib nas 'char mi srid/
3.20(1): snga rabs 'das pa rnams kyang re res bstan/ slad kyis byon pa rnams kyang re res 
3.21(1): ston/ khyed cag spun gsum dus gsum ston par gshegs/ ston par rang bzhin 
4.1(1): shin tu dkon na btsun/ gnyis kyang mang du byas na gsum tsam gang du cha/ phu bo 
4.2(1): dag pa 'jig rten ston par mdzod/ sku las 'od zer sprul sku mang po phyung la/ stong 
4.3(1): gsum stong gi da ltar bzhugs pa'i 'dren ston mdzod cig de skad ces gsungs te 
4.4(1): dbang bskur nas/ bdag 'dren pa'i ston pa la btang ba lags/ bdag gi nu bo 
4.5(1): gnyis/ slar mgon btsun phywa yi grong khyer du ye shes lha la g.yung drung gi bon nyan 
4.6(1): du song / slob dpon dang yab gnyis kyang / bdag la nam zhig 'khor ba'i sems 
4.7(1): can ma thul na/ grub pa gshen gyi gnas mchog snyogs la shog cig gsungs nas/
4.8(1): slar gshen rab grub pa'i dbyings su gshegs so/ /

4.10(1): btags/ 'khor ba'i sems can la gdung ba bskyed/ skus 'dul ba rnams la sku'i 
4.11(1): sprul pa bkyes nas/ bstan pa sku yi dpe'u tses drangs pas/ sems can bsam gyis 
4.12(1): mi khyab pa zhig /ngan song las mtho ris su btang / 'khor ba las thar pa ru drangs/
4.13(1): gsung gis 'dul ba rnams las/ tshig gi gdams ngag bgyid nas/ bsgrags pa 
4.14(1): gsung gi dpe'u tses drangs pas/ sems can bsam gyis mi khyab pa zhig /ngan song 
4.15(1): las mtho ris su btang / 'khor ba las thar pa ru drangs/ thugs kyis 'dul ba

4.18(1): ba las thar pa ru drangs so/ /'khor ba'i sems can rgya che grangs mang yang / sku

4.20(1): sam gsol pa dang / ye shes kyi lha ye lha sems kyi sgron ma can gyis bka' bstsal

5.1(1): gnas mtho dman la rtogs pa/ 'khor bar sgyid lug nas zhus pa legs so/ /sku 
5.2(1): yis drangs pa dang / gsung gis drangs pa dang / thugs kyis drangs pa'i sems 
5.3(1): can rnams ni/ sngon tshe bskal pa dang po nas/ las khre'u ru spyad pa las/ kun gzhi 
5.4(1): las sa bon bzang po yod pas/ sems la rig pa'i rtsal yod/ de lta bu sems can 
5.5(1): rnams/ rkyen ston pa'i bka' drag po dang 'phrad nas/ 'khor ba las thar pa thob 
5.6(1): pa dang / sdug bsngal la bde gnas rnyed pa'i yon tan de lags so/ /ston pa'i sku 
5.7(1): dang ngo bo nyid kyis zhal mngon sum du bstan kyang / sngon tshe bskal pa dang po nas/

5.9(1): lags/ de rnams ni shin tu yang drang dka' ba lags so/ /rab tu yang drang dka' 
5.10(1): ba lags so/ /sngon tshe bskal pa dang po nas/ las sdig pa ci tshugs su spyod pa/
5.11(1): kun gzhi la dge ba'i sa bon til 'bru tsam yang med/ dug lnga kha tshang ba'i tha ram 
5.12(1): gyis dam du bsdams pa yin te/ gto rgyal khyod bon gyi bka' bas kyang / bdag lha 
5.13(1): yi thugs rjes kyang zin cing drangs pa lta bu mi 'gyur ro/ /sems can la la zhig ni

5.15(1): can la la zhig ni gti mug mun ltar sros/ sems can la la zhig ni phrag dog sa 
5.16(1): ltar skyes/ sems can la la zhig ni nga rgyal rlung ltar 'tshub/ sems can la la zhig 
5.17(1): ni rag sha srin po'i rigs/ de lta bu'i rigs la thar pa'i rgyu ma mchis/ dper na nyi 
5.18(1): ma la 'od zer shar kyang mun pa'i khang pa nag /de dang mtshungs par sems can

5.21(1): kyang snying rje chen por rab bskyed nas/ khams gsum sems can 'di la rab tu

6.5(1): ces ye shes lha yi bka' bstsal to/ /

6.12(1): pas sgrub pa thugs kyi dpe'u tse gzugs med pa'i khams la bstan/ khams gsum 
6.13(1): 'khor ba'i gnas su/ sku gsung thugs kyi bstan pa rdzogs/ khams gsum las

10.2(1): pa'i sras mo/ /phywa za ngang 'brang ma bgyis te/ de yang yab dang mtshungs te/ shin

10.4(1): ldan/ yab yum de gnyis 'gro ba'i don la dgongs nas sku yi sprul pa/ dpyid zla

10.8(1): dung gi gnam yol dkar po la// 'brug khyung gi ris bkra dang / nyi zla'i 'od 'bar

29.14(1): rgyal bon thod dkar la nyon mongs pa'i shas med pa dang / rigs rgyal rigs dra ma

30.1(1): la/ gsas mkhar lha rtse dgung nam bzhengs nas/ 'khor rnam pa gsum la bka' 
30.2(1): bstsal pa/ nga 'jig rten mi'i yul du ston pa'i sgron ma la 'gro yis/ rgyal po'i sras 
30.3(1): su skye ba nam bzhes tsam na/ khyed rnams kyang nam mkha' las char bzhin du bobs

30.21(1): 'phros pas/ zer dmar po 'phang tsam zhig yum yo phyi rgyal bzhad kyi spyi bor babs

38.20(1): dang / srin bon ya ngal gyim gong srin khams dang chas pa dang / 'dre bon glud bon 
38.21(1): gyer mkhas 'dre khams shags kyis 'dul ba 'dre khams dang chas pa dang / sri bon 
39.1(1): mu 'phan phe'u ra sri khams chings kyis 'ching ba sri khams dang chas pa dang / byur 
39.2(1): bon sna bon li byin mi rabs rgyud du spel ba byur khams dang chas pa dang / gshin 
39.3(1): rje'i bon po gto bon byon khri gnod pa gtan la bskor ba gshin khams dang chas 
39.4(1): pa dang / chud kyi bon po thar bon gru skyol lha 'dre skos la 'debs pa chud khams 
39.5(1): dang chas pa dang / de rnams ni sa g.yen che ba bcu gcig bgyi ste/ klu gnyan rgyal 
39.6(1): dang gsum/ sman gzed srin dang gsum/ 'dre sri byur dang gsum/ gshin rje 
39.7(1): chud dang gnyis te bcu gcig kyang / sa gzhi las rtsi bzhin du 'ol mo lung ring du 
39.8(1): 'khrungs te/ mkhar bar po so brgyad la/ la las ni skor ba byed/ la las ni lha phyag 
39.9(1): 'tshal/ la las ni me tog 'bul/ la las ni gtsang tshan 'debs/ la las ni sku 
39.10(1): khrus gsol/ la las ni rnga rdung / la las ni gshang 'khrol/ la las ni dung 'bud/
39.11(1): la las ni gsas bshos 'bul/ la las ni mar me 'bul/ de ltar mkhar gyi phyi rim 
39.12(1): na/ dmag mi snga ma 'dug pa'i phyi rim du bskor ro/ /rgyal bon thod dkar ngo mtshar 
39.13(1): skyes nas de rnams la bka' bstsal pa/ khyed rnams mkhar 'di la bskor ba byed pa 
39.14(1): ji lta bu yin zhes gsungs nas/ klu bon dbyar snyan gyim bus slar gsol pa/ ston 
39.15(1): pa sku skye ba mi la bzhes nas rgyal po'i sras su sku 'khrungs nas mkhar 'di'i nang 
39.16(1): du bzhugs pas/ bskor ba bgyid cing mchod pa bgyid pa lags so/ /bdag cag 
39.17(1): ni 'khor gyi tha mar dam bcas pa lags so/ /da yang ston pa'i zhal lta bar rings 
39.18(1): pas/ ston pa zhal mjal gsungs/ rgyal bon gyis bka' bstsal pa/ de lta bu ni 
39.19(1): 'di kun na yang ma mchis so/ /gzhan dang ma nor ram gsungs nas/ slar mkhar 
39.20(1): nang du 'das te gshegs so/ /de nas rgyal bzhad ma la gsol pa/ sa gzhi gang 
39.21(1): ba'i sems can dang bon po dang / lha 'dre 'di rnams ni rgyal bu 'di la mchod 
40.1(1): pa 'bul zhing / 'khor tha mar khas len pa zhig gda' 'o/ /bdag gis ni bsnyon 
40.2(1): nas gsang ngo / /yum gyis yab la gsol pa/ gsang ba ni shin tu yang legs so/ /
40.3(1): sa gzhi'i la gnas pa'i 'dre srin dang / klu gnyan ni shin tu gnod sems che ba 
40.4(1): yin no/ /gsungs nas sgo yang dam du bcad do/ /'khor pa rnams go mtshon bstar 
40.5(1): nas mel tse yang dam du byed do/ /de nas yab yum yang yid spro la sems dga' 
40.6(1): bas/ rgyal bu de la ma ma dgu phrugs kyis khrus dang / gtsang sbra dar dang rgyan 
40.7(1): chas dang tshang bur byas/ de nas bram ze gsal khyab 'od ldan la/ yab yum gyis 
40.8(1): bka' bstsal pa/ rgyal bu 'di ma yi lhums su zhugs tsam na yang lus yang bde 
40.9(1): zhing yid dga' 'o/ /da lta skyes nas kyang nam mkha' la gnas pa dang / bar snang 
40.10(1): la gnas pa dang / sa gzhi la gnas pa dang / sems can thams cad ma lus par 
40.11(1): dpon dang blon du chas nas/ yul 'ol mo lung ring bas lho 'dzam bu'i gling du yang 
40.12(1): mi shong bar skor ba bgyid cing mchod pa bgyid pa 'di ci lags/ 'di'i mtshan 
40.13(1): brtags dgos pas rgyal sar mchi zhig par bka' bstsal to/ /
40.14(1): de nas ltas mkhan des rgyal sar yang thog tu mchis nas/ rgyal bu de'i zhal

40.18(1): bshums pas ltas mkhan bred nas/ gsol pa yab yum ma bshums shig /rgyal bu

40.21(1): brgyal ba lags so/ /rgyal bu 'di'i zhal dang po khums tsam na/ rin po che'i mi la 
41.1(1): 'od zer 'bum phrag phyogs bcur 'phro ba/ yi ge sum brgya drug bcus sku la brgyan

76.15(1): de ltar bon nyid g.yung drung gi klong nas bskyed pa'i lha gshen nyi shu la phyag

76.17(1): ba rnams ni grang ba'i bsil gyis rgyun chad do/ /grang ba'i dmyal ba rnams ni tsha ba'i 
76.18(1): drod kyis rgyun chad do/ /nyi tshe ba ni bde gnas rnyed nas rgyun chad do/ /nyi 'khor ba 
76.19(1): ni thar lam thob nas rgyun chad do/ /de ltar dmyal khams bco brgyad stong nas yar 
76.20(1): drangs na'ang / gto bu dod de las kyi rnam par smin pas/ yi dwags kyi yul nas 
76.21(1): ma drangs nas/ go gon pa dang mtshon thogs pa mang pos ni bskor/ phyi nang gi sgrib 
77.1(1): pa can gyis ni mnan/ yi dwags kyi yul na sbyong ba de/ gshen rab kyis gzigs 
77.2(1): nas bka' bstsal pa/ gto bu dod de ni ma shi gson tsam na/ rgyu 'dod chags la 
77.3(1): shas che zhing / rkyen ma byin par len pa byas pas/ 'bras bu yi dwags kyi yul na 
77.4(1): skyes nas/ shin tu bkres shing skom par 'dug pas/ yi dwags kyi sgo gcod cing 
77.5(1): 'dren pa'i/ lha gshen la phyag bgyis shing mchod cig /khams gsum gyi sems can 
77.6(1): la zas nor gyi sbyin pa thongs shig /de skad gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal to/ /yang 
77.7(1): yid kyi khye'u chung gis lha gshen brgya'i mtshan ni bton/ rma lo g.yu lo 'khor bcas 
77.8(1): kyis/ mtshan byang thogs nas phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas bskyed 
77.9(1): pa'i lha/ mkha' 'gying dkar po la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas 
77.10(1): bskyed pa'i lha/ khri 'od dkar po la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas 
77.11(1): bskyed pa'i lha/ khri 'od khug pa la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas 
77.12(1): bskyed pa'i lha/ khri 'od gsal 'bar la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong 
77.13(1): nas bskyed pa'i lha/ mu yang de ba la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas 
77.14(1): bskyed pa'i lha/ mu rgyung mtha' yas la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas

77.16(1): bskyed pa'i lha/ mu med mtha' yas la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas 
77.17(1): bskyed pa'i lha/ kun 'od sgron ma la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas 
77.18(1): bskyed pa'i lha/ kun sgrol dbyings phyug la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong 
77.19(1): nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ sbyin pa shugs ldan la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi 
77.20(1): klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ sbyin gtong thogs med la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid 
77.21(1): ye shes kyi klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ sbyin pa dmigs med la phyag 'tshal lo/ /
78.1(1): bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ sbyin pa mthar phyin la phyag 'tshal 
78.2(1): lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ sbyin pa stobs chen la phyag 
78.3(1): 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ sbyin pa kun tshims 
78.4(1): la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ sbyin pa mkha' 
78.5(1): shes la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ sbyin pa 
78.6(1): dbyings rtogs la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/
78.7(1): sbyin pa mnyam pa la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid ye shes kyi klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/
78.8(1): sbyin pa yongs su snyoms pa la phyag 'tshal lo//de ltar bon nyid yeshes kyi klong nas 
78.9(1): bskyed pa'i lha gshen nyi shu tham pa la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bskor ba byas/ mchod pa phul 
78.10(1): cing / khams gsum gyi sems can la glud gtor mang po btang bas/ gshen rab 
78.11(1): kyi dgongs pa dang / lha gshen gyi thugs rje yis/ yas stags kyang gnas su phyin 
78.12(1): no/ yi dwags kyi yul du char bzhin du babs pas/ gto bu dod de la/ yi dwags 
78.13(1): kyi dmag tshogs kyis bskor nas lan chags 'ded pa rnams kyang / zas 'dod pa 
78.14(1): la zas/ skom 'dod pa la skom/ nor 'dod pa la nor/ ci 'dod pa re ba bskangs 
78.15(1): nas/ gto bu dod de'i 'phrog rlom byas pa'i lan chags kher ro/ /bon nyid ye shes 
78.16(1): kyi klong nas bskyed pa'i lha gshen nyi shu tham pas/ yi dwags kyi yul du byon nas smon 
78.17(1): lam btab pas/ lha yi smon lam gyi phyi yi yul rnams 'gyur ro/ /gshen gyi smon 
78.18(1): lam gyis nang gi sems ni zhi'o/ /lcags kyi khang pa dgu rim ni/ bdud rtsi'i skyed 
78.19(1): mo tshal du song / mun pa'i khang pa gling dgu ni/ nyi zla'i gzhal yas khang du song /
78.20(1): rnag khrag mtsho mo mang po ni/ bdud rtsi'i mtsho mo gling dgur song / tsher ma'i mya ngam 
78.21(1): snam bu ni/ sman gyi nags tshal gling dgur song / de ltar yi dwags kyi phyi yi yul 
79.1(1): rnams 'gyur ro/ /nang gi sems rnams zhi bas/ yi dwags bog ri mgo dang pring 
79.2(1): rgyud ske/ rtsa 'jag rkang dang byang 'brog lto/ las kyi sgrib pa byang nas su/ thar pa'i 
79.3(1): go 'phang thob ste song / gto bu dod des ma byin pa blangs pa'i lan chags kher nas/
79.4(1): yi dwags bkres skom gyi yul nas thar ro/ /
79.5(1): de nas yang las kyi rnam par smin pas/ mdun du mun pa 'khrig nas/ byol song 
79.6(1): gi gnas su skyes so/ / sdig pa 'brong tsam dang / grog ma khyi tsam dang / sdom nag 
79.7(1): po ra skyes tsam dang / sbrul nag po 'dom dgu pas bskor nas/ 'jigs par dran 
79.8(1): yang 'bros sa med do/ /sems can phyi mas dbyug pas ni rdeg /rdo yis ni 'tshog /
79.9(1): lcags kyis ni 'brab/ gto bu dod de yang tshe snga ma rjes su dran pa'i bon yod pas/
79.10(1): na zhing tsha ba'i sdug bsngal ni med do/ /skyes bu lag pa brkyang bskum yang mi mthong 
79.11(1): pa'i mun pas gtibs/ shin tu yang rmongs nas 'dug go /der gshen rab kyis 
79.12(1): gzigs nas/ 'khor rnams la bka' bstsal pa/ gto bu dod de ma shi gson tsam 
79.13(1): na/ rgyu gti mug shas che zhing / rkyen bkol spyod kyi las byas pas/ 'bras bu byol 
79.14(1): song gi gnas su skyes nas 'dug /mun pas ni gtibs/ byol song mang pos ni 
79.15(1): brdung brdeg 'phro med du byas pas/ byol song gi sgo gcod cing 'dren pa'i lha gshen 
79.16(1): la phyag bgyis shing mchod pa phul cig /glud gtor mang po khams gsum gyi sems 
79.17(1): can la sbyin par thongs shig /de skad ces gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ yang 
79.18(1): yid kyi khye'u chung gis/ gshen gyi mtshan nas brjod do/ /rma lo g.yu lo 'khor rnams 
79.19(1): kyis/ mtshan byang thogs nas lha phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i klong nas 
79.20(1): bskyed pa'i lha/ gshen lha 'od dkar la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i klong 
79.21(1): nas bskyed pa'i lha/ shel lcags sngon po la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i 
80.1(1): klong nas bskyed pa'i lha/ gar gsas btsan po la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam 
80.2(1): mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i lha/ gar bu shang rgyal la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam 
80.3(1): mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i lha/ rgod gsas kham pa la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid 
80.4(1): nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i lha/ rgod bu 'phar drag la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon 
80.5(1): nyid nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i lha/ gsas rje rmang po la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon 
80.6(1): nyid nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i lha/ gsas bu tshon gang la phyag 'tshal lo/ /
80.7(1): bon nyid nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i lha/ gnam gsas dbyings rum la phyag 
80.8(1): 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i lha/ gnam bu phyod pa la phyag 
80.9(1): 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ ye shes kyi sgron ma 
80.10(1): can la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ ye shes 
80.11(1): chen po khyab bdal la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i 
80.12(1): gshen/ ye shes chen po zang thal la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i klong nas 
80.13(1): bskyed pa'i gshen/ ye shes chen po gsal 'bar la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam

80.15(1): nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ ye shes sgrol byed la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon 
80.16(1): nyid nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ ye shes bdud rtsi can la phyag 'tshal 
80.17(1): lo/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ ye shes nyi ma'i 'od zer 
80.18(1): can la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ ye shes 
80.19(1): zla ba'i gur khyim can la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i 
80.20(1): gshen/ ye shes drag po'i thog mda' can la phyag 'tshal lo/ /de ltar bon nyid nam 
80.21(1): mkha'i klong nas bskyed pa'i lha gshen nyi shu tham pa la phyag 'tshal zhing mchod pa phul/
81.1(1): bskor ba byas shing khams gsum gyi sems can rnams la/ lan chags kyi gtor 
81.2(1): ma rnams dang / gzugs brnyan gyi yas stags btang bas/ gshen gyi dgongs pa 
81.3(1): dang / lha gshen gyi thugs rje yis/ yas stags kyang gnas su phyin no/ /byol song gi 
81.4(1): yul du char bzhin du babs pas/ gto bu dod de la/ 'jigs pa'i byol song mang 
81.5(1): pos bskor nas/ lan chags 'ded pa rnams kyang / bkres pa'i zas dang bskom 
81.6(1): pa'i btung ba dang 'phrad nas/ shin tu bying zhing rmugs pa'i sdug bsngal ni/ ye 
81.7(1): shes khong nas gsal lo/ /gto bu dod de yi byol song mang po la bsad bcad dang /
81.8(1): bkol spyod mang po byas pa'i lan chags kher ro/ /bon nyid nam mkha'i klong nas 
81.9(1): bskyed pa'i lha gshen nyi shu tham pas/ byol song gi yul du byon nas smon lam btab 
81.10(1): pas/ lha'i smon lam gyis phyi yi yul rnams 'gyur ro/ /gshen gyi smon lam gyis 
81.11(1): nang gi sems zhi'o/ /mun pa nag pos gtibs pa ni/ gsal ba'i sgron mar gyur 
81.12(1): ro/ /glen lkugs myos pa'i sdug pa ni/ dran pa sems kyi sgron mar gyur ro/ /rgya mtsho 
81.13(1): grang 'khyag gling khyim ni/ 'bru dang sman gyi tshar du gyur ro/ /de ltar byol song phyi'i 
81.14(1): yul rnams 'gyur ro/ /nang gi sems zhi nas/ byol song rkang med 'khob pa mang po 
81.15(1): ni/ rdzu 'phrul gyi rkang pa thob nas thar ro/ /rkang gnyis 'gro ba mang po ni/ mtho ris 
81.16(1): them skas rnyed nas thar/ rkang bzhi bgrod pa mang po ni/ mtho ris go 'phang thob 
81.17(1): nas thar/ rkang mang 'jigs pa mang po yang / grub pa'i gnas su ngo shes nas thar/
81.18(1): gto bu dod de yang gti mug dbang gis bkol spyad brdungs brgyags mang pos 
81.19(1): byas pa'i lan chags kher nas/ byol song glen lkug gi yul nas thar ro/
81.20(1): de nas yang las kyi rnam par smin pas mtha' 'khob mi yi gnas su skyes so/ /
81.21(1): skyes ma thag tu 'du ba'i nad kyis zin/ mdze dang phol dang skran dang dmu chu dang /
82.1(1): sur ya nag po glo nas rdol ba dang / dregs dang grum bu shin tu khol ba dang / mi 
82.2(1): nad lang dgu sdug pa'i nad kyis zin/ pha ma dbul bas bza' zhing btung ba zhan/
82.3(1): mtha' 'khob gnas su skyes pas phan pa'i sman mi rnyed/ sdug bsngal mi bzod tshad 
82.4(1): ni bye tshan srin 'bu 'dra/ sdug bsngal zhen pa'i dbang gis rab tu de ltar sbyong ngo / /
82.5(1): der gshen rab kyi spyan gyis gzigs/ 'khor rnams la bka' bstsal pa/ gto bu 
82.6(1): dod de ni ma shi gson tsam na/ rgyu phrag dogs la shas che zhing / rkyen gzhan dag 
82.7(1): smad pa'i thabs mang po byas pas/ 'bras bu mtha' 'khob kyi mi ru skyes nas 'dug /
82.8(1): skyes ma thag tu mi nad lang dgu byung nas shin tu sbyong / pha ma dbul che bas bza' 
82.9(1): zhing btung rgyu chung / mtha' 'khob gnas su skyes pas phan pa'i sman mi rnyed/ de

82.11(1): 'tshal zhing mchod pa phul cig /khams gsum gyi sems can rnams la glud gtor 
82.12(1): mang po sbyin par thongs shig /de skad ces gshen rab gyis bka' bstsal to/ /yang 
82.13(1): yid kyi khye'u chung gis lha gshen gyi mtshan nas brjod/ rma lo g.yu lo dang gto bu 
82.14(1): dod de'i 'khor rnams kyis/ mtshan byang thogs nas lha phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid

83.2(1): ba'i klong nas bskyed pa'i lha/ chu lha kun gso sman gyi dri mchog can la phyag 'tshal 
83.3(1): lo/ /bon nyid 'byung ba'i klong nas bskyed pa'i lha/ sa lha shong yangs 'degs pa'i 
83.4(1): stobs po che la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid 'byung ba'i klong nas bskyed pa'i lha/ sa lha 
83.5(1): kun 'byung rin chen sna lnga can la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid 'byung ba'i klong nas 
83.6(1): bskyed pa'i gshen/ rlung bon phyod de gsang rgyal la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid 'byung 
83.7(1): ba'i klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ yangs pa'i rlung bon bskyed pa'i 'khor lo can

83.15(1): rtsi kha brod ngad kyi zil pa can la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid 'byung ba'i klong nas

83.17(1): lo/ /bon nyid 'byung ba'i klong nas bskyed pa'i gshen/ yangs pa'i sa bon mi 'gyur 
83.18(1): gling drug gser gyi thor tsug can la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bon nyid 'byung ba'i klong nas

83.21(1): nyi shu tham pa la lha phyag btsal bskor ba byas mchod pa phul gyin/ khams gsum 
84.1(1): gyi sems can rnams la/ lan chags kyi gtor ma dang / gzugs brnyan gyi yas 
84.2(1): stags btang bas/ gshen rab kyi dgongs pa dang / lha gshen gyi thugs rje yis/
84.3(1): yas stags kyang gnas su phyin to/ /mtha' 'khob mi yi gnas su char bzhin babs 
84.4(1): pas/ gto bu dod de la/ mi'i sdug bsngal brgyad kyis bskor nas/ lan chags 
84.5(1): 'ded pa rnams kyang ci 'dod dang 'phrad nas/ dgos 'dod re ba bskangs pas/
84.6(1): gto bu 'dod de lan chags pa'i bu lon kher ro/ /bon nyid 'byung ba'i klong nas 
84.7(1): bskyed pa'i lha gshen nyi shu tham pas/ mtha' 'khob mi'i yul du byon nas smon lam

84.9(1): gyis nang gi sems zhi'o/ /su med mtha' 'khob yul du ni/ longs spyod dge ba dang 
84.10(1): ldan pa'i/ pho mo mang pos lhag gis gang / ci med mya ngam snam bu ni/ 'bru bcud 
84.11(1): sman gyi nags su chags/ de ltar phyi'i yul rnams 'gyur ro/ nang gi sems rnams 
84.12(1): zhi bas/ pha ma dbul 'phongs che ba ni/ mi zad rin chen gter dang 'phrad/ mi 
84.13(1): rnams srin po nying sha can/ sdug bsngal 'dod pas gdungs ba ni/ ci 'dod re ba 
84.14(1): so sor bskangs/ gto bu dod de sbyong ba ni/ mi yi yul nas tshe 'phos nas/ rin po 
84.15(1): che'i khye'u 'od 'bar ba de/ shes bzhin khong nas gsal bas mtho ris ngan song shes/
84.16(1): las kyi rnam par smin pas lha ma yin gyi yul du skyes/ lha ma yin gyi dmag tshogs 
84.17(1): mang pos lan chags snyog tu byung / nam mkha'i khams nas lha ma yin gyi dmag la/
84.18(1): dbal yog khrin dang gsum/ gnyer 'o 'tshams dang gsum/ bdud dang btsan 
84.19(1): dang dmu dang gsum/ srid skos phywa dang gsum/ gnyan po lha dang bcu gsum/
84.20(1): yar g.yen gnyan po bcu gsum bgyi ste/ de'i dmag gis rin po che khye'u chung gi 
84.21(1): mgul nas bzung nas/ la las mda' rdeg /la las mdung 'debs/ la las rdo 
85.1(1): rdeg /la las lcags kyis 'brab/ la las me 'bud dang / la las chu skol/ de ltar 
85.2(1): sbyong ngo / bar g.yen gtod po dgu la/ zla nyi skar dang gsum/ sprin gzha' dal 
85.3(1): dang gsum/ zer lo rdzi dang gsum/ de ltar rnams ni bar snang gi lha ma yin/ bar 
85.4(1): g.yen gtod po dgu la bgyi ste/ de'i dmag gis rin po che'i khye'u chung gi lag pa 
85.5(1): g.yas g.yon nas zer thag sna dgu btags la las mdas rdeg /la las mdung 
85.6(1): gis 'debs/ la las rdos rdeg /la las lcags kyis brab/ la las chu skol/ la 
85.7(1): las me 'bud de ltar sbyong ngo / / /sa gzhi'i lha ma yin gyi dmag la/ klu gnyan rgyal 
85.8(1): dang / sman gzed srin dang gsum/ 'dre sri byur dang gsum/ gshin rje chud dang 
85.9(1): gnyis te bcu gcig ni/ sa g.yen che ba bcu gcig gis bgyi ste/ de'i dmag gis 
85.10(1): rin po che'i khye'u chung gi rkang pa g.yas pa dang / rkang pa g.yon pa nas byad thag 
85.11(1): bcu gcig gis btags nas// la las mdas rdeg /la las mdung gis 'debs/
85.12(1): la las rdos rdeg /la las lcag gis rdeg /la las me 'bud/ la las chu skol/ de 
85.13(1): ltar sbyong ngo / /de gshen rab kyis gzigs nas/ 'khor rnams la bka' bstsal pa/
85.14(1): gto bu dod de 'di ma shi gson tsam na/ rgyu nga rgyal la shas che zhing / rkyen 'thab

104.9(1): na ngu zhing 'dug pa gzigs nas/ shin tu ma dgyes pa'i sems byung ngo / /dgongs

104.12(1): gshegs so/ /yul de'i la kar phyin nas/ zhal nas smod btsugs pa/ ngas kyang 
104.13(1): dge la dad bskyed g.yung drung bon bshad nas/ nyon mongs sgrib pa ma 'byongs 
104.14(1): sems can cha la gnas pa 'dra/ yul 'dir bstan pa spel bas bstan pa nub ste

104.18(1): de nas la brgal lung 'bogs nas byon pas/ lam ka'i khang pa zhig na mgar

104.21(1): lags/ bzang mgar ni yo mnyes lags/ nangs kyi ni dro ma myong / gdugs kyi ni 
105.1(1): phyed la thug /nangs kyi dro gcig gsol/ mgar bas thos nas mgar mo la bos 
105.2(1): nas smras pa/ 'u bu'i sgo 'di na shin tu ngag 'jam pa gcig /dro slong pa su yin ji 
105.3(1): lta bu zhig snang ltos la shog /mgar mos bltas nas mgar ba la smras pa/ gsung gi 
105.4(1): ngag 'jam pa bas kyang /zhal gyi ras bzang ba'i bon po gcig gda' 'o/ /de skad 
105.5(1): ces glengs pas/ mgar bas kyang mgar gyi 'phro bcad nas/ zhe sa lugs bzhin du 
105.6(1): phul nang du spyan drangs nas/ gsol zas gyi dro btab bo/ /de nas slob dpon gyis 
105.7(1): smon lam btab nas gshegs so/slob dpon gshegs pa'i rting la mgar ba mgar

105.9(1): gzhan ma ni su yang ma 'ongs nan/ da nang gi bon pos brkus pas/ do nub mi 
105.10(1): bsleb la 'ur rgyugs shig zer bas/ mgar ba yang shin tu snying na nas/ mgar gri 
105.11(1): nag po rked par bcugs nas brgyugs te song ngo / /la gcig brgal ba'i pha log 
105.12(1): tu khrel gyis bslebs nas/ mgar bas slob dpon la smras pa/ da nangs phugs su 
105.13(1): bcug nas zhim dgu'i zas kyis gsan('gron)de'i lan du nga yi rin chen gser 
105.14(1): rku'am/ khrel med po khyod da ni ling gis gtang ngo zer nas/ glo nas mgar gri nag 
105.15(1): po ldur gyis phyung nas/ slob dpon la rdeg du byung ngo / /slob dpon gyis bshad pa'i 
105.16(1): long ni med/ zing kyis btang nas 'dzings pas/ mgar bas slob dpon la gor 
105.17(1): che nas/ gris ma phog par mgar ba'i lag pa g.yas g.yon gnyis tsir gyis zin 
105.18(1): to/ /de nas slob dpon gyis mgar bar gsungs pa/ nga rgyal po dang ba yid ring gi 
105.19(1): mchod gnas dam pa byed tsam na/ btsun mo 'gu ling ma ti la/ rtsa ba'i dam tshig 
105.20(1): ma nyams nas/ mi gtsang pa yang ma spyad la/ mgar gyi so mal phyin pa'i tshe/ nang 
105.21(1): gi dro mal sbyar sbyar nas/ rin chen gser gyi sbram bu la/ rtsa ba'i dam tshig ma nyams 
106.1(1): nas/ ma byin pa yang ma blangs so/ /sems can 'dod pa bskang ba'i phyir/ bdag 
106.2(1): gi srog la tshad pa yi/ mgar gri nag po gser du 'gyur/ gsungs nas hos ru'i rtse 
106.3(1): mo tug tug byas pas/ mgar gri yang gser du ser ling gis song ngo / /mgar ba 
106.4(1): yang skyengs pas bzhin log ge snang ngo / /slob dpon gyis yang gsungs pa/ khyed kyi 
106.5(1): gser gyi sbram bu ni/ ra ba'i lud gseb nas mgar mos rnyed nas yod kyis/ nga ni 
106.6(1): ma byin mi len pa'i bon po zhig yin pas/ khyod kyi gser rku ba'i lugs yod dam 
106.7(1): gsungs nas/ slob dpon yang phar la gshegs so/ /mgar ba yang phyir la log

113.20(1): btsun mo 'di nad tsi tsi dza las zin pa'i 'dre ni/ kha lag gnyis kyi mi thub pa'i mi

114.1(1): phyi ma ni cis kyang mi phan no/ /ston pa gshen rab mi bo dang / skur pa btab pa'i 
114.2(1): mi de ni spyan drangs nas/ bskang gso byas shing mthol bshags ma byas na/ phyi ma 
114.3(1): cis kyang phan par mi 'gyur ro// /rgyal po shin tu yang 'phrigs pa skyes so/ /btsun 
114.4(1): mo ni shin tu yang bsnyon nas khas ma blangs so/ /de nas rgyal pos 'khor pa rnams 
114.5(1): la bka' bstsal nas/ rgyal bu lcam dral dang 'khor pa mang po zhig ni/ lho phyogs kyi 
114.6(1): 'jig rten khams su slob dpon tshol du btang ngo / /rgyal po nyid shing rta zangs kyi 
114.7(1): 'khor lo bzhi pa la bcibs nas/ rol mo dang 'khor pa mang po zhig ni nub phyogs 
114.8(1): kyi 'jig rten gyi khams nas ston pa gshen rab spyan 'dren du gshegs so//

114.10(1): btsal mchod pa phul nas zhus pa'i mdo/ ston pa'i sgron ma gshen rab mi bo lags/
114.11(1): bdag gi ni btsun mo nad tsi tsi dza las zin pas/ gzhan ma ni cis kyang mi phan 
114.12(1): pas/ mo ma kun shes thang po la mo btab pas/ gshen rab spyan drangs nas mchod 
114.13(1): pa phul zhing bskang bshags byas nas phan zer bas/ ston pa'i sgron ma 'gro ba'i 
114.14(1): don la gshegs par zhu/ de skad ces gsol to/ /gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/
114.15(1): gshen chen po lnga yang bon chen po lnga 'chad pa'i thun rdzogs pas/ 'khor ba'i lam

114.18(1): rten gyi khams su mchi'o/ 'ol mo lung ring gi slob bu 'bum phrag mang po rnams

114.20(1): bzhin du srungs shig /de skad ces bka' bstsal nas/ gser gyi shing rta 'khor lo

115.1(1): nas gshegs so/ /de nas chu gyim shang nag po brgal nas/ yul hos mo gling drug 
115.2(1): du gshegs so/ /ston pa la gnam gyi lha dang / sa'i klu dang bar gyi mi dang thams 
115.3(1): cad kyis lha phyag 'tshal zhing mchod pa phul lo/ /'dab chags dang gcan gzan 
115.4(1): dang mi nor thams cad kyis kyang / lha phyag btsal zhing mchod pa phul lo/ /btsun

115.6(1): du gshegs so/ /ro mchog dang ldan pa'i zas sna tshogs pa drangs so/ /gshen rab 
115.7(1): ni rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes can yin pas/ thugs la sa le mnga'

115.10(1): shog /de skad ces gshen rab kyis gsungs pas/ rgyal po'i dgongs pas shin tu ngo 
115.11(1): tsha nas lo rgyus kyi gtam ni zer ma phod do/ /sras lcam dral tshol tu btang ba yang

115.13(1): sring gnyis/ shin tu don gal che ba zhig gnyer du thal lo/ /de nas zhag gsum 
115.14(1): tshun chad du gshen rab kyi spyan sngar 'khor te mchi'o/ /de nas nangs par gdugs

115.18(1): bas/ shin tu yi mug la rab tu ga chad nas/ da lta dbugs kyis bslebs pa lags

123.11(1): ngo / /de la gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ btsun mo 'di las sgrib pa che ba ni/
123.12(1): mi ru gyur pa la yang med pa zhig snang ngo / /klu nag po lus po nas song yang / zos 
123.13(1): pa'i 'phro dang bzung pa'i rjes da rung ma rung bar snang bas/ nad mdze yang da rung

123.16(1): ces bka' bstsal to/ /
123.17(1): 7 de la btsun mos kyang bsam pas/ nga yi ring la bon gyi bstan pa yang de'u

123.19(1): skyes pa la/ bdag la mi skye pha log tu rkang pa phog pa'i me tog snga ma kun kyang tshig 
123.20(1): ste 'gro ba 'di ni/ bdag ka na sdig re che las re ngan mno nas 'gyod pa drag po 
123.21(1): yang dag pa zhig skyes so/ /gzugs kyi phung po yang 'jig pa tsam du ma dga' nas/

132.16(1): che dbang rdzogs ma la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bdal pa'i lha mo re shag 'phrul mo che la phyag 
132.17(1): 'tshal lo/ /bdal pa'i lha mo la gcod sngags 'dzab can la phyag 'tshal lo/ /bdal 
132.18(1): pa'i lha mo mi yengs ting 'dzin can la phyag 'tshal lo/ /thugs rje'i lha mo sprul pa'i 
132.19(1): sku la phyag 'tshal lo/ /thugs rje'i lha mo gsal ba'i spyan la phyag 'tshal lo/ /thugs 
132.20(1): rje'i lha mo snyoms pa'i thugs la phyag 'tshal lo/ /thugs rje'i lha mo snyan pa'i dbyangs 
132.21(1): la phyag 'tshal lo/ /thugs rje'i lha mo rdzu 'phrul zhabs la phyag 'tshal lo/ /thugs

133.6(1): 'tshal lo/ /sprul pa'i lha mo gsal ba'i me long can la phyag 'tshal lo/ /sprul pa'i lha

133.10(1): rgyud nges par 'bogs la phyag 'tshal lo/ /sprul pa'i lha mo bka' rgyud che bar spel

133.19(1): phyag 'tshal lo/ /byams pa'i lha mo kun la bu ltar sems la phyag 'tshal lo/ /byams

141.1(1): kyang ran pa'i tshad dang ldan pa zhig gda'o/ /gshen rab lags/ mi ring mi thung

141.3(1): dang tsan dan gyi dri ma snyoms par bro ba zhig gda'o/ /de ltar hos dang ba yid ring 
141.4(1): gi bu mo hos bza' rgyal med ma/ gshen rab kyis khab kyi dam par bzhes pa 'di 
141.5(1): ni/ phyi'i yul bzhi ni shin tu yang bzang ba zhig gda'o/ /rab tu yang mdzes pa zhig 
141.6(1): gda'o/ /bram ze'i bu 'gyur ba blo gsal gyis de skad ces gsol to/ /de la gshen 
141.7(1): rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ bram ze'i bu 'gyur ba blo gsal ni shin tu rig pa'i blo 
141.8(1): rtsal che ba/ rab tu bzang ngan gyi mtshan brtag mkhas pas/ bdag gi btsun mo 
141.9(1): hos dang ba yid ring gi bu mo hos bza' rgyal med ma 'di/ 'byung ba bzhi yis 
141.10(1): bskyed pa'i phung po phyi yi yul bzhi ni/ rab tu mdzes par kha mar btags/ shin 
141.11(1): tu bzang pa'i kha mar btags/ da yang rig pa'i rtsal can khyed/ sems dang yid 
141.12(1): las bskyed pa yi/ nang gi rnam shes tshogs brgyad la/ nyon mongs sgrib pa che'am 
141.13(1): chung / rig pa'i rtsal can khyed kyis rtogs/ de skad ces bka' bstsal to/ /
141.14(1): yang bram ze'i bu 'gyur ba blo gsal gyis/ gshen rab la gsol pa/ gshen rab 
141.15(1): kyi btsun mo hos dang ba yid ring gi bu mo hos bza' rgyal med ma 'di ni 'byung 
141.16(1): ba bzhi'i bskyed pa'i/ phyi'i yul bzhi rab tu mdzes/ rnam shes sems kyi bskyed 
141.17(1): pa'i/ nang gi tshogs brgyad shin tu dge/ de ltar sems can phyi ma dang khyad par 
141.18(1): bdog pa zhig gda'o/ /gshen rab lags/ sems nyid nyon mongs pa'i sa bon 
141.19(1): zad pa zhig gda'o/ /gshen rab lags sems nyid kyi bon skye ba med pa'i don 
141.20(1): rtogs pa zhig gda'o/ /gshen rab lags/ rtsal shugs kyi sbyin pa rgya chen gtong 
141.21(1): nus pa zhig gda'o/ /gshen rab lags/ 'byor ldan gyi tshul khrims zab mo srung

142.2(1): du len nus pa zhig gda'o/ /gshen rab lags/ byams pa'i sems dang ldan pas 
142.3(1): skye 'gro bu ltar gso nus pa zhig gda'o/ /gshen rab lags/ nges pa'i don rtogs 
142.4(1): pas bden pa'i tshig ston nus pa zhig gda'o/ /gshen rab lags/ rten pa'i sa ru 
142.5(1): mthun pas/ bskyed pa'i yum du bzang ba de ltar shin tu yang ngo mtshar che ba zhig 
142.6(1): gda'o/ /de skad ces bram ze'i bu 'gyur ba blo gsal gyis gsol to/ /de nas bram 
142.7(1): zes mtshan bzang por btags so/ /mtshan bzang por btags pa'i kha mar de 
142.8(1): la/ 'ol mo lung ring du 'tshogs pa'i mi rnams kun kyang yid dga' spro ba skyes so/ /
142.9(1): de'i rang bzhin gyi bkra shis kyi sna sa der/ srid pa'i bon pos mtshan dang rab tu 
142.10(1): ldan pa'i hos bza' rgyal med de/ srid pas bskos pa'i gtsug lag gzhung bzhin 
142.11(1): du/ sna ni blan no/ /bdud ni bcad do/ /sri ni mnan no/ byur ni phud do/ /'dre ni 
142.12(1): bkar ro/ /lha ni gsol lo/ /dpal ni skyabs so/ /de nas gnas mchog dam pa 
142.13(1): 'ol mo lung ring du/ mi thams cad kyi g.yang cha sna tshogs pa thogs nas/ mdun 
142.14(1): bsus nas gshegs so/ /de nas bkra shis skyid kyi pho brang / mkhar bar po so brgyad 
142.15(1): kyi nang du gshegs so/ /de nas srid pa'i bon pos g.yung drung mthar rgyas kyi bon 
142.16(1): gyer nas/ hos bza' rgyal med kyi spyi bo'i gtsug rum du/ g.yung drung dgu skor gyi 
142.17(1): dbang rgya btab bo/ /de nas g.yu khri sngon mo la bzhugs so/ /gser khri ser po la 
142.18(1): ston pa gshen rab bzhugs so/ /de ltar khye'u dang bu mo'i tshul du 'tshogs so/ /dang 
142.19(1): po gshen rab 'jig rten mi yul du ston pa la gshegs tsam na/ yul bar lha 'od 
142.20(1): gsal nas/ ri rab kyi rtse mo la byon nas/ gsas mkhar lha rtse dgung nam brtsegs 
142.21(1): pa'i dus su/ mthu stobs dang byin rlabs su drag pa'i/ lha rnams dam la btags

143.2(1): 7 de nas ston pa gshen rab la gsol pa/ bdag cag rnams la gshen rab 
143.3(1): kyis/ dam la btags shing lung phog pa lags pas/ hos dang ba yid ring gi 
143.4(1): sras mo hos bza' rgyal med ma 'di/ rgyal po'i chab srid 'dzin pa dang / sems

143.6(1): rab lags/ shin tu yang legs so/ /gshen rab lags/ rab tu yang legs so/ /
143.7(1): bdag cag rnams kyang bkra shis shing gzhung du bzang ba'i smon lam re re 'debs

143.21(1): smon lam lha'i mthu 'bul lo/ /rgyal med lags/ smin ma dkyus ring ba yi ge na ro

144.5(1): rdzogs pa'i smon lam lha'i mthu 'bul lo/ /rgyal med lags/ shangs kyi dbyibs

160.3(1): gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ gdags pa chen po'i ye shes bcad pa'i drod tshad

160.8(1): pa'i drod tshad 'byung na/ 'khor du gyur ba'i bdag cag da rung shes pa rmongs/ zung 
160.9(1): 'brel tshad ma gsum dang don mnyam bden pa gnyis/ gang dang gang la 'dogs 
160.10(1): pa ston pas bshad par zhu/ de skad ces gto bus gsol to/ /gshen rab kyis 
160.11(1): bka' bstsal pa/ zung 'brel tshad ma gsum ni ston pa'i lung tshad ma dang gcig /
160.12(1): slob dpon gyi bka' tshad ma dang gnyis/ rang gi rig pa tshad ma dang gsum mo/
160.13(1): do mnyam gyi bden pa gnyis ni/ don dam dam pa'i bden pa dang / kun rdzob kyi 
160.14(1): bden pa gnyis so/ /de la tshad ma gsum la zung du 'brel ba ni/ lung gi nang nas 
160.15(1): gtan tshigs kyi tshad ma 'byung ngo / /bka' yi nang nas man ngag gi tshad ma 'byung 
160.16(1): ngo / /rig pa'i nang nas rig pa tshad ma 'byung ngo / /de la bden pa gnyis do ru 
160.17(1): mnyam pa ni/ don dam pa g.yung drung klong du bden pa dang / kun rdzob mtshan ma 
160.18(1): dngos por bden pa'o/ /de rnams gtan la 'bebs thabs 'di ltar ro/ /lung 
160.19(1): tshad ma zhes bya ba ni/ sngon gyi ston pa ji snyed nas/ da lta gshen rab bdag nyid 
160.20(1): yan chod kyis/ zhal nas gsungs pa'i lung 'di nges par mi nor btsan par 
160.21(1): gzungs su zungs/ bka' tshad ma zhes bya ba ni/ gang zag sbyangs pa'i 'phro can shes

161.2(1): skyes pa'i rig pa dang / lhan cig skyes pa'i ma rig bya ba gnyis/ kun gzhi la ye

169.13(1): sgrib pa can dang / sgrib pa can gyi sgrib pa can dang gsum mo/ /mkha' la rgyu ba'i yi 
169.14(1): dwags la bcu ste/ steng gi lha mthu can gyi yi dwags dang / 'og gi klu lto phye can gyi 
169.15(1): yi dwags dang / shar dri za'i yi dwags dang / byang me drang shugs kyi yi dwags dang /
169.16(1): nub chu bdag klu yi yi dwags dang / lho srul po gdug pa'i yi dwags dang / byang 
169.17(1): shar grul bum can gyi yi dwags dang / byang nub nam mkha' lding gi yi dwags dang /
169.18(1): lho nub 'ju byed gtum po'i yi dwags dang / lho shar skem byed mchu ring gi yi 
169.19(1): dwags dang bcu'o/ /rgyu drug 'khor ba'i yi dwags la gnyis te/ shing rta'i 'khor lo 
169.20(1): bzhin du las kyis gcig nas gcig tu gcig char 'pho ba dang / zo chu brgyud pa 
169.21(1): bzhin du khad kyis rgyu ba dang gnyis te/ de ltar sgos kyi rigs ni bco lnga'o/ /yid 
170.1(1): btags rnams ni lci ba bzhi dang / 'dod chags rgyu dang ma byin pa len pa'i rkyen 
170.2(1): gyis/ spyir na yi dwags kyi 'bras bur skye'o/ /de nas yang byol song gi spyi'i sde dang /
170.3(1): sgos kyi rigs ston pas gsal bar go phye nas/ bka' bstsal to/ /spyir na byol 
170.4(1): song la spyi yi sde rnam pa gsum mo/ /gsum gang zhe na/ gnas na las kyis sbyong 
170.5(1): pa'i byol song dang / mkha' la rkyen gyis thar ba'i byol song dang / bar na dus 
170.6(1): kyis 'thom pa'i byol song dang gsum mo/ /gnas na las kyi sbyong pa'i byol song zhes 
170.7(1): bya ba ni/ rgya mtsho chen po na/ byol song gi gling yin no/ /mun pa chen po ni sems

170.9(1): te/ gcig gis gcig za gcig gis gcig gnon/ gcig gi gcig 'tshe ste/ shin

170.12(1): dang / cang shes kyi rta dang / 'dod 'jo'i ba la sogs te/ mi yul gling bzhi dang 
170.13(1): ba tsha can gyi mtsho yan chod na/ 'dab chags nam mkha' la 'phur ba'i rigs dang /
170.14(1): gcan zan sha khrag la dad pa'i rigs dang / mi nor bkol spyod byed pa'i rigs 
170.15(1): dang / ri dwags gnod sbyin spyod pa'i rigs dang / drod gsher rlan las mi mthun 
170.16(1): par skye ba'i rigs dang / 'di ltar snang ba thams cad do/ /bar na dus kyis 'thom 
170.17(1): pa'i byol song ni/ mun pa dang mun pa chen po'i nang na/ rkang med rkang mang rkang 
170.18(1): gnyis rkang bzhi la/ lag pa brkyang bskum mi mthong pa'i nang na/ gcod sbyong med 
170.19(1): par shin tu 'thom pa'o/ /sgos kyi rigs ni grangs su ngas ma gsungs/ spyir na 'gro 
170.20(1): ba lnga'i sems can rangs po dang / rigs gcig byol song sde ni byol song gcig pu 
170.21(1): mang / rigs lnga ri bo chen po nyid tsam mo/ /rigs cig byol song grangs ni rtsi shing 
171.1(1): tsam/ rigs lnga sa gzhi chen po nyid tsam mo/ /rigs cig byol song rdul gyi grangs 
171.2(1): tsam mo/ /rigs lnga bya'i lus po nyid tsam mo/ /rigs cig bya spu'i nyag ma'i grangs 
171.3(1): tsam mo/ /sgos kyi rigs ni du min bsam las 'das pa'o/ /byol song du min bsam 
171.4(1): 'das skye ba ni/ gti mug rgyu dang bkol spyad rkyen gyis 'bras bu byol song dngos su 
171.5(1): skye ba'o/ /de nas yang mi'i spyi'i sde dang / sgos kyi rigs ni/ ston pas gsal bar 
171.6(1): go phye nas bka' bstsal te/ mi la spyi'i sde la rnam pa gnyis so/ /dgos kyi rigs ni 
171.7(1): rnam pa bcu gnyis ni/ gnyis gang zhe na/ mi dang mi 'am ci gnyis so/ /mi la sgos

171.10(1): tog sbub gnas kyi mi dang brgyad do/ /de la 'dzam bu gling bzhi'i mi ni/ shar gyi 
171.11(1): lus 'phags po drod las skye ba'i mi dang / byang gi sgra mi snyan rdzus nas skye ba'i mi

171.13(1): nas skye ba'i mi'o/ /de la 'khor lo dbang bsgyur gyi mi ni/ rin po che sna bzhi las 
171.14(1): grub pa'i sgo nga 'od zer can las skye ba'o/ /gnas ni ri rab kyi khong pa'i dkyil

171.17(1): khyim bdun gyi mi ni/ mu khyud 'dzin gyi rtse lkog na gnas so/ /las ni tshul khrims

178.14(1): kyang spro ba skyes/ gnam gyi lha dang sa yi klu yang 'dus/ spyi dbang chen po thob pa'i

178.16(1): gshen rab sras su 'gyur ba'i rgyal bu de la ni/ lha chen tshangs pas bdud rtsi'i 
178.17(1): khrus byas/ lha brgya byin gyis yid bzhin gyi nor bu rin po ches dbang bskur/ klu 
178.18(1): 'jog pos u du 'bar ba'i me tog gis lte ba byas/ klu dga' bos dga' ldan gyi 
178.19(1): tshang bur bcug /klu mal gros kyi smon lam gyis nyag thag gis tshang thag byas/ phywa'i 
178.20(1): rgyal pos bkra shis kyi phywa g.yang blang / dmu yi rgyal pos g.yung drung gi dmu thag 
178.21(1): btags/ gtsug phud can gyi gshen gyis 'gyur med gtsug phud bcas/ dbang rgya 
179.1(1): can gyi gshen gyi tshe yi lan phran blas/ bram ze'i bu 'gyur ba blo gsal gyis/ mtshan 
179.2(1): brtags pas kyang shin tu mtshan bzang nas/ yab yum la sogs pa'i tshogs pa 
179.3(1): rnams la kha mar gsol pa/rgyal po'i sras 'di ni lha srin sde brgyad la bka' btsan

179.5(1): so/ /phyi'i yul brtags pas kyang / yab dang mthun par rin po che dar dkar du 
179.6(1): dril ba 'dra ba/ phyi dkar la 'jam pa/ nang bkra la gsal ba zhig gda'o/ /nang 
179.7(1): gi sems brtags pas kyang /dpyad la khri lde gsal bas dpyad rgyu bdud rtsir sbyor 
179.8(1): nus pa zhig gda'o/ /sras de yang thabs dang shes rab las sprul pa'i sku yin pas/
179.9(1): dgung lo gcig na shes rab kyi tshad du phyin/ dgung lo gnyis na snying rje'i sems 
179.10(1): dang ldan/ dgung lo gsum na yab la the tshom pher ro/ /de la sems can kun la spro 
179.11(1): ba skyes so/ /gshen rab yab dang sras rgyas pas/ sems can kun kyang dad pa skyes 
179.12(1): so/ /nam mkha'i sprin tshogs bzhin du nyan no/ /
179.13(1): sras kyi yab la pus btsug thal sbyar gus pa'i tshul kyang phyung / gser la sogs 
179.14(1): pa'i rin chen lnga'i mchod pa phul/ zhal nas 'dzum phyung snyan pa'i ngag bsgrags

179.17(1): ces sras kyis yab la zhus sam gsol to/ /de la yab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ khams 
179.18(1): gsum las kyi 'khor ba'i sems can rnams/ ma rig mun nag 'thibs pa 'dra ba'i 
179.19(1): nang na gnas pa yis/ mi dge dug lnga'i skyon rnams ma bkag so sor spyad/ 'khor 
179.20(1): ba'i gnas lngar skye ba sbrang char 'bab pa 'dra/ gnyen po ye shes lnga yi rig pa'i rtsal 
179.21(1): bskyed nas/ nges tshig bden pa'i don ni de kho na nyid yin no/ /

180.2(1): las kyi 'khor ba'i sems can rnams/ dug lnga'i dbang gi 'khor ba'i gnas lngar

187.21(1): rting la rab tu gsal ba'i 'od byung ngo / /de'i rting la ngo mtshar che ba'i mi gcig la 
188.1(1): 'khor mang pos 'khor nas byung ngo / /de nas ston pa gshen rab mi bo/ me tog gi 
188.2(1): gling la bzhugs pa'i spyan lam du phyin no/ /de nas mi de rnams kyis gshen rab la 
188.3(1): skor ba byas/ lha phyag btsal me tog gtor nas zhus pa'i mdo/ sems can dpal 
188.4(1): mgon mi'i mchog /ston pa'i sgron ma skyes bu'i phul/ rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa'i 
188.5(1): thugs/ ma nges cir yang sprul pa'i sku/ zhal mthong zhu ba'i don ched ni/ bdag ni 
188.6(1): rgyal dpo yi rigs bgyi ba lags so/ /ming ni dpo rgyal 'bar ba'i sgron ma can bgyi 
188.7(1): ba lags so/ /yul ni khri dang 'byams pa'i gling bgyi ba lags so/ /mkhar ni shod 
188.8(1): pa brtsegs pa'i rtse bgyi ba lags so/ /grong khyer ni lhun grub 'dus pa bgyi ba lags 
188.9(1): so/ /yul ni shin tu bkra shis pa'i yul can lags so/ /mkhar de ni rab tu nyams 
188.10(1): dga' ba'i mkhar zhig lags so/ /grong khyer de ni 'dod pa kun tshang ba zhig lags 
188.11(1): so/ /yul de ni 'dod pa kun tshang ba dang las la bzang ngan rnam pa grangs mang 
188.12(1): yang / shin tu yang bzang la dad pa zhig lags so/ /sdig pa ni ci yang mi bgyid/
188.13(1): dge ba ni nyams su len pa zhig lags na/
188.14(1): yul de yi nub phyogs kyi gling na rgyal po phra mo khri 'od ces bgyis pa la/ rgyal bu khri 
188.15(1): shang bgyi ba zhig skyes pa/  shi ba'i nad kyis btab ste 'du ba rnam pa bzhi 'dus nas 
188.16(1): na ba la ci bgyis cis ma sman/ shin tu mo rno ba'i mo ma sdig nga sdig lom bgyi ba zhig 
188.17(1): gis kyang / yang nas yang du mo btab pas kyang ma rung / bon po thams cad gto 
188.18(1): byas kyang ma phan/ dus de na mo ma na re/ 'di la ni snying dang 'dra ba'i bran phrug 
188.19(1): khri shes bya ba ni/ rgyal bu dang skyes pa'i dus kyang gcig /rgyal bu dang mi na tsam na/
188.20(1): rol mo yang spyi la byed pa 'di glud du btang na ni/ rgyal bu rung ste mchi'o/ /zer 
188.21(1): nas mos bzung ngo / /de la rgyal bu nad pa'i mchid nas/ 'khor ba'i lus ni nam 
189.1(1): yang mi rtag nges/ rgyu las skyes pa'i gzugs ni cis kyang rkyen gyis 'jig /'du ba'i 
189.2(1): nad kyis zin pas bdag ni nam yang 'chi/ de lta bus tshig ni rna bar ma bsgrags 
189.3(1): shig zer nas nad pa ni shin tu ma rga'o/ /de la pha'i mchid nas/ legs par kho 
189.4(1): nar rung te mchis na/ bran phrug sdug pa 'di yang glud du ci ste mi gtang lags/
189.5(1): rgyal bu rung na bdag kyang glud du mchi ba tsam/ de la ma'i mchid nas/ bdag gis 
189.6(1): bu 'di drag po'i nad kyis bzung / ci byas cis kyang ma phan pas bran phrug btang 
189.7(1): pa lags/ yang phas smras pa/ mo ma lags legs par phan par nges na ci ste mi 
189.8(1): btang lags/ bran phrug btang nas rgyal bu ma sos na/ shin tu yang mi rung ba 
189.9(1): lags so/ /yang mo mas smras pa/ glud du btang shes pa'i bon po zhig tshol cig /nga 
189.10(1): la yon du zas phyed nor phyed byin cig /rgyal bu rung te 'ong gis mchi'o/ /der bon 
189.11(1): po rmed btang nas btsal bas/ / yul shod pa khrom rgyang bya ba zhig na/ chu smad kyi 
189.12(1): bon po gshen thang ma bsam gtan la zhus pa/ gshen de'i zhal nas khams gsum 
189.13(1): sems can mnyam pa'i cha la mi 'jog par/ gcig bsad gcig gso bya ba'i bon 
189.14(1): ni bdag gis mi shes so/ /de ni log par gol bas bya ru mi rung ngo / /gsungs nas 
189.15(1): ma gnang ngo / /
189.16(1): yang rgyal khams su rmed btang nas/ bon po btsal bas yul shel bu rtse ram bya 
189.17(1): ba na/ spa gyim shang gong gong bya ba gcig la zhus pas/ gshen de'i zhal nas/ rgyal 
189.18(1): khams na mi glud du gtong ba nga ma yin pa phyi mas mi shes so/ /ngas btang ste rgyal 
189.19(1): bu yang sos te 'ong ngo / /bdag la yon du yul zhing dang sne'u 'phrang gis chod la 
189.20(1): byin cig zer ro/ /de nas yul zhing dang sne'u 'phrang khas blangs nas spyan drangs 
189.21(1): so/ /yul de na shin tu yang glen pa mu lto ba sprang po g+ha ha d+ha nag po bya ba bos 
190.1(1): nas/ zas zhim po byin nas shan par bskos so/ /de nas de rnams nad pa'i sngas 
190.2(1): su 'tshogs so/ /bran phrug khri shes rgyal bu nad pa'i nad g.yog byed pa ni/ mo mas 
190.3(1): rtsir gyi bzung nas smras pa/ ngas gsang du med do/ /khyod kyi jo bo shin tu gces 
190.4(1): pa'i rgyal bu 'di/ nad dam pos zin pas ngas mo btab pas ni gzhan cis kyang mi 
190.5(1): phan pas khyod bran snying dang 'dra ba yin pas/ glud du btang nas sha brjes byas 
190.6(1): na rgyal bu 'di sos te 'ong pas/ sran skyed cig gsod pa yin zer te bran phrug ril 
190.7(1): gyis bkyigs so/ /bran phrug gis smras pa/ bdag kyang sngon nas las ngan gcig 
190.8(1): pu byas sam/ da lta sdug bsngal sha khrag lus 'di blang / rgyal bu sos par nges na 
190.9(1): bdag kyang sha rjes mdzod/ 'os pa tsam na dme ru mi 'gyur ram/ ngan bu ma bsad 
190.10(1): bkyigs pa btang par zhu/ de la rgyal bu nad pas smras pa/ bdag kyang sngon nas 
190.11(1): sdig tshogs che bas sems can lus su skyes/ da yang ngan song rgyud dam las ngan 
190.12(1): 'di lta bur mthong / nga ni nam yang mi 'tsho 'chi ba yin/ 'on no 'on no/ /bran 
190.13(1): phrug 'di ma bsad par thongs/ de la mas smras pa/ rgyal bu shi na bran gyis ci zhig 
190.14(1): bya/ bran phrug bsad nas sha rjes byas pa na/ rgyal bu myur bar la 'ur sos te 'ong /
190.15(1): sos nas bran g.yog mang po 'phral du rnyed/ da ni bran phrug glud du thongs shig 
190.16(1): zer/ yang rgyal bu nad pas smras pa/ pha ma ngan pas bdag la phan du re ba dang /
190.17(1): mo bon smyon pas za 'dod byed pa dang / g+ha ha d+ha nag po shin tu glen pa dang / bran 
190.18(1): phrug sdug pa dbang rgyu med pa dang / 'di rnams 'dus nas ji lta bu las kyang byed 
190.19(1): zer nas/ bran phrug la 'ju ni nad kyi nyam thag pas ma nus so/ /mig mi lta bar 
190.20(1): mgo ril gyis btums nas mal du nyal lo/ /de pha ma dang mo bon g+ha ha d+ha nag 
190.21(1): po rnams kyis/ bran phrug rgyal bu la phog dgu bskor nas/ 'dre la bstab ste sgor 
191.1(1): khur nas khyer ro/ /de nas thang la phyin nas/ bran phrug bkyigs pa btang nas mo 
191.2(1): mas rkang pa 'then/ bon pos lag pa bzung / g+ha ha d+ha nag pos srog kha khung ka 
191.3(1): phyes nas snying phyung ngo / /de nas mo bon gnyis kyis sha phyogs bzhi kun tu gtor 
191.4(1): ro/ /de nas slar khyim du phyin tsam na/ rgyal bu nad pa yang shi nas snang ngo / /mo 
191.5(1): bon yang shin tu ngo tsha la skyengs so/ /rab tu ngo tsha la skyengs so/ /de ltar skyengs pa'i 
191.6(1): rang bzhin gyis/ pha ma dang mo bon bzhi lcebs te thal lo/ /dus der bran phrug gi 
191.7(1): pha ma yang gnyis kyis/ g+ha ha d+ha nag po bsad nas snying phyung ngo / /ston pa'i sgron 
191.8(1): ma gshen rab mi bo lags/ 'di lta bu'i las dang spyod pa byung lags na/ rgyu dang 
191.9(1): 'bras bu ji lta bu ci lags/ rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pas bshad de gsol/ de 
191.10(1): skad ces rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can gyis zhus so/ /
191.11(1): de la gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can gyis zhus 
191.12(1): pa ni shin tu yang legs so/ /rab tu yang legs so/ /de ni 'di ltar ro/ /sems 
191.13(1): can ni las kyis 'chi ba yin no/ /sems can ni las kyis skye ba yin no/ /skye shi las 
191.14(1): kyi dbang che ba ni ma rtogs pas/ sdig pa de yi dang po rtsa ba ni mo mas lan no/ /de 
191.15(1): nas bon pos lan no/ /de nas mas lan no/ /de nas phas lan no/ /de nas g+ha ha 
191.16(1): d+ha nag pos lan no/ /de nas bran phrug gi pha ma gnyis kyis lan no/ /de yang shin 
191.17(1): tu yang sems can kun/ ma mthong bar mthong bya ba dang / mi shes pa shes bya ba ni 
191.18(1): shin tu sdig che ba yin no/ /ngan song gsum du yang gdon mi za bar skye bar nges 
191.19(1): so/ /sdug bsngal dmyal ba rnams kyang nyams su myong bar 'gyur nges so/ /de skad 
191.20(1): ces gshen rab kyi bka' bstsal to/ /
191.21(1): yang rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can gyis pus btsugs thal mo sbyar lha yi me tog 
192.1(1): pad ma dkar po phul nas zhus pa'i mdo/ ston pa'i sgron ma gshen rab mi bo lags/
192.2(1): rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa nyid la sa le gsal lags na/ shi ba dang bsad pa 
192.3(1): gnyis ni gang na skyes te 'dug pa lags/ pha dang ma gnyis gang na skyes te 'dug 
192.4(1): pa lags/ mo ma dang bon po gnyis gang na skyes te 'dug pa lags/ g+ha ha d+ha nag 
192.5(1): po gang na skyes te 'dug pa lags/ bran phrug gi pha ma gnyis gang na skyes te 'dug 
192.6(1): pa lags/ de skad ces rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can gyis gsol to/ /gshen 
192.7(1): rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ shin tu dge la dad pa'i rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma 
192.8(1): can/ lus kyang thud la yan lag sum/ pus mo tshugs la thal mo sbyor/ dbang po 
192.9(1): ma yeng brtan par nyon/ rgyu 'bras bden pa'i bon bshad kyis gsungs te/ gshen 
192.10(1): rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ de ni 'di ltar ro/ /de rnams ni bsam pa bzang ngan 
192.11(1): gyis/ gnas mtho dman skyid sdug tu skyes te 'dug go /rgyal bu khri shang ni bsam 
192.12(1): pa bzang ste/ shi kar nga rung du 'dod nas/ bran phrug bsad na yang bsad mi 
192.13(1): mno bar/ nga shi ma 'dod pas bran 'di gsod pa/ bran ma bsad par nga shi'o chog 
192.14(1): sems pa'i bsam pa bzang po des/ shi ma thag tu 'dod pa tshangs pa'i 'jig rten 
192.15(1): bya bar skyes te/ 'dod pa sna tshogs pa dang ldan par sum cu rtsa gsum gyi lhar skyes 
192.16(1): so/ /bran phrug khri shes ni bsam pa bzang ste/ shi kar jo bo rgyal bu 'di ma shi na nga 
192.17(1): bsad na yang bsad bsam pa'i bsam pa bzang ba ste/ nga ma bsad na rgyal bu ni 
192.18(1): na yang shi mi sems pa'i bsam pa bzang po des snang gsal che ba'i 'jig rten bya 
192.19(1): ba/ shin tu yang dga' ba dang ldan pa'i dga' ldan pa'i lhar skyes so/ /rgyal bu khri 
192.20(1): shang gi pha ni/ dang po yang bsam pa 'bring tsam 'dug te/ nga'i bu ma shi na bran 
192.21(1): snying rje yang gtong ngo sems la/ bu la ma phan na bran la snying rje bas/ bsam pa 
193.1(1): 'bring tsam mo/ /shi khar yang mo bon smyon pa 'di kun ma yin na/ bran phrug 'di ma 
193.2(1): bsad na nga'i bu ye 'chi yang /zhag 'ga' zla 'ga' thub pa la sems pa dang nga 
193.3(1): rgas khar bu ni shi/ rang ni rgas rgyal srid ni mis khyer/ bran phrug 'di gson na ci 
193.4(1): skyid mnos nas shi bas dmyal ba chu bur can du skyes so/ /lus po gcig la mgo bo 
193.5(1): gnyis yod pa'i glang zhig tu skyes so/ /de la sdug bsngal gyi tshad ni/ dar dkar gyi 
193.6(1): ral ga gon pa'i khye'u zhig gis mgo bo gcig la skyob bo/ /mgo gcig la lcags kyi 
193.7(1): khye'u yis/ lcags kyi tho ba lag g.yas na thogs pas brdeg /lcags kyi skam pas lce 
193.8(1): nas gcu zhing 'then no/ /de ltar shin tu sbyong bar snang ngo / /khri shang gi ma ni dang 
193.9(1): po bsam pa ngan te/ nga yi bu la phan na bran shi na shi/ ma phan na yang sems la mi 
193.10(1): 'gyod pas la 'ur bran bsad na dga' ba dang / shi khar yang nga la 'ur shi na/ bu

193.12(1): so/ /bud med kyi lus la spyang ki'i mgo bo can du skyes te/ de la sdug bsngal gyi tshad 
193.13(1): ni dmyal ba ngu 'bod kyi gnas na/ sdong po la lcags kyi sog le kha dgu skyes pa'i 
193.14(1): rtse mo na bu 'dug pa mthong nas/ / shin tu yang ma bzod nas ngu yin khar 'dzegs 
193.15(1): pas/ lcags kyi sog les sha dang pags pa kham tshad re re khyer ro/ /rtser phyin nas 
193.16(1): bltas pas bu med do/ /yang sdong po'i rtsa ba na bu 'dug pa mthong nas mar babs 
193.17(1): pas sog le'i gyen du bltas nas sha dang pags pa kham tshad re re khyer ro/ rtsa bar 
193.18(1): phyin nas bltas pas bu med do/ /yang sdong po'i kha na bu 'dug pa mthong nas yar 
193.19(1): 'dzegs so/ /ngu zhing 'bod do/ /bu 'dug pa lta bu ma yin te/ ma rang gi las kyi 
193.20(1): dbang gis bur mthong ngo / /de ltar shin tu sbyong bar snang ngo / /bon po ni dang po 
193.21(1): yang bsam pa ngan nas/ za 'dod pa'i dbang gis mi shes par shes byas/ bar 
194.1(1): du yang rgyal bu 'di sos na rngan yon bza' ru yod la/ ma sos na rngan yon med 
194.2(1): pas rdzun byas shing sha bkral byas pa dang / tha mar yang nga yos khur zhing bon byed 
194.3(1): cing za 'tshol ba la/ rgyal bu nad pa ma sos pha log tu pha dang ma yang lcebs nas 
194.4(1): shi/ bran phrug kyang bsad/ da nga la bkur ba dang bon byed pa ni su 'ong sems nas 
194.5(1): lcebs te shi bas/ dmyal ba thig nag gi 'jig rten du skyes so/ /sbrul mgo gsum pa 
194.6(1): zhig gi lus blangs nas 'dug go /de la sdug bsngal gyi tshad ni mgo gcig la lcags 
194.7(1): kyi sog chen gyis 'dra ba/ mgo gcig la lcags kyi tho chen gyis rdeg /mgo gcig la

194.9(1): shin tu sbyong bar snang ngo //mo ma ni dang po yang bsam pa ngan nas ma mthong par 
194.10(1): mthong byas/ za 'dod pa'i dbang gis bran btang phan du re nas srog gcod pa'i 
194.11(1): sbyor ba byas/ bar du yang rgyal bu sos na bzar 'ong pas bran rkang pa 'then nas 
194.12(1): bsad/ tha mar yang ngas ma mthong dgu mthong nas/ rgyal bu sos par ma mthong

194.14(1): yang shi bas da nga 'dug kyang mo 'debs pa ni su 'ong / mi la ni kha ji skad bya/ rgyal 
194.15(1): po'i bka' chad kyang 'ong bas/ skyid med par sems nas lcebs te shi bas/ dmyal

194.18(1): dgu pa gcig gis mig gi 'bras bu la za'o/ /sdig pa dmar po ru dgu pa gcig

197.2(1): rgyun du bskor na/ da dmag dpon byas nas sdig la 'bags pa 'dis/ bdag

197.9(1): skye'o/ /da man chod sdig pa'i 'phro bcad nas dge ba rgyun du byas na ni/ sdig pa snga 
197.10(1): ma byas pa rnams kyang byang nas/ thar pa'i 'bras bu yang thob ste 'gro'o/ /dus da lta 
197.11(1): kho na tshe 'phos te song na ni/ dregs pa can gyis 'jig rten bya bar skyes te/ lha ma 
197.12(1): yin dang 'khrug pa rgyun du byed de/ sdug bsngal gyi tshad ni g.yul tshur log cing rang 
197.13(1): gi mkhar phab ste/ rno mtshon mang pos srog lan dgu dgu gcod pa 'ong ngo / /de 
197.14(1): nas dge ba ci byas pa gzod kyang smin te 'ong ngo / /gshen rab kyis de skad ces 
197.15(1): bka' bstsal te/
197.16(1): yang rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can dang / dmag mi sum stong 'dus nas/
197.17(1): gshen rab la pus mo btsug thal mo sbyar dbang po btud/ lha yi me tog ud 
197.18(1): dpal sngon po mang po phul nas zhus pa'i mdo/ ston pa'i sgron ma gshen rab mi bo 
197.19(1): lags/ da phyi slad chad sdig pa mi bgyis dge ba gzhung bzhin bsrang / tshe la dbang 
197.20(1): ma thob pas da lta 'gum lags na/ dregs pa can du skyes te mchi lags na/ myur 
197.21(1): du bshags na ci yis 'byang ba lags/ de skad ces rgyal po dang dmag mi rnams 
198.1(1): kyis gsol to/ /yang gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ las la myur bar brtsam 
198.2(1): na 'grub ste mchi/ dge la thang bcad bskur la sbyang / bsam gtan gyis ni gzhu 
198.3(1): brdungs la/ shes rab mgyogs pa'i mda' 'phangs nas/ rnam shes brgyad kyi dgra 
198.4(1): bcad dgos/ de ltar 'grub na myur du 'byang / bder gshegs lha gshen mang po 
198.5(1): la/ mtshan phyag btsal na myur du 'byang / mchod rdzas mang pos mchod byas kyis/
198.6(1): sbyin pa rgya chen gtong nus na/ rtul shugs drag po bskyed nus na/ yun du mi thogs 
198.7(1): 'phral la 'byang / de skad ces gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal to/ /
198.8(1): yang rgyal pos gshen rab kyi zhabs la spyi bos gtugs te/ lha phyag lan bdun 
198.9(1): btsal nas zhus pa'i mdo/ mi dang lha'i ston pa'i sgron ma lags/ sa le gsal ba'i 
198.10(1): ye shes spyan can lags/ snang srid bkra ba'i mkhyen pa'i thugs can lags/ 'gro 
198.11(1): ba'i don la gshen rab sku mi 'phang / bdag cag sdig bshags ston pa'i sku la 
198.12(1): bgyid/ rje'i bka' bstsal bzhin du rje gcig nyid la zhu/ bdag gis gnas dang 
198.13(1): yul du gshegs par zhu/ de la yang gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ nga la thugs 
198.14(1): rje bri bkol med par snang srid kun la khyab/ drang pa'i dus la babs par drang bar 
198.15(1): bya ba la/ shi ba bsad pa pha dang ma mo bon gnyis te ha d+ha nag po dang dgu/ rgyal 
198.16(1): po nyid dmag mi sum stong rnams/ sdig sgrib dus gcig kho nar sbyang par 'byung /
198.17(1): de skad ces gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal to/ /yang rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can 
198.18(1): gyis/ gshen rab la bskor ba byas/ lha phyag btsal/ lha'i me tog pad ma dmar po 
198.19(1): phul nas zhus pa'i mdo/ shi ba bsad pa pha ma g+ha ha d+ha nag po mo bon dang / rgyal 
198.20(1): po bdag dang dmag mi sum stong rnams/ thams cad thugs rjes drang na ston pa'i 
198.21(1): sgron ma lags/ bdag cag rnams kyi yul du myur bar gshegs par zhu/ sems 
199.1(1): can tshe 'phos dmyal bar skyes pa rnams/ nye drung yul na mchis par yas stags ci 
199.2(1): btsal 'tshol/ ston pa'i sgron ma myur bar gshegs par zhu/ de skad ces rgyal pos 
199.3(1): gsol to/ /de la yang gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ dus 'di ni dus bzang 
199.4(1): po yin te/ nga'i sku yi bon ston pa'i dus yin no/ /sems can kyang skal pa dang 
199.5(1): ldan pa/ las 'phro bzang po thams cad skye ba'i dus yin no/ /bdag la skyabs su 
199.6(1): gsol ba'i sems can khyed rnams kyang / lha gshen srid pa lha mo stong gi thugs rjes 
199.7(1): drangs nas/ yun du mi thogs myur bar drang ste 'ong / gsungs nas gshegs par 
199.8(1): gnang ngo / /gshegs kar 'khor rnams la bka' bstsal pa/ 'ol mo lung ring na 
199.9(1): 'tshogs pa'i bdag gi 'khor rnams/ nga ni lho phyogs kyi gling rgyal po'i yul khri dang 
199.10(1): 'byams pa/ mkhar shod pa brtsegs pa/ grong khyer lhun grub 'dus pa ru/ 'gro ba 
199.11(1): sems can mang po'i sgrib pa sbyong du 'gro bas/ slad na 'dug pa khyed rnams kyang /
199.12(1): gsas mkhar sham po lha rtse la bskor ba rgyun du gyis shig /lha phyag rgyun du 'tshol 
199.13(1): cig /mchod pa rgyun du phul cig /de'i yon tan gyis bdag 'gro ba'i don byed pa/
199.14(1): 'di yang myur bar 'grub ste 'ong ngo / /khyed rnams kyang sangs rgyas te 'ong ngo /
199.15(1): skad ces gsungs nas/ gser gyi 'khor lo brgyad pa can gyi shing rta la chibs so/ /
199.16(1): gser gyi chag shing g.yu'i g.yung drung ris can phyag na bsnams so/ /'khor yang 
199.17(1): g.yung drung sems dpa' lnga stong lnga brgya dang chas nas gshegs so/ /gshen rab kyi 
199.18(1): sku 'khor de rnams kyang / la las ni lha'i rnga rdung / la las ni lha yi gshang 'khrol/
199.19(1): la las ni lha'i dung 'bud do/ /la las ni lha'i dar 'phyar ro/ /la las ni lha'i mar 
199.20(1): me bltam mo/ /la las ni lha'i spos me gtong / la las ni lha'i me toga'athor/ la 
199.21(1): las ni lha'i gtsang tshan 'debs/ la las ni lha'i glu gar bsgyur/ la las ni lha'i pi 
200.1(1): wang sgrogs/ la las ni lha'i gling bu 'bud/ la las ni lha'i stag seng sig /la las 
200.2(1): ni lha'i rgya 'bag mchong / de ltar lha'i rol mo sna tshogs kyis ston pa'i sku la bskor/
200.3(1): rma lo dang g.yu lo yid kyi khye'u chung gto bu 'bum sangs rnams kyis gshen rab 
200.4(1): kyi phyogs bzhi nas sku brten nas gshegs so/ /gshegs pa'i dus der gshen rab 
200.5(1): gar gshegs pa'i nam mkha' la 'od gsal mo mang po shar ro/ /gshen rab gar 
200.6(1): gshegs pa'i sa gzhi la me tog sna tshogs pa skyes so/ /phyogs bcu'i 'jig rten kun 
200.7(1): nas sgra snyan mang po grags so/ /gshegs shul gar byung pa'i sems can thams cad 
200.8(1): kyang / gshen rab zhal mthong pa'i yon tan gyis/ shin tu yang grangs mang bar 
200.9(1): sangs rgyas so/ /de nas yul khri dang 'byams pa'i gling du byon no/ /yul de'i 'dab 
200.10(1): chags dang / gcan zan dang / ri dwags dang / mi nor dang thams cad kyang byol 
200.11(1): song la rig pa yod pas/ ston pa ngo shes nas mdun bsu nas bskor ba byas shing 
200.12(1): lha phyag 'tshal lo/ /de nas yul khams de'i mi rnams kyis/ mdun bsu nas ston pa 
200.13(1): la bskor ba byas shing lha phyag 'tshal/ me tog gtor/ de'i yon tan gyis yang shin 
200.14(1): tu grangs mang ba cig sangs rgyas te song ngo / /
200.15(1): de nas mkhar shod pa brtsegs pa'i nang du/ rma lo g.yu los nyi zla ris kyi gur 
200.16(1): phub/ yid kyi khye'u chung gis pad ma ris kyi gdan ni bting / rgyal po 'bar ba'i 
200.17(1): sgron ma can gyis gsol zas ro mchog ldan pa ni drangs/ de nas rgyal po 'bar ba'i 
200.18(1): sgron ma can gyis zhus pa'i mdo/ ston pa'i sgron ma gshen rab mi bo lags/ bdag 
200.19(1): gis ston pa'i zhal mthong zhing mchid zhus te/ ji snyed tsam zhig mchod pa phul na/
200.20(1): da rung sangs rgyas pa'i 'bras bu mi thob pa/ ston pa'i shul byung zhing zhal bstan 
200.21(1): pa'i sems can 'di snyed tsam zhig mod la sangs rgyas te 'gro ba 'di ci lags/
201.1(1): 'di 'dra ni las la yang dge sdig med do/ /tshe la yang snga phyi med do/ /gnas la 
201.2(1): yang mtho dman med do/ /de skad ces rgyal pos gshen rab la zhus pas/ yang 
201.3(1): gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can de ni 'di ltar ro/ /
201.4(1): sems can bsam gyis mi khyab pas/ las kyang bsam gyis mi khyab ste/ bdag gi 
201.5(1): zhal mthong ma thag tu/ sangs rgyas pa'i sems can de rnams ni/ sngon nas dge ba 
201.6(1): byed byed pas sgrib pa byang bas de ring bdag zhal mthong ma thag tu tshogs rdzogs 
201.7(1): nas sangs rgyas pa yin no/ /rgyal po ni tshe snga ma nas dge sdig kham 'ga' 'chol 
201.8(1): bar spyad pas/ tshogs rdzogs nas sangs rgyas pa bas/ da rung sgrib pa yang ma byang 
201.9(1): ngo / /da yang lha gshen srid pa brgya la phyag 'tshal nas/ mchod pa rgyun tu byas nas 
201.10(1): sgrib pa byang nas tshogs rdzogs te sangs rgyas te 'gro'o/ /de skad ces bka' bstsal 
201.11(1): to/ /yang rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can gyi gshen rab la bskor ba byas/ lha phyag 
201.12(1): 'tshal/ lha'i me tog ha lo ljang khu mang po phul nas zhus pa'i mdo/ /rnam pa thams 
201.13(1): cad mkhyen pa'i gshen rab ston pa'i sgron ma'i mchog /rgyal phran khri shang nad kyis 
201.14(1): zin pa la/ nad de sos su ma btub pha log tu/ pha ma mo bon ha d+ha ngan bu dmag 
201.15(1): mi tshud chad sdig pa sbags pa ni/ rgyal bu khri shang 'di la sgrib pa ci tsam mchis/
201.16(1): ston pa'i sgron mas bdag la bshad de gsol/ de skad ces rgyal pos gshen rab la 
201.17(1): gsol to/ /
201.18(1): yang gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can de ni 'di 
201.19(1): ltar ro/ /sngon tshe snga ma la rgyal bu des dmag dpon gyi rgyal po byas te/ sdig pa mang 
201.20(1): po byas nas/ tshe smad la ston pa gto rgyal ye mkhyen gyis bon gyi 'khor lo bskor ba 
201.21(1): la dad pa skyes nas/ srog gcod pa spangs pa las sogs pa'i dge bcu tshad mar 
202.1(1): spyad pas mi lus thob pa yin no/ /kun gzhi la sdig pa'i sa bon ma lus pas/ shi 
202.2(1): khar yang bsam pa bzang pa yin/ nam zhig sangs rgyas par smon lam btab 
202.3(1): pas/ da bdag gi ring 'di la sangs rgyas te 'ong ngo / /tshe thung pa ni snga ma la 
202.4(1): dmag dpon gyi rgyal po byas tsam na/ srog gcod pa'i lan chags da rung ma kher 
202.5(1): ba yin no/ /pha ma dang mo bon dang ha d+ha nag po rnams ni rgyal po de dge ba byed 
202.6(1): tsam na/ snga ma la dgra byed pa yin no/ /yang tshe gcig la dge ba byed pa na 'khor 
202.7(1): ba gegs shing byed pa yin no/ /de'i skyon dang skye ba mang po la sdig pa kho na byas pas 
202.8(1): snying rje dang bral nas/ 'di la dmyal bar ltung ba yin no/ /khri shes ni srog mang 
202.9(1): po bcad pa'i las yin no/ /de rgyal pos zhus shing bdag gis 'dren pa ni/ sngon 
202.10(1): sems can shi khar smon lam bzang po btab kyin 'gyod pa drag po skyes pa dang / phyi 
202.11(1): nas nye drung lus pa rnams kyis/ dge rtsa mang po byas pa'i bsod nams yin no/ /da 
202.12(1): yang bder gshegs mang po la phyag 'tshal gyin/ lan chags dang sbyin pa gtang na 
202.13(1): sangs rgyas te 'gro'o/ /rgyal po ni tshe snga ma la 'dur gshen byed pa yin no/ /dmag 
202.14(1): mi rnams ni ston mo'i zas za ba yin no/ /bdag ni 'dur gsas su mnga' gsol 
202.15(1): ba yin no/ /bran phrug gi pha ma gnyis ni bar chad kyi gshed yin no/ /de skad ces 
202.16(1): gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal to/ /
202.17(1): yang rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can gyis gsol ba/ ston pa'i sgron ma gshen 
202.18(1): rab mi bo lags/ sems can tshe 'das dmyal bar skyes pa yi/ nye gnas lus pa 
202.19(1): 'di rnams ji ltar lags/ yang gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ de rnams ni 
202.20(1): smon lam gyi mthu yis 'brel ba yin no/ /der rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can gyis/
202.21(1): sems can tshe 'das dmyal ba skyes pa'i nye gnas la/ 'khor ba btang nas kun 
203.1(1): ka bos so/ /de la gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ spyir na yang khams gsum gyi 
203.2(1): sems can la/ rigs mthun pa thams cad ni las kyis 'brel ba yin no/ /gnas 
203.3(1): kyis bsdus pa thams cad ni smon lam gyis 'brel ba yin no/ /khyed rnams kyang 
203.4(1): rigs mthun par smon lam gyi dbang gis/ rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can gyi 
203.5(1): 'khor du skyes pa yin no/ /gnas mthun par yul khri dang 'byams par 'tshogs pa 
203.6(1): yin no/ /phyir khyed rnams lus pa ni lan chags pa yin no/ /bdag gi zhal mthong 
203.7(1): zhing thugs rjes 'dren pa ni/ sngon dge rtsa drag po byas pa dang / smon lam bzang 
203.8(1): po btab pa yin no/ /de skad ces bka' bstsal to/ /der 'khor rnams kyis kyang /

203.10(1): la dbang po gsal ba/ spa gyim shang gong gong gi bu spa 'od ma gsang grags kyis 
203.11(1): gsol pa/ bdag cag gi yul rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can gyi mnga' ris 'di 
203.12(1): rnams/ spyod lam bzang zhing dge la dad pa zhig lags na/ ma mthong par mthong 
203.13(1): byas pa'i mo mas bgyis bgyis nas/ sems can gyi lus lags pas/ spyir kun kyang 
203.14(1): mi rtag pa lags na/ shi thabs 'di kun ni shin tu yang ma legs pa lags pas/
203.15(1): rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma can/ ston pa rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa khyod la zhu 
203.16(1): bar btang ba lags na/ 'u bu'i tshe la 'das pa'i 'bangs de rnams/ sngon gyi las 
203.17(1): dang da lta'i rkyen gyis/ sdug bsngal dmyal ba'i gnas su skyes nas/ shin tu sbyong 
203.18(1): tshad che ba yin/ rab tu sdug bsngal che bar 'dug skad pas/ de yang ston pa'i sgron 
203.19(1): mas thugs rjes bzung nas drongs par zhu 'tshal/ zhes smras nas/ nye rtsa kun gyis 
203.20(1): kyang ston pa'i sgron ma gshen rab la bskor ba byas/ lha phyag btsal/ me tog gtor 
203.21(1): nas kun ka ngus pas/
204.1(1): yang gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ khyed rnams ma ngu bar/ lus sems thud 
204.2(1): la nyon cig /skye shi 'du 'bral las kyis 'byung ba la/ mya ngan ngu 'bod ju gang tha 
204.3(1): ma yin/ ngus kyang phan med shi ba rnams/ mi thos pa'i yul na khong dag las kyis 
204.4(1): sbyong dgos pa'i yas stags thams cad khyer la nga yi spyan sngar sogs/ de skad ces

204.15(1): pos gsol pas/ yang gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pa/ rgyal po 'bar ba'i sgron ma 
204.16(1): can gyis zhus sam gsol pa ni/ shin tu yang legs te/ de ni 'di ltar yin no/ /

204.21(1): gang la gdags/ snying rje'i mgron bgyi ba gang la gdags/ mchod pa'i yas stags

205.12(1): gang la gdags/ de skad ces rgyal pos gsol pas/ yang gshen rab kyis bka'

205.18(1): yar stegs ldan pa rnam pa lnga bya ba ni/ dus gsum gyi bde bar gshegs pa la 
205.19(1): mchod do/ /lnga gang dang gang yin no/ /dang po kha na dang ba'i sems dang ldan pa/

206.1(1): lngas dus gsum gyi bde bar gshegs pa rnams la mchod pas/ skyabs su gsol 
206.2(1): ba'i sems can thams cad thar par 'dren par nus so/ /sbyin pa'i yas stags

206.4(1): gang yin na/ mig gzugs sdug dgu kun 'dod pa dang / rna ba sgra snyan pa 'do
206.5(1): par dang / sna dri zhim par 'dod pa dang / lus reg bya 'jam par 'dod pa dang /
206.6(1): lce ro zhim por 'dod pa dang / yid rtsa ba yin pas gzhan las bdag mtho bar 
206.7(1): 'dod pa dang / de ltar 'dod pa rnam pa lngas khams gsum gyi sems can la byin

206.10(1): bka' bstsal to/ /

206.12(1): rnams ni 'khor ba'i sa la gnas pa yis/ shin tu rig pa'i blo chung lags/ mgron 
206.13(1): du gyur pa rnam gnyis la/ ldan pa lnga dang 'dod pa lnga/ gshen rab nyid kyis bshad 
206.14(1): pa las/ da rung gang lags cha ma mchis/ de skad ces rgyal pos gsol pa/ de nas 
206.15(1): gshen rab kyis gser gyi shing rta 'khor lo bsgyur nas/ 'khor g.yung drung sems 
206.16(1): dpa' lnga stong lnga brgya dang / me tog mdzes pa'i tshal du byon nas/ sa gzhi de la 
206.17(1): stegs bu chen po gnyis gong 'og du chag chag btab/ ston pa nyid pad ma ris kyi 
206.18(1): gdan steng du bzhugs nas/ gser gyi chag shing g.yu yi g.yung drung ris can phyag

234.21(1): sangs po 'bum khri'i sku la phyag 'tshal lo/ /thabs kyi mchog srid pa sangs po 'bum

252.12(1): lha 'od dkar gyi/ yon tan gyi thugs rje las bskyed pa'i bde bar gshegs pa mi 
252.13(1): bced kyi 'jig rten gyi lho phyogs na/ thugs rje thabs kyis 'gro ba'i don mdzad pa/
