334.21(1): yod che sa bzung ba dregs pa bdud dang 'dra/ sgyu ma'i zang zing nor la bdag ni 
335.1(1): mi rtsi'o/ /dbal gyi dmag dpon dregs pa'i rtsal ldan brgya/ khyod kyi drag shul rtsal 
335.2(1): ldan spyod pa de la nga mi smon/ bdag dang gzhan med snying rje chen po yis/ khams 
335.3(1): gsum sems can mnyam pa'i cha la ma bzhag na/ bdag bstod gzhan smad drag 
335.4(1): shul gdug rtsub kyis/ mi rtag shi ba'i yul du gcod sbyong dmyal bar skye/ sdug 
335.5(1): bsngal nyams su myong ba'i dus su 'gyod kyang mi sman no/ /phar btul tshur la log 
335.6(1): nas rnam smin 'phral la 'byung / de tshe 'gyod pa'i sems dang bcas kyang mi bsleb 
335.7(1): bo/ /drag shul gdug rtsub srin gyi las la ngas mi rtsi'o/ /de skad ces gshen rab 
335.8(1): kyis bka' bstsal pas/ bdud khyab pa lag ring yang mtshang la phog pas phyod kyis 
335.9(1): med de song ngo / /
335.10(1): yang sang nyi ma'i rtse la 'ol mo lung ring gi sa skas zhig gi kha nas/ gshen rab 
335.11(1): zer gyin 'bod pa zhig yod do/ /ston pa gshen rab ni rnam pa thams cad mkhyen 
335.12(1): pa'i ye shes dang ldan pa lags pas/ bdud kyis slu ba po yin par ni mkhyen 
335.13(1): te/ ngos ma bzungs par zhi bas gdul bar dgongs te/ 'bod pa'i drung du byon 
335.14(1): nas/ na chung gser la g.yu yis ni brgyan/ dar la zab kyis ni brtsegs/ dkar 
335.15(1): la dmar du bskus pa brgya tham pa/ bro dang glu len pa dang mjal lo/ /na chung de 
335.16(1): rnams kyis gshen rab la gsol pa/ ston pa gshen rab mi bo lags/ bdag cag 
335.17(1): rnams ni lha'i bu mo mdzes pa'i bzhin bzang mo bya ba dang / klu'i bu mo snyan pa'i klu 
335.18(1): sgyur ma bya ba lags so/ /gshen rab lags da lta nyid kyi spyan sngar kho nar mchis pa 
335.19(1): lags/ 'gro don bor la bdag don mdzod/ gzhon nu dar ba'i tshe 'di la/ skyid 
335.20(1): par bya ba bro glu yin/ dga' ba bya ba rtse 'jo yin/ dgos par bya ba zla rogs yin/
335.21(1): bdag cag bu mo 'dir tshogs la/ la la gtan gyi grogs su mdzod/ la la srod kyi 
336.1(1): mdza' ru mdzod/ la la yud kyi 'bangs su mdzod/ la la dar tsam yud la 'grogs/
336.2(1): gshen rab ston pa rgyal gyi bu/ sems can gzhan gyi don ched kyis/ nyid kyi sku la ci 
336.3(1): zhig sman/ de skad ces bdud kyi slu ba rnams kyis smras pas/ de la gshen rab kyis 
336.4(1): bka' bstsal pa/ bu mo khyod rnams ci mi zer/ ston pa'i las ni snying rje yin/ snying 
336.5(1): rje'i don gyis sems can drangs/ lus dang srog gi don phyir yang / 'gro ba sems 
336.6(1): can don mi 'bor/ gzhon nu dar ba'i tshe 'di la/ sems can thar par ma drangs 
336.7(1): na/ rgas kyin rgud pa'i dus tsam na/ 'gro ba 'dul bar ga la 'gyur/ skyid par 
336.8(1): byed pa bro glu ga na yin/ ye shes lha yi snying po ma nor par/ 'gro ba'i bag chags 
336.9(1): sbyang na skyid pa yin/ dga' ba bya ba rtse 'jo ga na yin/ sems can nyon mongs 
336.10(1): 'drong na dga' ba yin/ dgos pa bya ba bud med ga na yin/ thabs chen dbyings 
336.11(1): la rol na dgos pa yin/ mi 'gyur g.yung drung rnyed na gtan gyi grogs su bzang 
336.12(1): mi snang snang bar shes na mi 'bral grogs dang 'grogs/ bdag don lhun gyis grub 
336.13(1): na gzhan don rtse ru chibs/ nyon mongs log par 'khrul pa'i bu mo rnams/ ya ga de 
336.14(1): rnams bdud kyi slu tshig 'dra/ 'khor ba rgyun du mi chad pa ni bud med yin/ srin mo 
336.15(1): dngos su 'byung ba'i mgo nag ma/ gzugs phung dkyil du dmyal ba'i zangs gcig 
336.16(1): skyes/ btso sreg sdug bsngal thams cad de las byung / mtho ris thar pa thams cad 
336.17(1): 'grub khung zangs kha de yin/ bde ba thams cad mi bde gcod sbyong zangs des 
336.18(1): byed/ bud med bya ba dmyal ba'i zangs kha yin/ khyod dang 'bag na dmyal ba'i 
336.19(1): zangs su 'tshod/ dmyal ba'i zangs su 'tshod gal gshen rab nga la med/ bud 
336.20(1): med bya ba bdud kyi btson ra yin/ khyod dang 'brel na bdud kyi btson ras sdom/
336.21(1): bdud kyi btson ras sdom gal gshen rab nga la med/ bud med bya ba gshin rje'i 
337.1(1): gdos thag yin/ khyod la dad na gshin rje'i gdos kyis 'dogs/ gshin rje'i 
337.2(1): gdos kyis 'dogs gal gshen rab nga la med/ bud med bya ba dug gi 'dab rdzab 
337.3(1): yin/ khyod la spyod na dug 'dam spyod pa yin/ gsod pa'i dug 'dam spyod gal 
337.4(1): gshen rab nga la med/ khyod dag nyid kyang pho la dad na gong du smos par bsam/
337.5(1): 'khor ba thag chod gshen rab bka' la nyon/ sdug bsngal rgyun chad thar pa'i bde 
337.6(1): gnas 'thob/ de skad ces gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pas/ bdud khyab pa lag 
337.7(1): ring yang mtshang la phog nas phyod kyis med de song ngo / /
337.8(1): de'i tshe de'i dus na/ bdud khyab pa lag ring de/ ha cang yid mug ga chad de/
337.9(1): ston pa gshen rab mi bo la/ bdud kyi cho 'phrul sna gnyis rdugs/ mya ngan 'khor du 
337.10(1): mun ltar sros/ mun nag 'thib pa'i dkyil rum na/ lcags mkhar rtse brgya'i nang du 
337.11(1): byon/ bdud rje rgya lag thod rje la/ khyab pas smras nas shags shig btab/ 'o skol 
337.12(1): bdud kyi yod khams 'dir/ med par stongs su 'jud pa'i mi/ gshen rab slu ba 
337.13(1): rdzun tshig mkhan/ drag po dmag gis ma bsad na/ zhi ba'i thabs kyis mi thul lo/ /
337.14(1): sems can thams cad mtshan nyid ni/ nor la dad kyin rogs la dga'/ rogs 
337.15(1): la bstan gyis nor la brid/ slu tshig mang pos bslus pa la/ rogs la chags su ma 
337.16(1): 'dod do/ /nor la bslus su ma 'dod do/ /de ltar yid chad ga mug nas/ yab 
337.17(1): kyi spyan sngar mchis pa lags/ de ni bslu bar mi 'gyur nges/ yab gcig rgya lag 
337.18(1): thod rje lags/ bdud kyi dmag tshogs da bsdu 'tshal/ bdud kyi go tshogs da 
337.19(1): gyon 'tshal/ bdud kyi mtshon tshogs da brdar 'tshal/ bdud kyi rta tshogs da stod 
337.20(1): 'tshal/ bdud kyi dar tshogs da 'phyar 'tshal/ gshen rab kyi yul du dmag drang 
337.21(1): 'tshal/ yab gcig ma bzhugs dmag skos mdzod/ gshen rab mi bo ma sod na/
338.1(1): 'jig rten yongs khams stong la khad/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring gis/ yab la de 
338.2(1): skad smras nas zhus/ yab kyis slar la bka' bstsal pa/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring 
338.3(1): gson/ bdud kyi dmag tshogs mang po 'di/ gshen la drang pa mi dka' ste/ dmag 
338.4(1): gis thub par gshen mi 'gyur// dmag gis thub par 'gyur rgyu la/ gshen rab 
338.5(1): sprul pa stong dang ldan/ bdud kyi mun dmag phyir la dbub/ mun pa nyid kyang sgron 
338.6(1): mar 'gro/ bdud kyi mtshon gyis gshen mi sod/ bdud kyi mtshon gyis gshen sod 
338.7(1): du/ gshen gyi lus ni rdo rje'i brag /bdud kyi mtshon rnams phyir la 'chag /bdud rje 
338.8(1): khyab pa sprul pa can/ da ni bslu thabs phyi ma med/ 'jig rten khams kyi sems can 
338.9(1): rnams/ bu la gdung gin spun la chags/ bu ru skyes la spun du rdzus/ bslus na de 
338.10(1): yis bslus te 'ong / de skad ces bdud rje rgya lag thod rje yis/ bdud khyab pa lag 
338.11(1): ring la smras so/ /de yang bdud khyab pa lag ring des/ yab kyi bka' nyan te/ drag 
338.12(1): po bdud kyi dmag bshol nas/ bu dang spun zlas gshen rab bslu ru song /
338.13(1): de'i tshe de'i dus na/ gshen rab ston pa mi bo ni/ de yul gling gi ma gros na/
338.14(1): srid pa rgyud kyi bon ston no/ /nam mkha' la sgra dang 'od byung ngo / /de'i rting la dung 
338.15(1): gi mi dkar po la g.yu'i thig le can gcig /zangs kyi chag shing gser gyi thig le 
338.16(1): can zhig thogs nas/ gzha' tshon sna lnga'i 'od nang na 'dug /'khor yang mi dkar 
338.17(1): brgya yis bskor/ sgra yang snyan pa'i tshul du byin/ mi dkar de'i gtam na re/ ston 
338.18(1): pa gshen rab mi bo lags/ nga ni khyod kyi spun zla yin/ khyod sems can don la yun 
338.19(1): ring nas/ nga yis brjed ma byed pa yin/ khyod kyi smon lam rdzogs pa yin/ da nga'i 
338.20(1): bstan pa dar ba yin/ 'jig rten 'khor ba'i zhing khams 'dir/ ston pa gnyis kyi 
338.21(1): bstan pa 'byung mi srid/ nga ni srid pa'i khye'u chung shes nyan can/ snang srid shes pa 
339.1(1): bya ba yin/ de nga'i bstan pa'i dus la bab/ 'jig rten khams gsum nga yis ston/
339.2(1): gshen rab bstan pa nub pa'i dus/ mya ngan gling nas 'da' bar 'byung / de skad 
339.3(1): ces bdud kyis smras so/ /ston pa gshen rab mi bo ni/ rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa 
339.4(1): ye shes dang ldan pa yin pas/ bdud gdug pa can slu ba la 'byung bar ni mkhyen 
339.5(1): te/ ngos ma bzung bar zhi bas gdul bar dgongs nas bka' bstsal pa/ga la'i 
339.6(1): sems can log tshig smras pa bas/ sems can kun kyang de la ma skrags shig /dus 
339.7(1): gsum ston pa rim gyis 'byung ba la/ phyi rabs ston pa da rung 'byung dus min/
339.8(1): bdag kyang da rung sku yis 'dul ba tsam/ gsung dang thugs kyi bstan pa sdod cig 
339.9(1): 'byung / nga sku gsung thugs kyi bstan pa rdzogs nas/ mya ngan gling nas 'da'/ de 
339.10(1): skad gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal pas/ bdud khyab pa lag ring yang mtshang la 
339.11(1): phog nas phyod kyis med de song ngo / /
339.12(1): de'i tshe de'i dus na/ gshen rab kyi khab dpo bza' thang mo la/ dgun zla tha chung 
339.13(1): gi nya la/ 'od nag po 'dom gang ba gcig khong par song ba rmis so/ /gnyid sad 
339.14(1): tsam na yang / lus kyang lji la khong yang 'dar/ yid kyang 'khrug la snying yang gcus/
339.15(1): gzugs kyi phung po kun ka na/ 'phrig pa skyes nas kun la gsang / phyi de lo'i dus 
339.16(1): tsam na/ lus nas phyir la sras gcig chad/ de la kun kyang 'dus nas bltas/
339.17(1): gto bu dpyad bu 'khrungs pa bzhin/ a cang mtshan dang ma ldan nas/ kun gyis kha 
339.18(1): mar ngan par btags/ ston pa gshen rab mi bo yang / rnam pa thams cad mkhyen 
339.19(1): cing gsal lags pas/ bdud kyis bslus bar ngo mkhyen kyang / mod la ngos ni 
339.20(1): bzung rgyu la/ 'dul ba'i dus la ma bab pas/ zhal nas bdud du ma gsungs so/ /
339.21(1): bdud kyang bu yi sprul pa ston/ gshen rab bu ru ming btags pa/ zhi bas bsring la 
340.1(1): 'dul bar dgongs/ so sor gnyis ka thabs la rgyug /bu de ma la chad nas kyang /
340.2(1): sems can gzhan bas skye ba drag /zhe sdang bdud kyi bu yin pas/ bcos kyang rang 
340.3(1): gi rgyu nyid gtso/ sha dang khrag la dad kyang che/ rus pa khral khrol thams cad kyang /
340.4(1): sems can phyi ma'i mid gshog kyang / go bo bzhin du mid kyang gtong / mthong ba 
340.5(1): thams cad 'phrig pa skyes/ ming yang gshen chung go bor btags/ skyes nas yab la 
340.6(1): bon bslabs nas/ bden pa bshad kyang mi nyan par/ pus btsugs yab la shags 
340.7(1): shig btab/ yab gcig ston pa gshen rab lags/ gcen po gto bu dpyad bu 
340.8(1): bzhin/ gzhan la phan pa'i bon mi slob/ gzhan la phan pa'i dpyad mi slob/ bdag 
340.9(1): rang rang la phan pa'i bon/ bza' ba'i zas su sha zhim pas/ sems can gsod 
340.10(1): nas bsha' zhing za/ gon pa'i gos su pags dro bas/ sems can mang po sod na 
340.11(1): bshus kyin gon/ sems can mang po srog bcad nas/ don snying smad lngas lha gsol 
340.12(1): na/ bon gyi bstan pa dar bar 'gyur/ sems can mang po srog bcad nas/ gnod 
340.13(1): pa'i bdud la glud phul na/ sems can mi rnams tshe ring 'gyur/ yab kyi bdag 
340.14(1): la bon slob na/ de lta bu'i bon cig zhu/ de skad ces bdud kyis smras pa/ gshen 
340.15(1): rab kyis lan bka' bstsal pa/ sems can nyon mongs snying re rje/ sgyu ma'i phung po 
340.16(1): nyon re mongs/ 'bras bu'i sems 'di nyam re thag /bden tshig brgya smras gcig mi 
340.17(1): go /gol ba'i sems can sdig can gcig /bdag gi gnas 'dir skye bar dpyad/
340.18(1): gzhan la snying rje chung tshod dang / rang la bsod nams drag tshod dang / sha dang 
340.19(1): khrag la dad tshod dang / sdig gi log tshig smra lugs kyis/ zhe sdang bdud kyi rigs 
340.20(1): shig yin/ gshen la bar chod byed par nges/ 'khor ba'i sems can slad ma kun/
340.21(1): 'di yi tshig ni ma nyan cig /de skad ces gshen rab kyis bka' bstsal to/ /bdud 
341.1(1): kyang ngo nag gting gi mtshang la phog nas song ngo / /bar der mno bsam btang 
341.2(1): pas/ shin tu zhi bas byas la bslu bar dran nas/ nyin re na yang pha ma la skor bar 
341.3(1): byed cing / lha phyag lan brgya rtsa brgyad 'tshal lo/ /khrus byed kyin me tog lan brgya 
341.4(1): rtsa brgyad phul lo//de ltar byas nas yab la gser gyi zangs gri'i rtse btsugs par 
341.5(1): byas te/ gshen rab la rtse mo btsugs nas/ bdud rgyug 'phro la pus btsugs byas 
341.6(1): nas brgyab pas/ ston pa gshen rab mi bo la/ gser gyi zangs gri ma zug par/
341.7(1): zangs gri'i rtse mo brgyab pa'i sar/ g.yu yi g.yung drung wal gyis song / gser gyi 
341.8(1): zangs gri nyid kyang ni me tog pad mar lam gyis song / bdud kyang skyengs nas ngu 
341.9(1): tshul bstan/ de la ston pas bka' bstsal pa/ bu khyod ma las bu khyod ma las skyes tsam na/ mtshan 
341.10(1): dang mi ldan 'jigs pa zhig /rang gi gzugs kyi phung po la/ tsher ma gcig kyang mi 
341.11(1): bzod par/ gzhan dag sems can mang po yi/ srog bcad pags pa gon dgos 
341.12(1): zer/ ga la'i sems can bdud rigs shig /bdag nyams gzhan la blang ngo chog /
341.13(1): ma nor bden pa'i don bstan na/ mi bden phyin ci log pa byed/ gshen gyi bstan 
341.14(1): pa bsnub snyam nas/ gser gyi zangs gri nga la brgyab/ gser gyi zangs gris nga mi 
341.15(1): gsod/ gser gyi zangs gris nga gsod du/ nga la srog gi lan chags med/ zangs 
341.16(1): gris rdeg pa dngos grub mchog /don dam bstan kyang mi nyan pa/ bden pa'i sa 
341.17(1): bon khyod la med/ dper na sems can blo log gis/ lcags rdo gser du bzhub pa 
341.18(1): 'dral/ de 'dra sems can sdig can khyod/ ngan song gsum gyi rmeng rdo cig /dmyal 
341.19(1): bar 'gro ba'i bskyed shing zhig /sdug bsngal smin pa'i sa bon cig /sems can nyon

342.1(1): shi nas gshen rab dang 'khor kun/ mya ngan byed dam mi byed bdud kyis bltas 
342.2(1): pas/ ma dpo bza' thang mos ro la 'jus nas bu la 'bod gyin smre sngags 'don pa 
342.3(1): la gshen rab mya ngan gang na byed/ ma ngu ba la gdam ngag gsungs pa bsnyen pas/

342.5(1): la la bgegs kyi bar chad bu/ la la bdud kyi dmod pa'i bu/ la la dmyal ba'i

342.7(1): brgya la 'ga' dang 'ga'/ spyir yang bu zhes bya ba'i rgyu nyid ni/ sngon tshe skye ba gong

343.10(1): khams zas dang 'bral du tho/ slu tshig rdzun la mkhas pa yi/ gshen rab mi bo zer 
343.11(1): ba 'dis/ sems can 'khor ba bdud kyi chu bzhi bsgral/ yod khams gang ba stong 
343.12(1): la khad/ bdag kyang shin tu ma dga' nas/ 'di la sprul pa bsam med yod/ drag 
343.13(1): pos thub par ma mthong nas/ rdzun tshig thabs la mkhas pa yi/ gshen rab bdud

343.17(1): kyi cho 'phrul sna dgu la/ zhi bas bslus pa'i sna brgyad rdugs/ sna dgu'i tha ma drag

344.1(1): tu phyin pa'i lag kyang brkyang / phyogs bzhi mtshams bzhi kun ka nas/ bdud dmag 
344.2(1): mang po sprin ltar bsdus/ nges pa'i don dam ma rtogs pa'i/ 'khor ba'i sems can

344.5(1): pa lag ring gis/ bdud kyi dmag tshogs mang po la/ sra ba bdud kyi go bskon no/ /

353.16(1): rab pham nas thub kyang srid/ da rung cho 'phrul bstan thabs yod/ ma yis bu la de 
353.17(1): skad ces smras so/ /bdud rje khyab pa lag ring gis ma la phyir lan btab pa/ 'jig 
353.18(1): rten khams kyi sems can la/ 'o skol bdud las kha drag med/ 'o skol bdud kyi

353.20(1): sems can yongs la dbang bsgyur na/ dus la rgyu log 'di lta byung / nga'i gong na 
353.21(1): dbang che ba/ rdzun tshig mkhan gyi gshen rab 'dis/ sems can dbang du kun ka 
354.1(1): bsdus/ nga la dbang rgyu ci yang med/ sprul pa ci byas yo ka rdugs/ gshen rab 'di 
354.2(1): las dgrar gnad pa/ da lta nga la dbang yang med/ mya ngan ci ste mi bgyid lags/
354.3(1): sdug pa'i mya ngan khang pa nas/ da lta ngan bu mi 'byung ngo / /'di la thub thabs ma la 
354.4(1): ci lta bu mnga'/ cho 'phrul 'os pas skyon can 'di mi thub/ cho 'phrul bstan thabs 
354.5(1): mnga' ba gsungs pa ma la ci lta bu mnga'/ bdag mya ngan khang pa nang nas 'byung 
354.6(1): na/ gshen dang 'thab tu 'gro/ gshen rab ma thub bar du ngan bu mi 'byung ngo / /de 
354.7(1): skad ces bdud khyab pa lag ring gis/ ma sring thun btang ma mo la smras so/ /de la 
354.8(1): mas phyir smras pa/ gshen la cho 'phrul mi ston par/ mya ngan khang pa nag po nas/
354.9(1): bdud rje khyab pa mi 'byung na/ gshen la cho 'phrul bstan thabs bstan/ gshen rab 
354.10(1): mi bo ma thub kyang / bstan pa bshigs cing dma' thabs yod/ bdud rje khyab pa 
354.11(1): lag ring lags/ cho 'phrul sna re rdugs tsam na/ yi mug byed kyin mya ngan byed/

354.13(1): kyang sna re rgol/ gshen dang 'thab zla byed pa yang / snying sdos rngan sran che bar gar 
354.14(1): 'ong dgos/ gshen la cho 'phrul grangs med ston/ bu dang chung ma bu mo dang / nor 
354.15(1): dang slob bu tshun chad la/ cho 'phrul tshugs tshad yo la ston/ cis kyang yo yis ma 
354.16(1): tshugs na/ nag po bdud kyi bstan pa 'di/ cis kyang nub tu tho ba yin/ gshen 
354.17(1): rab mi bo'i bstan pa 'di/ cis kyang dar du tho ba yin/ sems la 'gyod pa ye med 
354.18(1): do/ /rang cag bdud kyi sde rnams kyang / gshen rab 'khor pa byas la 'dong / de

355.6(1): bstan na/ mtshan dang dpe byad ldan pa'i khye'u chung brgya/ skor ba byed cing lha phyag

356.21(1): kyang / dmag dpon dar thogs byed/ de tshe las kyi rgyu bsags mtha' 'khob srin

363.1(1): bzang gcig /ne'u chung drung du har gyis 'ong / skyes phran de'i mchid na re/ gshen 
363.2(1): rab sras mo ne'u chung ma/ bdag ni klu sras skyes gcig pa/ da lta khyod kyi gan du 
363.3(1): 'ong / gshen yul 'ol mo lung ring e re sdug /bar po so brgyad e re dma'/ yul 
363.4(1): 'dir ne'u chung khyod 'dug pa/ shin tu 'phang pa'i sems skyes nas/ da lta bsu ru 
363.5(1): 'ong ba yin/ nga'i rta yi 'phongs su zhon/ skyid pa'i yul du rang cag 'dong / spro 
363.6(1): ba'i mkhar du rang cag 'dug /dga' ba'i rtsed mo rang cag rtse/ gdung ba'i dga' 
363.7(1): rogs bdag gis bya/ dgos pa'i bu tsha rang cag bskyed/ brtse ba'i nye ring khri 'bum 
363.8(1): yod/ longs spyod zas nor gter chen spyod/ la 'ur bskyod la bros la 'dong / do 
363.9(1): mod ne'u chung 'khor dang mas tshor na/ skyid pa'i yul du 'gro dbang med/ dga' 
363.10(1): ba'i grogs dang 'grogs dbang med/ de skad bdud kyi slu bas smras pa/ gshen za 
363.11(1): ne'u chung sman yang / snying du bdud zhugs pas/ dbang po mig sgor yang / skyes pa 
363.12(1): de las su bzang gin mdzes pa med/ gshen yul 'ol mo lung ring la bltas pas 
363.13(1): dga' ba med/ rta'i 'phongs su zhon nas phyod kyis bros te phyin/ bdud kyi byin gyis 
363.14(1): non/ dran rgyu ci yang med/ dkyus gcig dkyus gnyis la/ nyi zla'i sgron ma yang je 
363.15(1): nub je nub song / mun pa'i smag nag kyang je 'thibs je 'thibs song / skyes pa rta 
363.16(1): yang je mtshar je sdug song / yab yum gshen rab la 'dod rgyu ci yang med/ gshen 
363.17(1): yul 'ol mo lung ring nas/ gshen mkhar bar po dang / dral dang 'khor rnams la 
363.18(1): gdung zhing skyo rgyu med/ nag po bdud kyi bu khyab pa lag ring gis/ gshen bza' 
363.19(1): ne'u chung sman/ dbang po'i snying bsgyur na/ mun pa g.yung drung gling / lcags mkhar 
363.20(1): sgo brgya'i nang du tal gyin phyin/ nag po bdud kyi bu/ khyab pa lag ring 'khor/
363.21(1): shan pa 'bum sde gsum/ dga' ba'i sems bskyed nas/ mdun nas tho les btab/
364.1(1): ne'u chung mdun nas bsus/ lcags mkhar sgo brgya'i dbus rtse'i dkyil du phyin/
364.2(1): bdud rje khyab pa'i yab rgya lag thod rje dang / bdud rje khyab pa'i yum thun dang 
364.3(1): ma mos bsus/ tho le rgyang gis btab/ dga' ba'i sems skyes bu la smras pa'i mdo/
364.4(1): nag po bdud kyi bu/ khyab pa lag ring lags/ gong du smos pa bab 'o skol bdud kyi 
364.5(1): spyod pa dang / mi mthun log pa byed pa yis/ mi las cho 'phrul sna dgu bstan/ sna 
364.6(1): dgu rdugs kyang zhe ma sun/ tshugs tshad kun la bstan pas grub/ rgyal ba'i dus su 
364.7(1): gzab pa'i rigs/ lcags mkhar sgo brgya sgo bcad 'tshal/ sgo srung shan pa 'bum 
364.8(1): sdes byas/ rdzun tshig mkhan gyi gshen rab 'di/ sprul pa mang po ston du 'ong / sprul 
364.9(1): pas gshen bza' ne'u chung 'di/ phyir la phrog nas khyer bar 'ong / so so kun tu 
364.10(1): so tshugs sgrims/ bu mo gshen za ne'u chung khyod/ da ni phyir la ma 'gro zhig /bdag 
364.11(1): cag bdud kyi 'khor rnams kun/ khyod kyi zhabs tog gus par 'tshal/ de skad ces 
364.12(1): bdud khyab pa lag ring gi pha dang ma yis smras pas/ de la gshen bza' ne'u chung 
364.13(1): gis phyir smras pa/ klu sras skyes cig lags dgongs na/ khyab pa lag ring bdud 
364.14(1): du song / klu yul na tog lags snyam na/ bdud yul mun pa'i gling du song / klu 
364.15(1): mkhar rgyal dang lags snyam na/ bdud mkhar lcags mkhar rtse brgyad song / song 
364.16(1): yang bdag la mi dga' med/ snying du sdug na bdud na bdud/ yi kar 'ong na ci 
364.17(1): na ci/ dang kas len na dug na dug /da yang snying gros bdag gis dbyung / gshen 
364.18(1): rab sprul pa 'bum 'gyed kyang / bdag ni mnyam par mi bgyid do/ /khyed kyang de 
364.19(1): la ma nyan cig /gshen bza' ne'u chung de/ bdud kyis snying bsgyur bas bden pa'i 
364.20(1): bka' rnams la/ kho thag gting nas chod/ tshig bshad de rnams la/ bdud kyi sde 
364.21(1): rigs rnams/ shin tu mos pa skyes/ lcags mkhar rtse brgyad la/ nag po bdud kyi 
365.1(1): dmag 'bum sde mang pos bskor/ go gon mtshon thogs nas/ cha sgra di ri ri/
365.2(1): de'i tshe de'i dus na/ gshen yul 'ol mo lung ring na/ bu mo gshen bza' ne'u 
365.3(1): chung sman/ me tog gling na yun ring nas/ yum gcig dpo bza' thang mo ni/ sras 
365.4(1): mo ne'u chung 'tshol du phyin/ me tog sna dgu'i gling la byon/ ma yis phyogs bzhir 
365.5(1): bltas pa la/ bu mo ne'u chung ye mi gda'/ gsung phyung phyogs bzhi kun tu bos/ bu 
365.6(1): mo lta bu ye mi 'byung / slar log 'khor la bka' bstsal pa/ bu mo gshen bza' ne'u 
365.7(1): chung 'di/ snying yang phyo sangs khyer nas 'dug /bltas kyang gong nas ngan pa babs/
365.8(1): dad pas gling nas me tog btus/ gsas mkhar sham po lha rtse la/ mchod pa 'bul 
365.9(1): gyin lha phyag 'tshal/ bskor ba byed kyin bshags pa 'bul/ dad pas thugs dam 
365.10(1): skong ba'i/ gling la me tog thur btang na/ shin tu yun ring 'gor bar gyur/ bdag 
365.11(1): gis tshol du phyin pa la/ me tog gling nas stor bar snang / phyogs bzhir bltas pas 
365.12(1): mthong rgyu med/ kun tu bos pas ci yang med/ 'khor ba rnams kyis phyogs bzhir 
365.13(1): tshol/ de skad yum gyis 'khor la gsungs/ dpo bza' thang mo'i bka' nyan pas/
365.14(1): 'khor pas phyogs bzhi kun tu btsal/ ne'u chung rnyed par ma gyur nas/ 'khor gyi 
365.15(1): nang nas 'a zha gsang ba mdo sdud kyis gsol ba/ jo mo dpo bza' thang mo lags/
365.16(1): bud med bya ba 'dod la 'khor/ bud med bya ba chags la dad/ 'dod chags bral 
365.17(1): ba'i rang bzhin gyis/ dge ba'i phyogs su ma mos pa/ sdig pa'i phyogs su ma dad 
365.18(1): dam/ don yod las la sgyid snyoms nas/ don med las la ma brtson nam/ ye shes 
365.19(1): lha la rgyab bstan nas/ bdud kyi grogs phyir ma 'brangs sam/ thar pa'i lam la 
365.20(1): thag bcad nas/ 'khor ba'i rgyun du ma zhugs sam/ dge ba chen po rgyang bsring 
365.21(1): nas/ sdug bsngal dang du ma blangs sam/ byang chub skam sa phyir bor nas/ 'dam 
366.1(1): rdzab nang du ma zhugs sam/ bdag cag 'khor pa 'bum sde yis/ phyogs bzhir 
366.2(1): btsal te ma rnyed na/ jo mo'i thugs la ji ltar dgongs/ de skad ces 'a zha gsang ba 
366.3(1): mdo sdud kyis gsol pas/ dpo bza' thang mos slar la bka' bstsal pa/ gshen 
366.4(1): rab 'khor gyi dam pa la/ thugs dang 'dra ba'i 'a zha khyod/ a cang dpyad tshig ma 
366.5(1): snga dang / gshen rab 'khor gyi dam pa la/ thugs dang 'dra ba'i 'a zha khyod/ dkar 
366.6(1): ram nag kyang cha med par/ thod gzung bsnyon tshig ma smra dang / gshen rab 'khor 
366.7(1): gyi dam pa la/ thugs dang 'dra ba'i 'a zha khyod/ yin min thog tu ma phebs par/
366.8(1): bud med mtshang yang ma 'bru dang / gshen rab 'khor gyi dam pa la/ thugs dang 
366.9(1): 'dra ba'i 'a zha khyod/ dge'am sdig kyang cha med par/ sdig la 'dog kyang ma snga dang /
366.10(1): gshen rab 'khor gyi dam pa la/ thugs dang 'dra ba'i 'a zha khyod/ lha yang bdud 
366.11(1): kyang cha med par/ bdud dang bcas pa ma brngan dang / shin tu snying gsal lce rnon 
366.12(1): yang / thog tu ma phebs nges pa yi/ dpyad tshig dran dran ma zer par/ gshen 
366.13(1): rab spyan 'dren gyis la shog /de skad jo mos gsungs pas/ yang 'a zhas gsol 
366.14(1): pa/ rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa'i gshen rab kyang / gsang ba'i man ngag tshig 
366.15(1): gsum bdag la 'chol/ jo mo dbang gis bcad nas ne'u chung kha 'dzin te/ bden 
366.16(1): rdzun slad kyi phyi phyir gsal te mchis lags kyi/ jo mo bka' yis smras pas/ gshen 
366.17(1): rab spyan 'dren du/ gsang tshig sgom pa bor la mchi pa las su med/ de skad 
366.18(1): ces 'a zhas smras nas/ bya khyung sum grus pa gcig tu brdzus nas/ gnam gyi ya bla 
366.19(1): dgung sang gi yang stengs/ dga' ldan lha'i pho brang na/ gshen rab skos mkhan phywa 
366.20(1): yi sku 'tsho ba'i spyan lam du/ 'a zha tar gyis phyin nas zhus pa'i mdo/ 'jig rten 
366.21(1): khams kyi mig gcig pu/ mun pa'i tshogs 'joms sgron ma'i phul/ nad kyi dpung 
367.1(1): 'jigs sman pa'i mchog /skye 'gro'i re gnas pha ma'i go /ston pa gnam gyi ya blar 
367.2(1): gshegs/ dga' ldan lha'i pho brang na/ sprul pa'i sku yis bon ston gyi/ skos mkhan phywa 
367.3(1): yis sku 'tsho na/ slad na btsun mo sras dang 'khor/ gnas mchog pho brang 'dzin pa 
367.4(1): la/ gnod pa'i cho 'phrul mang po 'byung / gnod pa'i cho 'phrul mang po yis/ slad 
367.5(1): ma rnams la ma tshugs na/ sras mo gshen bza' ne'u chung ma/ kun gzhi chags 
367.6(1): pa'i gzhi ma la/ 'dod chags sa bon ma spangs pas/ tshan can las kyis 'phangs 
367.7(1): gyur ram/ bdud kyi bslus pas dbang gyur ram/ me tog gling nas stor te song /

367.9(1): chod ci ltar byung / gnas mchog 'ol mo lung ring na/ mchis pa rnams la bstan 
367.10(1): par zhu/ bdag ston pa'i spyan sngar zhu ru mchis/ 'di la ston pas gsungs pa'i 
367.11(1): bka' lung la/ gsang ba'i man ngag sgom 'phro bcad/ gal las babs nas zhu ru 
367.12(1): mchis/ gnas mchog dam par gshegs par zhu/ gshen bza' ne'u chung btsal 
367.13(1): bar zhu/ bstan pa bsnub pa'i bar chad rnams/ byin gyis rlabs kyis zlogs par 
367.14(1): zhu/ de skad ces 'a zha gsang ba mdo sdud kyi tshigs su bcad de gsol to/ /ston

367.18(1): mchog dam par yas mar gshegs/ de nas bar po so brgyad kyi nang du gshegs 
367.19(1): so/ /de nas rin po che'i khri gdan la bzhugs nas/ btsun mo sras dang sku 'khor

367.21(1): cad ni bsgrags/ spos dang tsan dan la sogs/ dri zhim po thams cad ni gtul/

410.1(1): mngon sum nyid du bdud dmag byung / rgya lag thod rjes gshen la smras/ gshen 
410.2(1): rab mi bo rdzun tshig mkhan/ la yogs dus kyis ded pa yin/ bdud kyi chu bzhi skem 
410.3(1): skem pa/ tsha bo tsha mo gsod gsod pa/ bu sring srid 'brel rku rku ba/ bdud 'khor 
410.4(1): mang po 'phrog 'phrog pa/ sha zan gdong dmar srin po bod kyi yul/ nyang srin dag 
410.5(1): srin kong srin gsum gyi yul du 'ong ba yin/ la yogs dus kyis ded pa yin/ rno 
410.6(1): mtshon mang pos rgyob la da gsod zer/ 'jigs pa'i tshul du brjid chos byas nas/
410.7(1): gshen rab steng du rgyug te byung / gshen rab kyis zhabs bgrad/ phyag gdengs/
410.8(1): spyan bzlog /bdud yul 'dul ba'i snying po bzlas/ a par thum mu par zhil kri le 
410.9(1): trang par dmyal/ ces brjod pas/ bdud kyi dmag tshogs re re la/ nam mkha'i 
410.10(1): dkyil nas lha'i dmag tshogs brgya brgya byung / bdud dmag g.yul bzlog rong du 
410.11(1): ded/ rgya lag thod rjes g.yul zin byas/ de la ston pas bka' bstsal pa/ sems 
410.12(1): can nyon mongs snying re rje/ sgyu ma'i phung po nyon re mongs/ 'bras bu'i sems can 
410.13(1): 'di nyam re thag /bden tshig brgya bzlas gcig mi go /ru bzhi lha'i sprul pa lags/
410.14(1): rgya lag thod rje bu phyir thongs / dad pa ma skyes sems can ni/ drag pos gzung du 
410.15(1): don la 'gal/ ston pa gshen rab mi bo yis/ lha dmag mang po dbyings su bskyod/
410.16(1): rgya lag thod rjes bzung pa btang / rta'i rjes su mar la gshegs/ bdud dmag mya 
410.17(1): ngan byed pa yang / rgya lag byung pa tho les btab/ nyang srin kong srin mang po yang /
410.18(1): bdud rje khyab pa lag ring dang / kong rje dkar po dmar po dang / phyi ma'i dmag 
410.19(1): tshogs mang po rnams/ kong 'phrang rong nag rub mo na/ yar la rgyug ni ma nus par/
410.20(1): ku dang cha'i 'debs kyis snang / de la ston pas bka' bstsal pa/ khyab pa lag 
410.21(1): ring dmag dpon dang / log sred can gyi dmag mi rnams/ ku sgra ma che bka' la 
411.1(1): nyon/ ston pas 'phrul ngag bon bstan gyis/ khyab pas phyir la lan zhus pa/ ston 
411.2(1): pa gshen rab log pa can/ khye'u chung skyon byed log pa'i rigs/ nga las khyed las 
411.3(1): yus che med/ yus shags 'debs kyis nga la nyon/ de la ston pas bka' bstsal pa/
411.4(1): nag po bdud khams yus ches la/ khyab pa yus kyi shags 'debs na/ nged rnams 
411.5(1): dbang po gtod la mnyan/ ma lus shags rnams nga la thob/ khyab pas phyir la lan 
411.6(1): zhus pa/ gshen rab nam mkha'i lha yin na/ 'khor ba'i sa la ci la 'ong / mi 'byed 
411.7(1): mnyam pa'i sems yod na/ bdud la 'thab zla ci la byed/ de la ston pas bka' 
411.8(1): bstsal pa/ 'gro drug kha lo sgyur ba'i phyir/ 'khor ba'i sa la 'ongs pa yin/ ma phyes 
411.9(1): mnyam par kun snyams ste/ khyod dag 'khrul pas phye ba'o/ /khyod kyis cho 'phrul 
411.10(1): tshur la bstan/ nga yis phar la gang du 'thab/ 'khrul pas so sor ma 'byed dang /
411.11(1): mnyam pas nga'i skyabs su zhugs/ khyab pas phyir la lan zhus pa/ mi 'byed mnyam 
411.12(1): pa'i sems yod na/ bu mo sring 'brel ci la rku/ snying rje byams pa'i gzhi ldan na/ tsha 
411.13(1): bo tsha mo ci la gsod/ de la ston pas bka' bstsal pa/ nga yis mi 'byed khyod kyis 
411.14(1): 'byed/ khyab pa ne'u chung bzhin du gyis/ bu mo khyod kyis log pa khrid/ log par 
411.15(1): bcol nas cis kyang 'chos/ nga'i skyabs su khyod kyang gsol/ ma bsad ming sring 
411.16(1): gnyis dang sprad/ ma nor ston pa'i bka' yin gyis/ dam long dam long nag po 
411.17(1): bdud kyi bu/ khyab pas phyir la lan zhus pa/ nga'i lta ba mig rnon gyis/ bltas pas 
411.18(1): ming sring gnyis ma mthong / ma bsad zer ba'i rdzun po che/ snying rje med pa'i khrel 
411.19(1): med po/ bdud dmag mang pos cho nges btab/ gshen la mtshon cha char du phab/
411.20(1): ston pa gshen rab mi bo yi/ myes po dmu rgyal drin gyis btsal/ dmu khrab shol mo 
411.21(1): lus la gyon/ bse'i phub mo gling chen bzur/ snying rje byams pa'i sems bskyed 
412.1(1): nas/ sems can bdud dmag snying re rje/ bdag gis 'thab lan mi byed do/ /nga 
412.2(1): la mda' mtshon char du phobs/ nyon mongs khyed dag yid kher yin/ der bdud 
412.3(1): rnams kyis/ gshen rab la mtshon cha char bzhin du phab/ sku la phog pa bas drung du 
412.4(1): nye yang ma nus so/ /bdud khong dag thang chad nas dbyung dengs kyis song ngo / /
412.5(1): de la ston pas bzhad nas bka' bstsal pa/ log par 'khrul pa'i bdud dmag 
412.6(1): snying re rje/ nga'i ba spu rkya gcig bskyod par ma nus pas/ khyod dag sha rus thams 
412.7(1): cad rdul du brlags/ nga ma'i 'dul bzhin du 'dul ba bdud kyi las/ nga'i 'thab 
412.8(1): zla byas na/ khyed rnams yud la sod/ de ltar nges sam ma nges nga la 'ben cig 
412.9(1): tshugs/ 'ben kyang 'os pas mi chog lcags phub dgu rtsegs shig /gshen rab 
412.10(1): rtsal gyi tshad cig bsdo ba'i bdud la bzhag /der bdud khyab pa lag ring gis/
412.11(1): bdud kyi lcags phub dgu spug cigag /gshen rab la 'ben du btsugs nas bltas 
412.12(1): pas/ ston pa'i thugs rje'i byin rlabs sprul pa yis/ lcags kyi gzhu gcig cog gis 
412.13(1): brdungs/ thabs chen rtsal dang ldan pa yis/ lcags kyi mda' ni krig gis bkang 
412.14(1): nas 'ben la brgyab pas ni/ lcags kyi phub dgu ldur phug nas/ pha thel ri la tal 
412.15(1): gyis song ngo / /de la bdud rnams shin tu bsngangs/ rgya lag thod rjes tshig smras 
412.16(1): pa/ rtsal dang ldan pa'i mi mchog skyes bu lags/ bdag cag da ni khyed la bsdo bar 
412.17(1): mi bgyi'o/ /bdag cag rnams la rtsal gyis mda' ma 'phen/ rgyal ba khyod la da ni 
412.18(1): skyabs su mchi/ de la ston pas bka' bstsal pa/ sku la skyabs su gsol na bsam 
412.19(1): pa rab tu bzang / g.yung drung bon la nyan na sdug bsngal gtan du chad/ nges pa'i 
412.20(1): don la spyod na bla med 'bras bu thob/ bdud kyi grogs rnams spangs na nges pa'i 
412.21(1): don dam rnyed/ legs so legs so rgya lag thod rje legs bstod nas/ bdud 'khor 
413.1(1): ston pas dbang du bsdus so/ /khyab pas 'go bzung bdud kyi mo rigs rnams/
413.2(1): kong rje dkar po'i mkhar du bros/ kong rje sras mo rkong za khri lcam gyis/ ston pa'i 
413.3(1): mda' 'phangs dar dkar lcibs kyis phyung / mda' phyung shul nas chu mig dkar 
413.4(1): po rdol nas/ gshen rab phyag tu phul nas tshig bshad 'di skad brjod/ thog dang 
413.5(1): mtshungs pa'i rtsal mnga' skyes bu khyad par can/ sems can rnams la mi 'phen 
413.6(1): 'dzangs pa'i mchog /lcags kyi phub dgu phyung na pha thel ri la babs/ gzugs can 
413.7(1): gang la 'phangs kyang tshal bar btang / byams pa'i sems ldan skyes bu glo ba dga'/

413.9(1): mda' drang chu mig tu btags so/ /

413.11(1): gser dang g.yus brgyan pa brgyas mdun bsus nas ston pa la phyag byas nas 
413.12(1): smras pa/ yul du bon dang gshen gshegs nas/ gdol pa rnams kyis ngo ma 'tshal/
413.13(1): bdud dang shags 'debs rtsal 'gran pas/ deng sang sbribs la mi skyems sam/
413.14(1): bdag cag lha mo klu mo lags/ bshos dang skyems la sdum par gshegs/ rnam pa 
413.15(1): thams cad mkhyen pa'i ston pa gshen rab kyis/ bdud kyis slu ba yin par sa le 
413.16(1): mkhyen lags kyang / ngos ma bzungs bar thabs la mkhas pas/ dal bus gdul 
413.17(1): bar dgongs nas gshegs so/ /lung gsum mdo grong nas/ gser khang g.yu khang 
413.18(1): phub/ gser dngul sgyed pu btsug /gser gyi zangs bu na/ zhim dgu zas kyang 
413.19(1): g.yos/ gser phor dngul phor du/ bda' dgu zas kyis bkang / gshen rab phyag 
413.20(1): tu phul/ ston pas bka' bstsal pa/ zhe sdang nag po bdud kyi bu/ pho rigs bas 
413.21(1): kyang mo rigs gdug /thab tu ha la'i dug rnams g.yos/ gser skyogs dngul 
414.1(1): skyogs dug gis bkang / ston pa nga la zas su drangs/ bdud mo bsam pa bsgrub 
414.2(1): pa'i phyir/ dug rnams rtsi ru bsgyur la btang / sman gyi sdong po nga rang yin/ nad kyi 
414.3(1): rkyen gyis ci la tshugs/ rtsi yi mtsho mo nga rang yin/ dug gi me yis ga na skem/ dgra 
414.4(1): dang gnyen du dbye ba med/ rtsi dang dug tu dbye ba med/ 'khor rnams kun ni ma 
414.5(1): 'bags shig /gsungs nas/ dug rnams 'joms pa'i sngags bzlas te/ a dur 
414.6(1): 'dus mu ram spros kha til zhi/ lan dgu bzlas nas zhal du sib kyis gsol bas/
414.7(1): dug rnams sman du gyur pas gshen rab sku lus la rtags su me tog 'bum langs 
414.8(1): skyes/ bdud kyi slu ba brgya la phyag gi thal mo gcig brdabs pas/ shin tu bzhin mi 
414.9(1): sdug pa rgan mo se mo brgya/ ston pa'i spyan sngar mod la rug gis song / khyab pa'i ma 
414.10(1): rgan thun dang ma mo yis/ shin tu gnong 'gyod 'tshal nas bon la skyabs su gsol/
414.11(1): bdud kyi btsan dug ha la 'dis brag kyang 'gas la mtsho yang khol/ sems can 
414.12(1): rnams la smos ci dgos/ ston pa'i zhal du gsol ba la/ dug rnams gsos kyi rtsi 
414.13(1): ru 'gyur/ rtags su me tog 'bum sde skyes/ gshen rab sku la 'od du 'bar/ skyes 
414.14(1): mchog sman gyi sdong po la/ nad kyis gdung ba'i za ma mos/ gshen rab sku la skyabs 
414.15(1): su mchi/ dug gi 'bar ba'i za ma mos/ gshen rab sku la skyabs su mchi/ skyon gyi

414.17(1): gshen rab sku la skyabs su mchi/ las kyi ma rig byang gyur cig /de skad ces smras 
414.18(1): nas skyabs su gsol bas bdud kyi bu mo dang / thun dang ma mo rnams dad pa lhang 
414.19(1): gis skyes nas skyabs pas/ ston pa'i byin rlabs kyis lha'i bu mo brgyar tshe 'phos nas/

414.21(1): dad pa lhang gis skyes nas skyabs pas/ ston pa'i byin rlabs kyis lha'i khye'u mtshan

415.6(1): nges dpag tshad rgyang grags su khengs pa 'bod kyin ngus so/ /de la gshen rab

419.10(1): gzig bu thung/ nan tan gsang bas bcol nas 'dug yid kyi khye'u chung zur phud

419.18(1): dam las ma 'da' bar/ pha bu 'grogs la dge bcu spyod/ g.yung drung bon la shes

420.1(1): gto dpyad la gshegs so/ /slad nas bus khyab pa la smras pa/ tshe gcig pha ru 
420.2(1): 'brel ba gson/ ston pas rnam pa thams cad mkhyen/ pha la gdams ngag gsung

420.18(1): snga na ma byung ba'i 'od zer shin tu gsal la dwangs pa zhig 'phros pas/ de la rab

421.4(1): 'di kun yang byin rlabs kyis 'phros pa yin no/ /gsungs pas/ bdag de la shin 
421.5(1): tu yang spro ba skyes nas/ ston pa de la zhus nas/ 'o na bdag gshen rab mi bo de la 
421.6(1): shin tu yang dad pa skyes nas/ de'i zhal gcig bstan par khyod kyis byin rlabs

428.20(1): 'phrin las lnga nyid yin/ bdud kyi dmod mo dbang che yang / ston pa'i thugs rje 
428.21(1): dos drag pas/ yig 'bru khri 'bum bsregs pa yang / dpa' bo 'bru lnga'i rgyu yod 
429.1(1): pas/ bdag gi rkyen gyi bsod nams kyis/ dud pa gnam la song ba yang / bon 
429.2(1): dang gshen du dar bar shog /me lce bar du shar ba yang / bon dang gshen du dar 
429.3(1): bar shog /'dab ma sa la lhags pa yang / bon dang gshen du dar bar shog /ston 
429.4(1): pas smon lam de skad gsungs pas/ bdud kyi lan chags ni kher/ sems can gyi 
429.5(1): bsod nams dang / ston pa'i thugs rje 'dzoms pas su/ dud pa gnam du song ba 
429.6(1): na/ gnam bon 'bum phrag mtha' yas par byung nas/ sems can gyi don mdzad 
429.7(1): do/ /me lce bar du song ba las/ bar bon 'bum phrag grangs med par byung nas/
429.8(1): sems can gyi don mdzad do/ /'dab ma sa la lhags pa las/ sa bon 'bum phrag 
429.9(1): mtha' yas par byung nas/ sems can gyi don mdzad do/ /yi ge'i sa bon dpa' bo 
429.10(1): 'bru lnga las/ 'phrul gyi yi ge sum cu rtsa brgyad gyes so/ /ston pa'i thugs rjes bon 
429.11(1): gyi bstan pa dar zhing rgyas par 'gyur ro/ /
429.12(1): de nas yang ston pa gshen rab kyis/ 'khor g.yung drung sems dpa' thams cad 
429.13(1): la/ bdud kyi nges tshig rgyu 'bras gtan la phab nas bstan/ 'o cag mngon sangs 
429.14(1): ma rgyas pa/ bdud lngas dam du bcings nas 'dug /bdud lnga bya ba 'di lnga yin/
429.15(1): ma rig 'khrul pa'i bdud dang gcig /chags 'khor nyon mongs bdud dang gnyis/
429.16(1): phung po lus len bdud dang gsum/ 'chi bdag las btsan bdud dang bzhi/ sgyu 
429.17(1): ma gzugs brnyan bdud dang lnga'o/ /bdud de lnga ni/ dug lnga las rgyu bskyed/ phung 
429.18(1): po lnga la gnas 'chal/ grub pa lnga thob tu mi ster bar 'gog /de lnga gnyen po ye 
429.19(1): shes lngas choms/ choms pa'i dus su lha lngar 'gyur ro/ /yid kyi khye'u chung gis ston 
429.20(1): pa la gsol pa/ ston pa gshen rab lags/ bdud rnam pa lnga po de dag /dug lnga 
429.21(1): las rgyu skyes pa na/ ci ltar skyes pa lags/ phung po lnga la gnas 'cha' na ci ltar 
430.1(1): 'cha' ba lags/ grub pa lnga thob tu mi ster bar 'gog na ci ltar 'gog pa lags/
430.2(1): de ltar ye shes lnga'i gnyen pos choms na/ ci ltar choms pa lags/ choms pa'i 
430.3(1): dus su lha lngar gyur pa lags/ de nas ston pas bka' bstsal pa/ de ni 'di ltar 
430.4(1): yin no/ /bdud lnga po de gti mug gi rgyu las 'khrul pa skyes pas/ 'khrul pa bdud 
430.5(1): dang 'dra bas ma rig 'khrul pa'i bdud do/ /zhe sdang gi rgyu las chags 'khor skyes 
430.6(1): pas/ chags 'khor nyon mongs bdud dang 'dra bas/ chags 'khor nyon mongs 
430.7(1): kyi bdud do/ /'dod chags kyi rgyu las phung po lus len gyi yid skyes pas/ phung po 
430.8(1): lus len gyi yid bdud dang 'dra bas/ phung po lus len gyi bdud do/ /phrag dog gi 
430.9(1): rgyu las 'chi bdag las btsan skyes pas/ las btsan bdud dang 'dra bas/ 'chi 
430.10(1): bdag las btsan gyi bdud do/ / /nga rgyal gyi rgyu las sgyu ma gzugs brnyan skyes pas/
430.11(1): gzugs brnyan bdud dang 'dra bas/ sgyu ma gzugs brnyan gyi bdud do/ /ma rig 
430.12(1): 'khrul pa'i bdud rnam par shes pa la gnas 'cha'/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/ rnam par 
430.13(1): mi rtog pa rnam par rtog pas shar du mi ster bas so/ /chags 'khor nyon mongs kyi 
430.14(1): bdud 'dul byed la gnas 'cha'/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/ chags 'khor 'du byed kyis/
430.15(1): mi chags rtul zhugs shar du mi ster bas so/ /phung po lus len kyi bdud 'du shes 
430.16(1): la gnas 'cha'/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/ 'khor ba la 'du shes spong ba'i las shar du mi 
430.17(1): ster bas so/ /'chi bdag las btsan gyi bdud tshor ba la gnas 'cha'/ de ci'i 
430.18(1): phyir zhe na/ tshor bas mi dmigs pa shar du mi ster bas so/ /sgyu ma gzugs brnyan 
430.19(1): gyi bdud gzugs la gnas 'cha'/ de ci'i phyir zhe na/ gzugs brnyan gyis stong 
430.20(1): pa shar du mi ster bas so/ /grub pa lnga la 'gog pa ni/ sku grub pa thob tsam na mi 
430.21(1): 'gyur ba/ gsung gi grub pa thob tsam na mi 'gag pa/ thugs kyi grub pa thob tsam na 
431.1(1): mi 'khrul pa/ yon tan gyi grub pa thob tsam na legs par 'byung ba/ 'phrin las kyi 
431.2(1): grub pa thob tsam na dam par spyod pa/ de rnams bdud rnam pa lngas 'gog ste/ ma 
431.3(1): rig 'khrul pa'i bdud kyis thugs la 'gog /'khrul du bcug /chags 'khor nyon 
431.4(1): mongs kyi bdud kyis gsung la 'gog /'gag tu bcug /phung po lus len gyi bdud 
431.5(1): kyis sku la 'gog /'gyur du bcug /'chi bdag las btsan gyi bdud kyis yon tan 
431.6(1): la 'gog /nyes pa 'byung du bcug /sgyu ma gzugs brnyan gyi bdud kyis 'phrin las 
431.7(1): la 'gog /'chal ba spyod du bcug /gnyen po ye shes lngas 'joms pa ni/ rig 
431.8(1): pa'i ye shes me long lta bu'i ye shes kyis/ ma rig 'khrul pa'i bdud 'joms/ ma 
431.9(1): nor bar byed pa bya ba nan tan gyi ye shes kyis/ chags 'khor nyon mongs kyi bdud 
431.10(1): 'joms/ shes rab kyis las la chod pa so sor rtogs pa'i ye shes kyis/ phung po 
431.11(1): lus len gyi bdud 'joms/ mi skye ba skye med mnyam nyid ye shes kyis/ 'chi bdag 
431.12(1): las btsan gyi bdud 'joms/ bdal ba nyid kyis khyab pa stong pa nyid kyi ye shes 
431.13(1): kyis/ sgyu ma gzugs brnyan kyi bdud 'joms/ bcom pa'i dus su lha lngar gyur pa ni/
431.14(1): ma rig 'khrul pa'i bdud rig pas/ gshen lha 'od dkar ro/ /chags 'khor nyon 
431.15(1): mongs kyi bdud mi chags pas gar gsas btsan po'o/ /phung po lus len gyi bdud 
431.16(1): mi len pas rgod gsas kham pa'o/ /'chi bdag las btsan gyi bdud yongs su dag 
431.17(1): pas gsas rje rmang po'o/ /sgyu ma gzugs brnyan gyi bdud yongs su stong par shes 
431.18(1): pas gnam gsas dbyings rum mo/ /de ltar lha lngar gnas 'gyur bas/ sku mdog 
431.19(1): dang phyag mtshan dang gdan khri dngos su grub nas/ 'gro ba sems can gyi don rgya 
431.20(1): lag phyad pa de ltar mdzad pa'o/ /g.yung drung sems dpa'i 'khor dang mtha' yas 
431.21(1): sems can kun/ ngas kyang de lnga bcom nas mngon sangs rgyas/ khyed kyang de lnga 
432.1(1): bcom na mngon sangs sdod cig rgya/rgyas nas 'gro ba'i don rgya lag phyad par grub/
432.2(1): de de bzhin no/ /'khor rnams kyis sems la rab tu zhog cig /shin tu yang zhog 
432.3(1): cig /gto bu 'bum sangs kyis ston pa la gsol pa/ ston pa lags/ gong du yang 
432.4(1): zhus lags na/ bdud rje khyab pa lag ring 'di/ bdud lnga'i nang du gtogs sam 
432.5(1): mi gtogs/ gtogs na gang gi sde lnga gtogs pa lags/ gshen rab kyis bka' 
432.6(1): bstsal pa/ gong du zhus pa gong du bshad pa bas/ da rung gar gtogs shes pas 
432.7(1): ma zin nam/ bdud du gyur pa thams cad bdud lnga'i nang du 'dus/ khyab pa nyon 
432.8(1): mongs sgyu ma gzugs brnyan bdud/ bdud bzhi choms na khyab pa rang zhir 'gro/
432.9(1): yang gto bus gsol ba/ ston pa lags/ sgyu ma gzugs brnyan bdud la shin tu 
432.10(1): grangs mang yang / de'i nang nas khyab pa gnod 'gal che ba 'di/ rgyu dang 'bras bu 
432.11(1): ci ltar lags/ bdag cag 'khor rnams kun la bshad par zhu/ ston pas bka' 
432.12(1): bstsal pa/ sems can thams cad rgyu 'bras bshad par mi lang ste/ khyed kyis zhus 
432.13(1): pa zur tsam bshad par bya/ 'khor du gyur pa thams cad dbang po brtan par nyon/
432.14(1): de'i rgyu 'bras bshad na 'di ltar ro/ /sngon 'og phyogs kyi 'jig rten gyi khams/ rtsod 
432.15(1): pa can mu la 'gram bya ba zhig na/ ston pa khyab bdal thugs rje sgron zhes bya ba zhig 
432.16(1): gis ston pa mdzad de/ zhing khams de yang gnag pa can rong 'bar la 'brab pa'i 
432.17(1): mkhar ta la had rtse brgya bya ba gcig na/ pha rgyal po ka 'od slod can bya ba zhig yin 
432.18(1): no/ /ma ni klu ha de la skyes cig gi bu mo sbyin la dga' ba bzhin bzang ma bya ba yin 
432.19(1): no/ /de la bu spun bzhi skyes pa/ gcen po dga' ba rgyas pa dang / de 'og shes rab 
432.20(1): ldan dang / tha ltag dal 'byor skyes dang / tha chung rtul zhugs can dang bzhi'o/ /
432.21(1): ston pa de ni shin tu thugs rje che ba gcig gis/ g.yung drung gi bon ma nor nges 
433.1(1): pa'i bka' zab mo mang du bstan nas/ skal ldan mang pos spyad pas/ gong du yang 
433.2(1): shin tu grangs mang bar sangs rgyas pa yin te/ dus de tsam na ston pa yang zhal mi 
433.3(1): bzhugs/ dus kyang tha ma 'jig ka ma zhig yin no/ /rgyal po de ni shin tu yang slod 
433.4(1): che la/ dge la dad pa zhig yin no/ /sngon tshe grangs med pa'i dus nas kyang / dge 
433.5(1): ba gcig pu spyod pa zhig yin pas/ bu spun bzhi la bka' bstsal nas las bgos 
433.6(1): so/ /dus kyi tha ma 'di la g.yung drung gi bon bka' rin po che 'di/ shin tu bsrung 
433.7(1): dka' bas thang bcad la bsgom dgos so/ /khyed gcen po gsum brag ka ti la shel 
433.8(1): kyi brag phug tu dgongs pa la thang chod cig /tha chung rtul zhugs can 'dis/ rgyal 
433.9(1): po'i gdung rgyud zungs shig /rgyal srid kyi slod mang po 'di/ rtul zhugs can gyis 
433.10(1): zungs la/ cha gcig dgongs pa'i rgyags gyis/ cha gcig sems can gyi re ba skongs/
433.11(1): cha gcig rgyal po'i gdung rgyud kyi btsas su zhog /bdag ni drag rtsub kyi bskal pa 
433.12(1): 'di la da mi sdod gsungs nas/ sku tshe yab yum gnyis ka 'phos so/ /sras kyis 
433.13(1): kyang yab kyi gdams ngag gsan nas/ slod kha gsum du bgos nas/ gsum brag 
433.14(1): la dgongs pa la gshegs so/ /tha chung gis tshong dpon gyi rgyal po 'bar 'od rab 
433.15(1): skyes kyi bu mo/ /thang ma gsal bya ba khyim thab tu bzhes so/ /bu ming sring gnyis shin 
433.16(1): tu sgeg chos che ba gnyis kyang mthong ngo / /khra bo rgod dang khra mo gsal gnyis su ming 
433.17(1): btags so/ /gcen dgongs pa mkhan gsum po yang / gong nas dge ba spyad cing 
433.18(1): shes rab sbyangs sbyangs pas/ gnas der tshogs kyi lhag ma bsdus pa yin pas/
433.19(1): yab kyi lung phog pa'i gnas su bzhugs pas/ man ngag mthil du phebs/ de yang 
433.20(1): bshad kyis mi long / sngon tshe mang po'i las 'phro bsags pa'o/ /der dus de ru dus 
433.21(1): kyi tha ma drag rtsub bskal pa byung / sems can mu ge nying sha can gyi bskal pa byung /
434.1(1): bza' ba'i zas med gcig sha gcig gis za/ rgyal po'i dkor dang slod la slong ba 
434.2(1): sprin bzhin 'thibs/ sum cha bkye bas lo gsum las ma thub/ gcen gsum bgros 
434.3(1): pas/ dga' ba rgyas kyis gcung la gsungs pa/ nged gsum sgom pa'i rgyags su/
434.4(1): yab kyis sum cha bzhag /da lta sems can tshe lo thung dus yin/ sum cha kha dgur 
434.5(1): bgos pa'i cha gcig kyang / nged kyis spyod longs med par tshe 'di 'phos par nges/
434.6(1): kha brgyad sems can nyon mongs rnams la sbyin par bkye bar gros kyis bcad/
434.7(1): gcung rtul zhugs can gyis smras pa/ yab kyis grongs khar 'o skol spun la lung phog 
434.8(1): pa/ rgyal srid rin po che'i dkor slod 'di/ cha gcig gcen gsum dge ba'i rgyags 
434.9(1): su bsngos/ cha gcig sems can re ba rnams la sbyin par bsngos/ cha gcig gdung 
434.10(1): rgyud 'dzin pa rnams kyi btsas su bzhag /yab kyi bka' nyan cha gcig sbyin par 
434.11(1): btang / da lta bdag la til 'bru tsam gcig lus rgyu med/ gcen gsum dge 
434.12(1): rgyags sbyin par gtong mi gtong / grongs ba'i rting la gzod cig gtong bar rigs/
434.13(1): de ltar sbyin pa gcung gis btang med do/ /gcen shin tu dge la dad pas/ mu 
434.14(1): ges gdung ba'i sems can la/ zas nor sbyin par gtang rgyu med/ sems can 
434.15(1): rnams la snying rje skyes/ khrag gtar sha snag sbyin par btang / rus la thug nas skye 
434.16(1): ba brjes/ sgom pa mthil du phab pa dang / sbyin pa drag po de gnyis kyis/ steng 
434.17(1): phyogs mi mjed 'jig rten 'dir/ srid pa ye sangs gnas su skyes/ mya ngan med 
434.18(1): pa'i bar lhar grub/ shes rab ldan gyis smras pa'i mdo/ rtul zhugs can gyi gcung 
434.19(1): nyon dang / dge la gegs shing bya mi rung / mu ges gdung pa'i sems can rnams/
434.20(1): nying sha nying gis za ba la/ gcen gyis sku lus sbyin par btang / grub pa mngon du 
434.21(1): thob ste song / chags pas mtho ris thob mi srid/ gcen gyi sku lus mi 'phongs par/
435.1(1): gcung la sgyu ma'i nor 'phongs sam/ nged la bsngos ris sbyin pa btang / rtul 
435.2(1): zhugs can gyis slar smras pa/ rang lus sbyin par gtong ba ni/ bgegs kyis bslus 
435.3(1): nas myos pa yin/ de la dge rgyu ga na yod/ gsol zas 'o mi brgyal bar 'dren/
435.4(1): rgyal slod sbyin par mi gtong nges/ der shes rab ldan dang / dal 'byor skyes 
435.5(1): gnyis bka' bgros pas/ sdug bsngal ltogs pa'i nad kyis gdung pa la/ gcen 
435.6(1): bzhin lus kyi sbyin pa gtang na ni/ sems can 'ga' 'ga' tsam zhig 'phral skyid

435.10(1): can don du spun gnyis gros gyis bcad/ de nas mu ges gdung pa'i sems can 
435.11(1): thams cad bsogs/ shes rab ldan gyis smras pa'i mdo/ mu ges gdung pa'i sems 
435.12(1): can khyed/ sbyin pa rgya che nged kyis gtang / mi dbang spyod pa ma lags so/ /rtul 
435.13(1): zhugs can gyi zas nor phyed/ nged kyi dge ba'i rgyags yin pas/ khyed rnams sbyin

435.16(1): cag phyed mar bgo bsha' gyis/ mu ges gdung pas bza' bar rings/ rtul zhugs 
435.17(1): can gyis shags btab pa/ sems can 'phongs pa ci mi zer/ pha nor bu yis spyod 
435.18(1): pa la/ khyed kyis 'phrog rgyu nga la med/ pha zas bu yis za ba la/ khyed kyi zas ni 
435.19(1): 'phrog rgyu med/ rgyal srid bshig na'ang ngas mi ster/ thang stong sems can nyon 
435.20(1): mongs khyod/ ltogs te shi rung ma shi rung / de skad tshigs su bcad nas ma ster ro/ /

436.1(1): gyis kyang / rgyal po gcen gyis 'u bu rnams la sbyin par btang / gcung gis dge

436.3(1): go mtshon dmag dang chas nas mkhar la bskor ro/ /rtul shugs can gyis dmag

436.5(1): chad mda' ni spyi bo'i gtsug tu phog /mkhar yang dmangs la shor la khad song /

436.11(1): khu bo mched gnyis ra mda' bzlog tu 'ong / ma thogs dgongs pa 'phro chod myur du

438.1(1): lus lags/ skyes mchog thugs rjes 'di rnams mi bzung ngam/ sprang pos de skad 
438.2(1): bzlas pas/ dad pa can gyi sems la snying rje skyes/ sprang po khrid nas brgyugs pas/
438.3(1): lam ka'i rdo rtsa na/ shin tu nyam thag sprang mo smad brgyad snang / gso ba'i zas ni

438.5(1): pos smras pa/ sbyin pa btang ba'i mtha' ni mthar phyin chags med yin/ g.yung drung 
438.6(1): bon po sems dpa' chen po khyod/ lus las sha chod khrag phyungs nga yi bu smad gsos/

447.14(1): ba ru gsas khang sdod cig bzhengs/ de ltar kong tses mkhar lan khog skos btab

447.21(1): mi bde nges/ pha ma de gnyis dang zla ba gsum du ma 'phrad nas/ sems la mya ngan

448.21(1): pa'i phul/ ci smras ngag mnyan yon bdag thugs dam bskangs/ da yang bdag gis

466.4(1): ba bcu gnyis kyi snyigs ma dgun zla tha chung / zhag sum cu'i snyigs ma gnam stong /

466.6(1): gnyis kyi bla dang rtags yin pas/ rgya 'dre 'di la byas nas/ lo bcu gnyis ka yi bla 
466.7(1): rtags gcig kyang srin gyis ma thob bo/ /gal dang snyag dang khyung dang gsum/ lding 
466.8(1): dang sag dang lo dang gsum/ sgur dang ra dang thul dang gsum/ god dang khyal 
466.9(1): dang kes dang gsum/ lo bcu gnyis kyi bla yin na/ da res lha'i rangs po thob/
466.10(1): lding rgyugs khyung spungs nyag blangs pas/ hal rgar rgod nas cho lo blangs/ da res 
466.11(1): lha yi ha lo blangs/ lo skor gcig tu lha rgyal lo/ /god byung khyal brdabs kes thag 
466.12(1): pas/ lo skor gcig tu srin pham mo/ /de ltar lha srin gyi pham rgyal dpang po phywas 
466.13(1): shan phyes pas/ lha rnams nam mkha' la 'od dkar po 'phros nas/ tho le ding gis 
466.14(1): song ngo / /srin rnams sa gzhi la 'tshub ma nag por byas nas cho nge deng gis song 
466.15(1): ngo / /bar der yang keng tses kong tse la gsungs pa/ sems can mi yi bu la bsod 
466.16(1): nams tshogs che ba/ rgya kong tse 'phrul gyi rgyal po khyod yin no/ /khyod dge ba byas pa'i 
466.17(1): byin rlabs dang / smon lam btab pa'i nus mthu yis/ dus 'dir lo skor gcig 
466.18(1): tu rgyal chen lag gi lha dang mis blangs pa yin no/ /da lha la lo 'byung ngo / /mi la 
466.19(1): lo 'byung ngo / /de la sogs te dge ba can thams cad bsam pa 'grub kyin dar te 
466.20(1): 'ong ngo / /rgyal po khyod da yul du bzhud la yab yum la sogs te/ 'khor thams 
466.21(1): cad bsdus la gsas khang gi gzhi bting par 'tshogs la/ khrus dang gtsang sbra gyis 
467.1(1): la/ mchod rdzas sna tshogs pa shom la sdod cig /zhag bdun nas lha dang klu dang srin 
467.2(1): dang / phywa dang mi dang dge ba can mkhar lan 'phro rtsig tu 'ong gis/ skos mkhan 
467.3(1): thams cad ngas bya gsungs nas/ nam mkha' la 'od 'phros te song ngo / /kong tse 
467.4(1): yang yid dga' la sems spro bas/ khyim phyogs su kha bsgyur ba tsam gyis phyin no/
467.5(1): yul du phyin pa'i dus der yab yum la sogs te/ 'khor thams cad dga' ba'i 
467.6(1): sems skyes te/ kong tse'i drung du sprin bzhin 'dus so/ /
467.7(1): der kong tse 'phrul gyi rgyal po yis/ yab yum la rgyal phyag phul nas/ tshigs 
467.8(1): su bcad nas smras pa/ bdag gi dge la sems ma 'gyur bas thang chod nas/ mi 
467.9(1): med yul du 'khyams kyang bsam pa yid bzhin 'grub/ kun ka gsas khang rtsig 
467.10(1): 'phror myur la gshegs/ khrus dang gtsang sbra bshams la mchod rdzas mang po bsag 
467.11(1): keng tse lan med phywa yis nges pa'i lung bstan nas/ lha dang lha mo dang / phywa dang klu 
467.12(1): dang / mi dang srin dang / skos la sogs pa rnams/ gsas khang 'phro lus/ rtsig 
467.13(1): tu dge ba'i sdong la 'ong / yab yum la sogs thams cad gsas khang brtsig sar 
467.14(1): gshegs/ de skad ces kong tse 'phrul gyi rgyal po yis/ 'tshogs pa kun la smras 
467.15(1): pas/ yul khams de'i mi rnams kyang / shin tu sems dga' la yid rab tu dwangs 
467.16(1): ste/ mchod rdzas sna tshogs bshams so/ /der kong tses sna drangs nas rgya mtsho'i gling 
467.17(1): la gsas khang rtsig par phyin no/ /rgya mtsho la kun gyis khrus dag par byas nas/ lha 
467.18(1): phyag phyogs bzhir btsal te/ mchod pa rim par phul lo/ /phywa keng tse lan med kyis/
467.19(1): rgya kong tse 'phrul gyi rgyal po la lung bstan pa'i dus der/ phyogs bcu'i 'jig rten 
467.20(1): gyi khams nas/ gsas khang brtsig pa'i dge sdong la lha yi mkhar lan pa brgya dang /
467.21(1): klu'i mkhar lan pa brgya dang / phywa'i mkhar lan pa brgya dang / mi dang srid dang 
468.1(1): skos dang lha ma yin dge ba la phyogs pa dang / byol song dge ba la phyogs pa dang /
468.2(1): yi dwags dge ba la phyogs pa dang / thams cad sprin bzhin du 'dus so/ /'dus 
468.3(1): pa'i nang na yang shes rab blo dang ldan pa phywa keng tse lan med kyis skos mkhan byas 
468.4(1): so/ /rgya kong tse 'phrul gyi rgyal po la sogs te/ der 'tshogs pa rnams la phywa keng tse 
468.5(1): lan med kyis smras pa/ gsas khang 'di ni stong gsum gyi 'jig rten dang / sbyar 
468.6(1): la stong gsum dper bzhengs la/ bde bar gshegs pa stong rtsa brgyad kyi sku bris na/
468.7(1): shin tu bsod nams che'o/ /rab tu yang bsod nams che'o/ /de skad ces kong tses 
468.8(1): smras nas/ shom mdzad de/ dang la dar dkar gyi thig thag gser gyi chag shing la 
468.9(1): btags nas/ chag shing g.yas su thabs dang sbyar nas bzung / thig thag g.yon 
468.10(1): du shes rab dang sbyar nas bzung / thugs la stong gsum gyi 'jig rten rin po che 
468.11(1): sna lnga'i g.yung drung du bsgoms/ snying po rnam gsum rim par bzlas/ thig thag nyi 
468.12(1): ma'i zer du bsam nas/ sa gzhi zlum po de'i dkyil du gser gyi chag shing btsugs 
468.13(1): nas/ thig sna kong tse'i shar du drangs nas tshig bshad 'di skad brjod do/ /thig 
468.14(1): 'di dbyings kyi yum gyi thig /sa trig er sangs byin rlabs thig /mi nor nges pa'i 
468.15(1): thig ces bya/ 'gro ba'i don du gdab par bya/ gser gyi sa gzhi rin po che/ 'byung 
468.16(1): ba'i rgyu la bskyed pa 'di/ bskal pa'i rkyen gyis ma zhig par/ ma zhig bar du brtan 
468.17(1): gyur cig /'gro ba'i don du brtan gyur cig /gsas khang bder gshegs pho brang 
468.18(1): 'di/ sems can sgrib pa sbyang pa'i phyir/ yun du rtag cing brtan gyur cig /thig 
468.19(1): sna byang du drangs nas brjod pa/ thig 'di ye shes lha'i thig /gshen lha 'od dkar 
468.20(1): thugs rje'i thig /mi 'khor 'dren pa'i thig ces bya/ 'gro ba'i don du gdab par bya/
468.21(1): gser gyi sa gzhi rin po che/ 'byung ba'i rgyu la bskyed pa 'di/ bskal pa'i rkyen gyis 
469.1(1): ma zhig par/ ma zhig bar du brtan gyur cig /'gro ba'i don du brtan 'gyur cig /
469.2(1): gsas khang bder gshegs pho brang 'di/ sems can sgrib pa byang ba'i phyir/ yun du 
469.3(1): rtag cing brtan gyur cig /thig sna nub tu drangs nas brjod pa/ thig 'di thabs kyi 
469.4(1): mchog gi thig /sangs po 'bum khri sprul pa'i thig /mi 'khrul 'byed pa'i thig ces bya/
469.5(1): 'gro ba'i don du gdab par bya/ gser gyi sa gzhi rin po che/ 'byung ba'i rgyu las 
469.6(1): skyed pa 'di/ bskal pa'i rkyen gyis ma zhig par/ ma zhig bar du brtan gyur cig /
469.7(1): 'gro ba'i don du brtan gyur cig ga /gsas khang bder gshegs pho brang 'di/ sems 
469.8(1): can sgrib pa sbyang ba'i phyir/ yun du rtag cing brtan gyur cig /thig sna lho ru drangs 
469.9(1): nas brjod pa/ thig 'di shes rab phul gyi thig /ston pa gshen rab 'od zer thig /
469.10(1): mi 'gyur brtan pa'i thig ces bya/ 'gro ba'i don du gdab par bya/ gser gyi sa gzhi 
469.11(1): rin po che/ 'byung ba'i rgyu las bskyed pa ni/ bskal pa'i rkyen gyis ma zhig par/ ma 
469.12(1): zhig bar du brtan gyur cig /'gro ba'i don du brtan gyur cig /gsas khang bder 
469.13(1): gshegs pho brang 'di/ sems can sgrib pa sbyang ba'i phyir/ yun du rtag cing brtan 
469.14(1): gyur cig /de ltar thig bzhi'i smon lam rdzogs nas/ gsas khang chen po de la kong 
469.15(1): tses thig gdab ste/ thig gdab dang po mtha' nas gdab/ tshon bkyes dbus 
469.16(1): nas bkyes par 'byung / gzhi ma phyi ma ras su bor/ sems can 'tshogs pa'i sa ru 
469.17(1): bzhag /phyi skor pho 'dom lnga brgya yod pa zhig /bon nyid mi 'byed gra zur med pa'i 
469.18(1): phyir/ thig gi dbyibs zlum po zla ba nya ba bzhin du bskor/ 'dom brgya ras su bor 
469.19(1): nas yang cig zlum por bskor/ thig bar de ni stong gsum phar 'das mun nag 
469.20(1): chen po'o/ /phyi thig kha la 'dom gang brtsegs nas steng / 'dom brgya ras su bor 
469.21(1): nas/ yang cig zlum por bskor/ thig bar de ni stong gsum mthar thug 'jig rten 
470.1(1): no/ /phyi'i lcags ri chen po dang sbyar nas/ bder gshegs stong rtsa brgyad kyi sku dang 
470.2(1): sbyar nas sku gdung mchod rten stong rtsa brgyad bzhengs/ zur bzhi mchod rten phyi ma 
470.3(1): bas su ldab bas mtho/ logs bzhi mchod rten phyi ma bas su bun thang tsam/ lcags 
470.4(1): ri 'phang ni 'dom bzhi'o/ /mchod rten chu zheng mnyam pa'o/ /brgyad ni rgyan dang 
470.5(1): 'tshams pa'o/ /zur bzhi tog dang bya ru'o/ /'khor dang gtso bo'i khyad par ro/ /de 
470.6(1): nas thig thag bzhir bltab nas/ dkyil gyi lhag ma lus pa la/ shar nub lho byang ma 
470.7(1): nor bar/ shar nas brtsams la zur bzhi la/ mtshan ma'i phur pa bzhi btsugs nas/
470.8(1): zur thig gnyis bsnol dbus su drang / zur bzhi gru bzhir 'then nas ni/ bar gyi 
470.9(1): khyams khang rtsig pa'o/ /'phang gi tshad ni 'dom lnga'o/ /'dom gang zhabs rmeng sa 
470.10(1): nang ngo / /'dom gang kha bad khang thog go /'dom gang sa mtshams skya ris so/ /
470.11(1): bar du 'dom do lus pa la/ ltag la mtho ris gsum du bri/ 'gab la ngan song 
470.12(1): gsum du bri/ dbus kyi khyams khang khra bo ni/ stong gnyis pa bar ma'i 'jig rten 
470.13(1): no/ /dbus su 'dom brgyad gru bzhi ni/ khyams khang sum ldab bas su mtho/ khyams 
470.14(1): khang ka tshad 'dom ni phyed dang gsum/ gdung tshad 'dom ni phyed dang do/ /dpyam 
470.15(1): tshad 'dom ni khru re'o/ /ka zhu'i tshad ni gru gang ngo / /bre'i tshad ni mtho do'o/ /phul gyi 
470.16(1): tshad ni mtho gang ngo / /phyam bar tshad ni khru gang ngo / /gzhal yas 'od ris sna lnga ni/
470.17(1): dpyam nyid las ni 'ong pa'o/ /dpyam bar du ni g.yung drung ngo / /gling skor nyi shu rtsa 
470.18(1): lnga'o/ /dbus bzhag phyogs bzhi gsum bsres bas/ rin chen sna lnga'i g.yung drung 
470.19(1): ngo / /g.yung drung phyogs bzhi dbus dang lngar/ bder gshegs stong gi sku bzhengs 
470.20(1): par/ de ni khyams khang tshad yin no/ /dbus rtse shing tshad ldab 'gyur ro/ /dpyam 
470.21(1): tshad bar ni khyams dang mthun/ khyung gur khyung 'dab khyung mgo gsum/ bun thang 
471.1(1): bun thang 'gyur ba'o/ /dbus kyi gtsang khang rtse rgyal ni/ stong gcig pa spyi phud kyi 
471.2(1): 'jig rten no/ /gtsang khang la ni shar du sgo gcig go /khyams khang la ni phyogs 
471.3(1): bzhir sgo bzhi'o/ /lcags ri la yang phyogs bzhir 'dor ba'i sgo bzhi'o/ /dbus kyi 
471.4(1): gtsang khang 'dom bcu la/ do ni zhabs rmeng sa nang ngo / /do ni kha bad khang thog 
471.5(1): go /do ni gdan dang skya ris so/ /do ni khri dang sku nyid do/ /do ni 'od dang ze'u prog 
471.6(1): go /gtsang khang thog dbus stong pa'o/ /de la 'od kyis bskor ba'o/ /de las 'od 
471.7(1): zer 'phro ba'o/ /de las yig 'bru gsal ba'o/ /de las sku bzhi'i lha bskyed do/ /lha 
471.8(1): las lha bskyed 'gro ba'i don mdzad phyir/ khyams khang phyogs bzhi mtshams bzhi 
471.9(1): thog phub nam mkha' la/ brgya dang gnyis bcu rtsa lnga rtsa lngar gnas pa yis/ mtshan 
471.10(1): dang ldan pa'i khye'u chung bzhi/ ldad kyi sgo la gnas/ khyams kyi logs la rigs drug 
471.11(1): sems can 'byung ba bzhi la gnas/ rlung nag me dmar chu sngo sa ser/ bar snang 
471.12(1): dkar rlung ni rdo rje rgya gram mo/ /me ni pad ma 'dab brgyad do/ /chu ni 'khor lo 
471.13(1): bzhi bskor ro/ /sa ni rin chen 'bar ba'o/ /bar snang ni kha 'al 'ol dang gsal 
471.14(1): phya phyo'o/ /de la ri mo klus bris/ klu rgyal mngon shes can/ rigs drug sems can 
471.15(1): ci ltar gnas pa 'byung ba lnga las bris/ bdag phywa'i skos btab thig btab de ltar 
471.16(1): ro/ /phywa keng tse lan med kyis de skad ces smras pas/ dus de tsam gyi sems can 
471.17(1): spyir yang rig pa dang ldan pa mang ngo / /de'i nang nas kyang der 'tshogs pa'i dge 
471.18(1): ba'i sdong byed pa rnams/ shin tu yang rig pa che zhing shes rab gsal bas/ keng 
471.19(1): tses thig btab skos bshams ci bzhin du/ yo yis ma thog 'phrin las byas/ rtsig 
471.20(1): mkhan rnams kyis 'phang yang bstod/ phyi mkhan gyis phyi bdar byas/ shing mkhan 
471.21(1): rnams kyis shing yang bzhogs/ rdo mkhan rnams kyis rdo yang sbyangs/ lcags mkhan

473.1(1): rgyal pos kyang / dge ba'i don la byon pa rnams la ni/ gsol zas sna tshogs drangs 
473.2(1): nas gser phye mang po phul lo/ /dge ba'i sdong byed pa rnams kyang so sor yul du 
473.3(1): gshegs so/ /

474.1(1): bas su chung bar gyur nas/srin gyi dmag dpung rnams kyang 'jigs kyin rengs 
474.2(1): ma nus/ gsas khang rmeng la brko bar ma 'grub tsam/ srin dmag dmang pos 
474.3(1): bskor nas gsas khang shin tu 'dar te/ der bdud khyab pa lag ring gis mthong 
474.4(1): nas/ srin gyi dmag drung du 'ongs nas smras pa/ kong tse 'phrul gyi rgyal po mi la 
474.5(1): rdzu 'phrul che ba bsod nams ldan mod la/ gsas khang bshig par mi 'gyur gyis/
474.6(1): dmag ma 'gyed par bskor gyis cho nge thob/ nga yis rgya mtsho'i gting na chu srin rgyal 
474.7(1): ba yod pa'i drung du 'gro/ chu srin gnyid log bslang la gsas khang 'di bstan gyis/

474.9(1): pas/ mtsho dang gsas khang gnyis ka chu srin gre ba 'gro/ bon gyi bstan pa nub nas 
474.10(1): 'u bu'i bsam pa sdod cig 'grub/ de skad ces bdud khyab pa lag ring gis smras 
474.11(1): nas/ rgya mtsho'i steng du phyin nas/ chu srin nyal ba rdzu 'phrul rlung gis bslangs nas/

474.13(1): 'bar ba mthong / chu srin nyal ba ltogs pas zas su mthong nas/ kha gdangs pas 
474.14(1): mtsho dang gsas khang bcas je dma' chu srin gyi gre bar 'das la khad/ klu srin klu 
474.15(1): phrug mang pos ri mo snying du sdug nas rkos kyin bcag la khad/
474.16(1): de'i dus de'i tshe na rgya kong tse 'phrul gyi rgyal po yang / yi mug ga chad 'jigs

474.18(1): nas bos pa/ 'jig rten gyi khams 'di nas 'gro ba'i don mdzad pa/ thugs rje che

474.21(1): ba gcig snang ngo / /g.yung drung bon gyi bstan pa nub te 'gro bar nges so/ /gnod 
475.1(1): par byed pa'i bdud dang srin po rnams ni dar ste 'gro bar nges so/ /dge ba'i 
475.2(1): grogs dang bstan pa bsrung pa yod na/ da snying rje'i dus la bab bo de skad ces 
475.3(1): kong tses smras nas bos pas/ de su'i thugs su gsol gyin snyan du bos na/ 'jig 
475.4(1): rten gyi khams lho 'dzam bu gling gi nub phyogs/ chu bo chen po bzhi 'bab pa'i 'go /
475.5(1): gangs dbal so mdung rtse'i ra ba/ ri g.yung drung dgu brtsegs kyi rtsa ba/ brag seng 
475.6(1): ge brgyad bsnol gyi bar/ shing gzha' tshon 'od 'bar gyi gseb/ rtsa me tog sna tshogs
