493.19(1): yongs la khyab pa'o/ /
493.20(1): de nas snying pos bslang ste/ a dkar sa le 'od dkar spros 'bar bdal bdal/
493.21(1): lan bzhi brjod pas/ stong gsum gling chung kun kar bdag dang bder gshegs 
494.1(1): zhal bzhi gang / de nas phyag rgyas bslang ste/ mnyam pa'i phyag rgya bkrol nas/ 'byung 
494.2(1): ba kha gnon gyi phyag rgya zhes bya ba bcas te/ lag pa gnyis mdun du snying gi thad 
494.3(1): kar phar brkyang / mthe bong gnyis kyi sen mo sbrel/ phyi ma'i sor bzhi gshib nas 
494.4(1): thal mo sa la bstan pas 'byung pa rnams kyang mdzes shing snyoms par 'gyur ro/ /de 
494.5(1): nas tshig bshad kyi bslang ste tshigs su bcad de brjod pa/ ston pa gshen rab 
494.6(1): thugs rje yis/ 'khor ba'i sems can drangs pa'i phyir/ bstan pa rnam gsum phyag 
494.7(1): rjes bzhag /sgos btsan kong tse 'phrul rgyal dang / spyi btsan khams gsum sems 
494.8(1): can rnams/ bla med go 'phang bsgrub pa'i phyir/ nangs paRa mchod sbyin rgya cher 
494.9(1): 'bul/ 'byung ba chen po khyed bzhi la/ rdzas dang yo byad rag las pas/ 'byung ba'i 
494.10(1): dbang sgyur lha rigs lcam dral la/ brten pa'i gzhi byin mchod pa'i yo byad rnams/
494.11(1): zhi ba'i ngag gi bslang par bya/ dad pa'i sems kyang sbyin par gyis/ 'byung ba'i lha 
494.12(1): rigs lcam dral yang / shin tu dga' ba'i sems bskyed nas/ gto bu'i spyan sngar 
494.13(1): sprin bzhin 'dus/ rten pa'i gzhi byin mchod pa'i yo byad bsogs/ de nas rdzas 
494.14(1): kyis bslang ste/ bskyed pa rtsi yi 'o ma dang / gso ba rgyun gyi chu sbyar la/ nang du 'bru 
494.15(1): dang sman dang rin chen blugs nas/ phyogs bcu'i 'jig rten kun tu phul bas/
494.16(1): ting 'dzin snying po phyag rgya dang / tshig bshad rdzas kyi nus mthu yis/ 'jig rten 
494.17(1): khams kyi sems can la/ bag chags sa bon bzang yod rnams/ dge ba'i sdong la 
494.18(1): sprin bzhin 'dus/ brten pa'i gzhi la dbang bsgyur ba/ 'byung ba rnams kyi lha yin 
494.19(1): te/ rlung gi lha mo yangs pa 'degs byed ma/ dral po rlung gi lha dwangs snyigs 'byed 
494.20(1): pa gnyis kyis/ rlung khams zhi bar bsgyur cing / sku mdog lcags bstan sra brtan 
494.21(1): pha lam phul to/ /me'i lha mo gsal ba'i zhugs sgron ma dang / dral po me'i lha smin 
495.1(1): pa'i stobs ldan gnyis kyis me khams zhi bar bsgyur cing / sku mdog zangs bstan 
495.2(1): pad ma 'dab brgyad phul/ chu'i lha mo bdud rtsi kun grub ma dang / dral po chu'i lha 
495.3(1): sdud pa'i stobs mchog gnyis kyis/ chu khams zhi bar bsgyur cing / sku mdog dngul 
495.4(1): bstan 'khor lo dgu brtsegs phul/ sa'i lha mo yongs su brtan byed ma dang / dral 
495.5(1): po sa'i lha sra brtan 'degs byed gnyis kyis/ sa khams zhi bar bsgyur cing / sku 
495.6(1): mdog gser bstan rin chen 'bar ba phul/ nam mkha'i lha mo 'od zer gyi mdangs 
495.7(1): ldan ma dang / dral po nam mkha'i lha gsal ba'i go 'byed gnyis kyis/ nam mkha' 
495.8(1): gsal ba'i shin tu go yang phyes/ sku mdog g.yur bstan gzha' tshon gur khyim phub/
495.9(1): de ltar 'byung ba'i bdag po rnams kyis dad pas phul/ kong tse 'phrul gyi rgyal po la 
495.10(1): sogs te/ yon bdag 'khor dang bcas pa thams cad kyis/ 'dod pa lnga dang ldan 
495.11(1): pa lnga/ mchod pa'i yo byad sprin bzhin gsogs/ dpon gsas thugs rje'i mnga' 
495.12(1): bdag gis/ 'byung ba'i lha rigs dbang chen la/ zhi bas bslang nas dad pas 
495.13(1): phul/ lha rigs lcam dral de rnams kyang / dam pa'i don du bstan pa na/ gshen 
495.14(1): rab thugs rje'i sprul pa yis/ 'byung ba'i bdag po dbang gis bsgyur ba'o/ /brten 
495.15(1): pa'i gzhi gnas dang / mchod sbyin gyi yo byad rnams/ 'byung ba'i lha rigs lcam 
495.16(1): dral rnams/ zhi bas bslang ba'i 'phrin las kyi don bstan pa'o/ /
495.17(1): de nas dpon gsas kyi rten pa'i gzhi gnas dang / mchod sbyin gyi yo byad rnams/
495.18(1): mchod pas mnyes shing sbyin pas tshim par thugs rjes byin gyis brlabs te/ bkra 
495.19(1): shis kyi sgo nas byin gyis phun sum du tshogs par brlabs te/ byin gyis brlabs pa 
495.20(1): la yang lnga ste/ phyag rgyas byin gyis brlabs pa dang / snying pos byin gyis brlabs pa 
495.21(1): dang / rdzas kyis byin gyis brlabs pa dang / tshig bshad kyis byin gyis brlabs pa 
496.1(1): dang / ting nge 'dzin gyis byin gyis brlabs pa dang lnga'o/ /don de lngas bco brgyad 
496.2(1): yo ka la khyab ste/ bslang pa'i don gong ma de la/ ting nge 'dzin gyis 'go bzung 
496.3(1): nas bskyed pa ni/ dang po rgyud shes par bya ba'i phyir bskyed pa'o/ /da 'di nas 
496.4(1): mar don bcu bdun la ting nge 'dzin gyis gzhug bsdus nas bzlog pa ni/ rgyu shes 
496.5(1): pa de 'bras bu la bsdus pa'o/ /de nas gto bu 'bum sangs kyi phyag rgyas byin gyis 
496.6(1): brlabs te/ phyag rgya bkra shis bzed lugs kyi phyag rgya zhes bya ste/ g.yon pa'i 'khyor 
496.7(1): ba gyen la zad/ g.yas pa'i spar mo steng du sbub bo/ /de nas snying pos byin gyis 
496.8(1): brlabs te/ snying po/ klong drung mu skyel yongs khyab brum/ lan bzhi brjod do/ /de 
496.9(1): nas rdzas kyi byin gyis brlabs te/ chang phud du gser brdar nas/ rin po che'i zhal 
496.10(1): bur blugs nas/ yid kyi khye'u chung gis kun tu gtor ro/ /de nas tshig bshad kyis 
496.11(1): byin gyis brlabs te/ tshigs su bcad de gsungs pa/ 'gro ba'i don mdzad dus 
496.12(1): gsum bder gshegs thugs rje dang / bdag gi shes rab rgyud dag ting 'dzin 
496.13(1): stobs mchog dang / skal ldan yon bdag spyi mthun las kyi bsod nams dang / yo 
496.14(1): byad rdzas rnams tshogs pa'i rgyu yi nus mthu yis/ rten pa'i gzhi gnas pho brang 'di/
496.15(1): yid du 'ong nas mdzes shing bkra shis shig /mchod pa'i yar stegs ldan pa lnga 'di 
496.16(1): yang / bla med lha gshen rnams kyi spyan lam du/ sprin du gtibs kyin 'od du bkra 
496.17(1): bar brlabs/ sbyin pa'i yas stags 'dod pa lnga 'di yang / 'khor ba'i sems can 
496.18(1): khams gsum gnas su yang / ci 'dod yid bzhin 'phrad cing dgos 'dod re ba 
496.19(1): skong pa ru/ thugs rjes yongs su bkra shis byin gyis brlabs/ de nas ting nge 'dzin 
496.20(1): gyi byin gyis brlabs te/ thams cad ma lus dkyil 'khor gsum du bsgom/ rang 
496.21(1): bzhin dkyil 'khor dbyings nas lhun gyis grub par/ phyogs bcu 'jig rten mtha' 
497.1(1): yas thams cad kun/ dag pa rnam pa drug gi ting nge 'dzin du byin gyis brlabs/
497.2(1): ting nge 'dzin gyis dkyil 'khor mkha' la yid kyis bsgom par/ gshen rab kyis 
497.3(1): 'dul ba'i mi mjed kyi zhing khams/ stong gsum gyi 'jig rten sems can gyi las 
497.4(1): kyis mnyam du chags kyin mnyam du 'jig pa 'di nyid/ dag pa rnam pa drug gi ting 
497.5(1): nge 'dzin gyi byin gyis brlabs/ rdul mtshon gyi dkyil 'khor sa la lag gis bris pa 
497.6(1): ni/ gang zag blo dman rnams la dngos pos dngos med btsal ba dang / mtshan 
497.7(1): mas don la mtshon pa'i phyir/ rdul tshon gyi sa gzhi la lag gis dkyil 'khor du bris 
497.8(1): la bstan pa'o/ /brten pa'i gzhi gnas dang / mchod sbyin gyi yo byad rnams don 
497.9(1): dang ldan par bkra shis 'phel zhing / mchod pas mnyes gyin sbyin pas tshim par 
497.10(1): byin gyis brlabs pa'i don bstan pa'o/ /
497.11(1): de nas dpon gsas mnga' bdag gto bu 'bum sangs kyis/ don dam ting nge 
497.12(1): 'dzin gyi dkyil 'khor gsal bar bstan pa'i phyir/ mtshan ma rdul mtshon dkyil 
497.13(1): 'khor sa la 'bri bar dgongs te/ stong gsum 'jig rten gyi dbyibs dang bstun 
497.14(1): nas/ 'phang du bstod kyin mdzes pa'i chag chag btab pas/ stong gsum gyi gnas 
497.15(1): lugs dang / nang na sems can gyi rim pa 'dug lugs dang / bder gshegs kyi 
497.16(1): pho brang rnams kyi sems can 'dren pa'i thabs 'bri bar dgongs nas/ rgyan dang cha 
497.17(1): lugs mdzes par byas nas/ dar dkar gyi thig thag gser gyi chag shing la btags 
497.18(1): te/ chag shing g.yas su bzung nas shes rab dang sbyar/ thig thag g.yon du bzung 
497.19(1): nas thabs dang sbyar/ thig thag drangs nas dkyil 'khor gyi sa bcad nas chod par 
497.20(1): ma gyur/ mun pa'i bu yug dang / rdo shing gi ser ba dang / rlung dmar gyis 'tshub 
497.21(1): ma byung ste/ pho brang gi gnas ma brtsigs/ de la dpon gsas mnga' bdag gis 
498.1(1): 'khor rnams la gsungs pa/ 'jig rten sems can grangs mang la/ lta spyod dge 
498.2(1): sdig gnyis las med/ dge las dad pas dge sdong byed/ sdig la dad pas bar 
498.3(1): chod byed/ bdud dang srin po la sogs te/ phyin ci log tu kha bltas rnams/ bar 
498.4(1): chad byed du byung pa yin/ bar 'dir don dam bden pa bas/ kun rdzob bden 
498.5(1): pa gtso ba'i dus/ babar du gcod pa'i bgegs byed rnams/ drag po'i las kyis 
498.6(1): mtshams gcod dgos gsungs te/ mtshams gcod pa la yang don rnam pa lnga ste/
498.7(1): phyag rgyas mtshams gcod pa dang / snying pos mtshams gcod pa dang / rdzas kyis 
498.8(1): mtshams gcod pa dang / tshig bshad kyis mtshams gcod pa dang / ting nge 'dzin 
498.9(1): gyis mtshams gcod pa dang lnga'o/ /
498.10(1): de nas mnga' bdag gis phyag rgyas mtshams bcad de/ phyag rgya dbal zer sbar 
498.11(1): shad kyi phyag rgya zhes bya ste/ lag pa g.yas g.yon gnyis kyi spar mo yud tsam bkug 
498.12(1): nas g.yas pa gnam la bgrad/ g.yon pas sa la bcum mo/ /de nas snying pos 
498.13(1): mtshams bcad de/ khri dur a par slong du ri li drag ma rag sha b+h+yoH b+h+yoH/ lan lnga 
498.14(1): brjod do/ /de nas rdzas kyi mtshams bcad de/ ral gri bzhi phyogs bzhir gdengs/
498.15(1): mda' bzhi mtshams bzhir bkang / rgyal mtshan gnyis steng 'og gnyis su phyar 
498.16(1): ro/ /de nas tshig bshad kyis mtshams bcad de/ sems can nyon mongs sgrib sbyang 
498.17(1): phyir/ bstan pa rnam gsum dpe bzhag la/ mnga' dbul zhal bsro spyan dbye na/ pho 
498.18(1): brang dkyil 'khor bzhengs sa 'dir/ bar du gcod pa'i bgegs byed kun/ gnas 
498.19(1): 'dir 'dug pa'i sa med kyi/ sa sa so sor la 'ur byer/ gal te mi 'gro 'dug 
498.20(1): 'gyur na/ khro chen rngam pa'i zhal nang du/ phye bas zhib par byas la bstims/ gdug 
498.21(1): pa'i gcan gzan rngam pa'i khar/ chu bas sla bar byas la btung / mtshe mda' 
499.1(1): dbal gyi tsha tsha dang / nyungs dkar khro bo gser tswa 'di/ skyes ni ri rab rtse la skyes/
499.2(1): bskyed ni rgya mtsho'i rlabs kyis bskyed/ brngas ni gyad kyi rtsal gyis brngas/ g.yu 'od 
499.3(1): 'bar la gser 'od 'phro/ drag rtsal dbal gyi phyag tu phul/ log par byed pa'i 
499.4(1): bgegs rigs la/ skyes mchog bdag gis 'phang pa'i tshe/ bar chod byed pa'i khrom 
499.5(1): bshig nas/ bya sgro me la bsregs pa bzhin/ drag ma rag sha gzhom du thongs/ ting 
499.6(1): nge 'dzin gyi mtshams bcad de/ rdzas bcu po de gong du smos pa'i sgo srung gi khro bo 
499.7(1): bcur bsam nas/ rnga brdung gshang dkrol sgra phyung ste/ mtshe nyungs 'phangs stag 
499.8(1): seng gi tshom tshom byas nas sngags brjod pas/ bar chad byed pa'i bgegs rigs 
499.9(1): kun/ khro bo bcu yi zhal mthong nas/ mtha' yi mun pa chen po la/ yo ka sib kyis 
499.10(1): bros te song ngo / /rdzas bcu phyogs bcur thim par btsugs/ nyon mongs dug lngas 
499.11(1): dbang byas pa'i/ bar du gcod pa'i bgegs rigs kun/ drag po dbal gyi cha 
499.12(1): lugs kyis/ phyogs bcur mtshams bcad pa'i don bstan pa'o/ /
499.13(1): de nas dpon gsas mnga' bdag gto bu 'bum sangs kyis/ mtshan mas khrid 
499.14(1): la nges don bstan pa'i phyir/ pho brang dkyil 'khor brtsigs pa dang / mdzes pa'i 
499.15(1): chag chag gdab par dgongs te pho brang dkyil 'khor rtsig pa la yang don rnam 
499.16(1): pa lnga ste/ phyag rgyas rtsig pa dang / snying pos rtsig pa dang / rdzas kyis rtsig pa dang /
499.17(1): tshig bshad kyis rtsig pa dang / ting nge 'dzin gyis rtsig pa dang lnga'o/ /de nas mnga' 
499.18(1): bdag gis phyag rgya myur mgyogs bar snang glog gi phyag rgya zhes bya ste/ lag pa gnyis 
499.19(1): ka mdun du phyed brkyang tsam byas nas/ sor mo gzings kyin yar mar mgyogs 
499.20(1): par bskor ro/ /de nas snying pos rtsig pa ni/ dar dkar gyi thig thag 'dom phyed 
499.21(1): dang bzhi btsal nas/ sna gcig chag shing la btags te/ shes rab dang sbyar nas 
500.1(1): sa gzhi la btsugs/ sna gcig ngar so la btags te/ thabs dang sbyar te shar nas 
500.2(1): drangs te byang nas zlum pos bskor te/ snying po mu rgyas a par slong 'du 'du bru bru /
500.3(1): lan bzhi brjod do/ /de nas rdzas kyis rtsig ste/ gser gyi chag shing dang / thugs 
500.4(1): rje'i thig thag dang / gnam lcags kyi ngar so dang / sa phag zur gsum dang /
500.5(1): gnam lcags 'jor chen dang / bse'i g.yag pa dang / dung gi bre ba dang / gtsang 
500.6(1): ma'i mdzes chab dang / pad zangs chab snod dang / dngul dkar chab skyogs dang /
500.7(1): ras dkar gyi zhal phyis dang / de rnams kong tses bsags so/ /de nas tshig bshad 
500.8(1): kyi tshigs su bcad de rtsig ste/ rgyu sbyor yon bdag gshen mched dang / khams 
500.9(1): gsum mtha' yas sems can kun/ bder gshegs gzhal yas gnas rtsig pa/
500.10(1): las la bzang pa'i rab yin te/ shin tu dkon pa'i mchog yin pas/ brgya la nang 
500.11(1): nas gcig byung tsam/ 'dir tshogs skal ldan bsod can yin/ dus la bab bo sprin 
500.12(1): bzhin 'dus/ don dang mthun pa'i dpe btsal nas/ mu khyud bdal pa'i mtsho gling 
500.13(1): la/ ngang pa'i rgyal pos khrus byed bzhin/ 'di la ma yengs brel pa'i rigs/ dkyil 
500.14(1): 'khor bder gshegs pho brang la/ gyad kyis gzhu brdungs rgyud bzhin du/ dad pa'i 
500.15(1): sems kyis thang bcad nas/ sa spar gang gis dpang bstod cing / chu skyogs gang 
500.16(1): gis chag btab kyin/ chu skyogs gang gi thig pa dang / sa spar gang gi rdul grangs 
500.17(1): kyis/ dga' bde bsod nams 'phel bar 'gyur/ de nas ting nge 'dzin gyi rtsig ste/
500.18(1): chag shing dbus su btsugs pa de/ nyi ma dang 'dra ste/ ston pa'i sku nyid lhang nger 
500.19(1): gsal/ de las thig thag drangs pa ni/ 'od zer gsal nas stong gsum dang / lha 
500.20(1): dang klu dang mi la sogs/ mtha' yas sems can mang po rnams/ ngar sos bskor 
500.21(1): ba'i dkyil 'khor la/ 'phang du bstod kyis chag chag gdab par bsam/ de nas 
501.1(1): thig skor gyis sa bcad pa'i zlum po rim gcig la/ mtho gang brtsigs nas mdzes 
501.2(1): pa'i chag chag gdab/ thig thag 'dom phyed phri nas yang gcig zlum por bskor/ khru 
501.3(1): gang brtsigs nas mdzes pa'i chag chag btab/ mtho gang khru gang bar bskor te/
501.4(1): stong gsum phar 'das mun pa chen po'o/ /khru gang brtsigs pas skor ni stong gsum 
501.5(1): sa bcad do/ /sa bcad de'i rngams su mtho gang khru gang ngo / /chu zheng du ni 'dom 
501.6(1): drug go /phyi skor pho 'dom bcu dgu'o/ /phyi skor pho 'dom bcu dgu de/ tshad ma nor 
501.7(1): bar gru bzhir bcad/ bcad pa'i gru bzhir mi 'gyur phur bzhi btsugs/ dgun 
501.8(1): zla 'bring po'i smin drug shar sa shar phyogs drang pa'o/ /phyogs bzhir phyed tshad bor 
501.9(1): la/ chu ru khru do zheng du khru gang yod pa'i sgo bzhi ni/ mun pa'i dpyang sgo chen po bzhi/
501.10(1): bar chad bros pa bzlog phyir gzug /de ltar thig gdab 'bri sa'i dkyil 'khor me 
501.11(1): long phyis pa bzhin du bsnyams/ sa skor ngar sos bcad pa dang / pho brang dkyil 
501.12(1): 'khor brtsegs pa dang / mdzes pa'i chag chag btab pa dang / dbyibs snyoms 
501.13(1): 'jam par byas pa'i don bstan pa'o/ /
501.14(1): de nas dpon gsas mnga' bdag gis sems can kyi las la grub pa'i snod 
501.15(1): bcud kyi gnas lugs dang / ston pa'i thugs rje las sprul pa'i bder gshegs kyi 
501.16(1): pho brang gnyis/ ci ltar gnas pa bstan pa'i phyir/ sa bcad mi 'khrug 'byed pa'i 
501.17(1): thig btab ste/ mi 'khrug pa'i thig gdab pa la yang don rnam pa lnga ste/ phyag rgyas 
501.18(1): thig gdab pa dang / snying pos thig gdab pa dang / yo byad kyi thig gdab pa dang /
501.19(1): tshig bshad kyis thig gdab pa dang / ting nge 'dzin gyis thig gdab pa dang lnga'o/ /
501.20(1): de la phyag rgyas thig gdab pa ni/ rdzu 'phrul bstan 'dzugs kyi phyag rgya zhes bya ste/
501.21(1): g.yon pas thig thag bcangs nas thugs kar gtad/ g.yas pas thig thag mdun 
502.1(1): gyi thad kar phar brkyangs/ snying pos thig gdab pa ni/ sne gcig dpon gsas 
502.2(1): kyis shar nas drangs/ sne gcig khye'u chung gis nub tu drangs nas 'di skad snying 
502.3(1): po brjod do/ /mu spros zer spar rtse 'bar gsal rtse 'bar gsal/ zhes lan bzhi 
502.4(1): brjod do/ /de nas rdzas kyi thig gdab pa ni/ thig chal dmar po yum gyis dbyings/
502.5(1): thig chal dkar po yab kyi mkha'/ rin chen phor bar byang bar sbyangs/ pad shun 
502.6(1): thig skud grims dang sbyar/ de nas tshig bshad kyi thig gdab pa ni/ tshigs su 
502.7(1): bcad pa gong du smos pa'i le'u bcu gsum pa'i nang na yod pa dang sbyar ro/ /de 
502.8(1): nas ting nge 'dzin gyi thig gdab pa ni/ dbyings las khyab bdal pa ni/ nam 
502.9(1): mkha' stong pa'i ngogs mkha' la zer 'phros pa ni ma rig mun pa bcom/ dkar 
502.10(1): dmar 'od zer thig gis stong gsum khyab par bsgom/ de nas phyogs mtshams 
502.11(1): 'byed pa'i tshangs thig bzhi gdab pa/ de nas mtha' nas mtho gang gcal nas 
502.12(1): lcags ri'i tshad du zlum por bskor/ de nas yang cig mtho gang gcal nas zangs 
502.13(1): ri'i tshad du zlum por bskor/ phur bzhi rgyab la gtad nas/ thig chal dkar pos 
502.14(1): gru bzhir gdab/ bar der zla gam bzhi 'byung shel gyi cog bzhi'i tshad/ de nas 
502.15(1): zur thig rgya gram mdo nas/ nang du khru gang sor bzhi gcal nas/ thig chal dmar 
502.16(1): pos yang cig gru bzhir btab/ thig bar de ni 'byung ba'i rtsig pa'i tshad/ dmar 
502.17(1): thig gru bzhi'i nang du dmar thig bzhi btab pas gling skor dgu 'byung ngo / /dmar 
502.18(1): thig mtha' mar dkar thig gnyis gnyis su brten pas sum thig go /dkar dmar 
502.19(1): bar gyi tshad ni sor gnyis so/ /gling skor dgu ni thig chen no/ /thig chen dbus thig 
502.20(1): rkyang pas rtsig par sleb par gdab/ de nas de'i nang du bar thig nyi shu rtsa bzhi thig 
502.21(1): chal dkar pos rtsig pa sleb par gdab/ dkar thig mtha' mar dmar thig gnyis 
503.1(1): gnyis kyis su brten pas sum thig go /dkar dmar bar gyi tshad ni sor re'o/ /
503.2(1): rtsig pa'i thig ni rkyang pa'o/ /gshag thig bzhi btab skor lnga'o/ /'byung ba'i rtsig par 
503.3(1): ma slebs par/ nang gi sum thig gling skor la/ phra thig drug cur phrag gnyis gdab/
503.4(1): de ni g.yung drung gdan gyi 'byed thig go /phra thig rnams ni dkar po'o/ /sgo thig 
503.5(1): brgyad kyang dkar por gdab/ de ltar thig gdab mtha' nas gdab/ da ni tshon 
503.6(1): 'gyed dbus nas bkye ba bstan/ de la yang dang po stong pa las 'od byung / 'od 
503.7(1): las zer 'phros/ zer la yig 'bru gsal/ yig 'bru las lha bskyed/ lha las lha 
503.8(1): bskyed pas 'gro ba'i don byed pa'i phyir/ dbus kyi gtsang khang ni/ stong gcig pa spyi 
503.9(1): phud kyi tshul du gtsang khang du bzhengs pa'o/ /phra thig mtha' yi skor lnga bzhag nas/
503.10(1): dbus kyi thig bsubs 'jam par chag chag gdab/ sor bzhi zlum por bskor 
503.11(1): nas nag pos bkang nas stong par bzhag /stong pa bon nyid cir yang mi dmigs 
503.12(1): stong pa'i rang bzhin no/ /nag po bon nyid klong la cir yang mi 'gyur tshon chen 
503.13(1): no/ /zlum po bon nyid la phyogs dang ris med mnyam pa chen po'o/ /stong pa las 
503.14(1): 'od byung dkar dang ser dang sngo dang dmar dang nag dang ljang gis bskor/ 'od 
503.15(1): la zer 'phros shing lo'i tshul du yang mdzes par logs bzhi dkyil du drangs/ zer 
503.16(1): bzhi'i bar du gser gyi rang bzhin zla gam ser po bzhi'i steng du/ zer la yig 'bru 
503.17(1): gsal bas/ snying po rnams yig 'bru tshang pas bskor/ zur bzhi pad ma bzhi 'byung 
503.18(1): la/ byang shar pad ma dkar pos bkang / nub byang pad ma ljang khus bkang / lho 
503.19(1): nub pad ma dmar pos bkang / lho shar pad ma sngon pos bkang / yig 'bru las 
503.20(1): su lha bskyed pas/ dkar las sa trig er sangs so/ /ljang la gshen lha 'od dkar 
503.21(1): ro/ /dmar la sangs po 'bum khri'o/ /sngo la gshen rab mi bo'o/ /dbus kyi gtso 
504.1(1): bo rtsa ba'i lha yin pas/ sku mdog dang phyag mtshan rgyan dang chas par dgod do/ /
504.2(1): rin po che'i 'phreng bas gru bzhi'i mtha' ma brten/ de nas mtha'i skor lnga la/ 'byung 
504.3(1): ba lnga'i rtsig pa brtsegs/ ma tha rlung ri nag po rdo rje rgya gram mo/ /me ri dmar po pad 
504.4(1): ma 'dab brgyad do/ /chu ri sngon po 'khor lo lnga skor ro/ /sa ri ser po rin che 'bar 
504.5(1): ba'o/ /ya tha bar snang ri mo mkha' 'al 'ol dang / gsal phya phyo zhes bya ste/ nyi zla'i

504.11(1): khyud g.yas na lha bu gar mkhan no/ /g.yon na lha mo mchod 'bul lo/ /sgo ldad bla

504.13(1): rgyan dang mtshungs/ rtsig gseb ka ba bcu drug rin po che/ rtsig ldad gdung ma 
504.14(1): gzha' tshon 'od/ ka zhu zla ba tshes pa'o/ /ka gdan pad ma gyes pa'o/ /dbus kyi pho

504.16(1): phyogs bzhi mtshams bzhi dbus dang kun mthun te/ dbus thig dmar po la sa 
504.17(1): tshon ser po drang / g.yas g.yon dkar po la sa tshon dkar po drang / bar du ljang 
504.18(1): dang dmar gyi zur gsum gyi sor kyog la drang / g.yas g.yon zur gsum dkyil du

504.21(1): btab pa la/ dbus dang rtsig pa ma gtogs par/ gling skor gnyis brgya tham pa

510.18(1): ba gtsang ma ru/ gtsang chu blugs nas g.yas su bzung / mtshe nyungs blugs nas

510.21(1): bon gyi dbyings dkyil te/ rang bzhin dkyil 'khor khyab bdal klong yangs dag pa 
511.1(1): nas/ 'gro ba'i don du 'od zer yig 'bru shin tu gsal/ thugs rje tshad med mtha'

511.5(1): bzhugs/ bdag dang yon bdag mtha' yas sems can mang po yis/ sgrib gnyis

511.7(1): dkyil 'khor bris pa ru/ rang bzhin dkyil 'khor mkha' dbyings khyab bdal dag

511.12(1): lnga dang bcas/ byin gyis brlabs kyis thugs dag mkha' la gsal gdab nas/

511.18(1): lugs shel la shel gyi 'od kyis mdzes par brgyan/ rin chen bkra gsal stobs chen 
511.19(1): glang bsnol khri la bzhugs/ bdag dang yon bdag mtha' yas sems can mang po 
511.20(1): yi/ sgrib gnyis sbyang zhing tshogs gnyis bsags pa'i don slad du/ mtshan ma rdzas 
511.21(1): kyi rdul mtshon dkyil 'khor bris pa ru/ rang bzhin dkyil 'khor mkha' dbyings 
512.1(1): khyab bdal dag pa nas/ sems can don du thugs rje las su bskyed pa yi/ lha chen 
512.2(1): gnyis brgya lnga bcu 'khor dang bcas pa ni/ nangs par 'gro ba sems can drang 
512.3(1): pa'i don slad du/ do mod ting 'dzin gsal ba'i dkyil 'khor dam pa ru/ 'gro 
512.4(1): ba'i don la ma yengs thugs dgongs las mdzad pas/ sku gsung thugs dang yon 
512.5(1): tan 'phrin las lnga dang bcas/ thugs rjes bskyed nas thugs dag mkha' la gsal 
512.6(1): btab nas/ 'khor bcas sta bon la ni khyab bdal bzhugs su gsol/ mi 'gyur 
512.7(1): dbyings chen 'byams yas bon gyi dbyings dkyil te/ rang bzhin dkyil 'khor 
512.8(1): khyab bdal klong yangs dag pa nas/ 'gro ba'i don du 'od zer yig 'bru shin tu 
512.9(1): gsal/ thugs rje tshad med mtha' yas sems can kun la khyab/ thabs kyi mchog 
512.10(1): gyur sangs po 'bum khri sprul pa can/ sku mdog mi 'gyur dkar 'bar dngul gyi 
512.11(1): snying po 'dra/ rgyan dang cha lugs dngul la dngul gyi 'od kyis brgyan/ rin chen 
512.12(1): bkra gsal rlabs chen khyung bsnol khri la bzhugs/ bdag dang yon bdag mtha' 
512.13(1): yas sems can mang po yi/ sgrib gnyis sbyong zhing tshogs gnyis bsags pa'i don 
512.14(1): slad du/ mtshan ma rdzas kyi rdul mtshon dkyil 'khor bris pa ru/ rang bzhin dkyil 
512.15(1): 'khor mkha' dbyings khyab bdal dam pa nas/ sems can don du sprul pa las su 
512.16(1): srid pa yi/ srid pa gnyis brgya lnga bcu 'khor dang bcas pa ni/ nangs par 'gro 
512.17(1): ba sems can drang pa'i don slad du/ do mod ting 'dzin gsal ba'i dkyil 'khor 
512.18(1): dam pa ru/ 'gro ba'i don la ma yengs thugs dgongs las mdzad pas/ sku gsung 
512.19(1): thugs dang yon tan 'phrin las lnga dang bcas/ sprul pas srid nas thugs dam 
512.20(1): mkha' la gsal btab nas/ 'khor bcas sta bon la ni bzhugs su gsol/ mi 
512.21(1): 'gyur dbyings chen 'byams yas bon gyi dbyings dkyil te/ rang bzhin dkyil 
513.1(1): 'khor khyab bdal klong yangs dag pa nas/ 'gro ba'i don du 'od zer yig 'bru 
513.2(1): shin tu gsal/ thugs rje tshad med mtha' yas sems can kun la khyab/ shes rab 
513.3(1): phul ldan ston pa gshen rab 'od zer can/ sku mdog mi 'gyur rin chen sna lnga bkra 
513.4(1): la gsal/ rgyan dang cha lugs rin chen nyid la nyid kyis brgyan/ rin chen bkra 
513.5(1): gsal dbang bsgyur 'khor lo'i khri la bzhugs/ bdag dang yon bdag mtha' yas 
513.6(1): sems can mang po yi/ sgrib gnyis sbyang zhing tshogs gnyis bsags pa'i don slad 
513.7(1): du/ mtshan ma rdzas kyi rdul mtshon dkyil 'khor bris pa ru/ rang bzhin dkyil 'khor 
513.8(1): mkha' dbyings khyab bdal dam pa nas/ sems can don du 'od zer las su bkye 
513.9(1): ba yi/ gshen rab gnyis brgya lnga bcu 'khor dang bcas pa ni/ nangs par 'gro ba 
513.10(1): sems can drang pa'i don slad du/ do mod ting 'dzin gsal ba'i dkyil 'khor dam 
513.11(1): pa ru/ 'gro ba'i don la ma yengs thugs dgongs las mdzad pa/ sku gsung thugs 
513.12(1): dang yon tan 'phrin las lnga dang bcas/ 'od zer bkye nas thugs dag mkha' la 
513.13(1): gsal btab nas/ 'khor bcas sta bon la ni bdal khyab bzhugs su gsol/
513.14(1): de nas bum par 'dzab bgrang ste/ a a ad A+o~M sal sal/ nang dang bar dang 
513.15(1): phyi dang gsum du rim pas mtshe nyungs dang / gtsang chu la sngags nas phyogs bcu 
513.16(1): 'dul ba'i don du phogs bcu bum par blugs/ de ni dbyings dang ye shes mkha' 
513.17(1): la mnyam pa'i snying po'o/ /yang snying po gcig la/ ha 'a hUM 'o lam lam/ de nas yang 
513.18(1): gong ltar mtshungs par phogs bcu bum par blugs/ de ni thabs dang shes rab 
513.19(1): zung du 'brel ba'i snying po'o/ /yang snying po gcig la/ yaM yaM raM raM khaM khaM hU~M hU~M A+o~M A+o~M 
513.20(1): a lo spar a lam gsal/ zer spros 'od rum khyab bdal spros pa mkha' la mnyam 
513.21(1): ste bdal bdal/ de ni 'khor gyi lha stong mtshan brjod pa dang / mtshan brjod kyis 
514.1(1): mi lang pa gang ga'i klung gi bye ma snyed tsam du/ shin tu grangs mang pa'i snying po ste/
514.2(1): mtshe nyungs gtsang chu sngags te/ bum par lan bcu sngags nas blugs so/ /de nas 
514.3(1): yang tshig bshad kyis sta bon la gnas pa ni/ tshigs su bcad de snying rje'i mgron sta 
514.4(1): bon gnas te/ lha dang lha min mi dang mtho ris gsum/ byol song yi dwags dmyal 
514.5(1): ba ngan song gsum/ de drug skye ba bar ma do dang bdun/ sbyin pa btang gnas 
514.6(1): dmigs pa'i mgron yin pas/ mtshan ma rdzas kyi rdul mtshon dkyil 'khor bris pa 
514.7(1): ru/ thams cad nangs par snying rje'i mgron du spyan 'dren gyis/ byin gyis brlabs 
514.8(1): kyis mi khom so sor zhi nas kyang / thams cad do mod ting 'dzin gsal ba'i dkyil 
514.9(1): 'khor du/ sta bon la ni gnas par bgyi'o/ /de nas yang bum par 'dzab bgrangs 
514.10(1): ste/ a dkar a rmad du tri su nag po zhi zhi mal mal/ de ni ngan song dong sprugs 
514.11(1): kyi snying po'o/ /yang mtshe nyungs dang gtsang chu la sngags nas/ phogs bdun bum 
514.12(1): par blugs/ rigs drug bar ma do dang bdun gyi snying po'o/ /de nas dpon gsas 
514.13(1): nyid sta bon la gnas pa la tshigs su bcad de gsungs pa/ gtsang gos gzi brjid 
514.14(1): gzha' tshon 'od/ gtsang thod bder gshegs gnyis med gdan/ gtsang lham sa 
514.15(1): bcu 'khor ba gnon/ phyag rgya'i gur khyim lha dang brda' sprod mkhal/ kha gser kha 
514.16(1): g.yu ngo mtshar bka' yi rtags/ pad ma'i gdan ni skyon med dag pa'i don/ 'di 
514.17(1): ltar dpon gsas 'khor dang bcas pa rnams/ nangs par mchod sbyin rgya chen khyab 
514.18(1): par 'gyed pas su/ do mod sta bon la ni gnas par bya'o/ /gtsang ma'i rgyan gzhi 
514.19(1): gnyis stengs su/ mchod pa'i yas stags sprin bzhin gtib/ sbyin pa'i yas stags 
514.20(1): gram ltar bkram pa 'di/ nangs par dmigs med rgya chen yongs su gtong bas 
514.21(1): su/ do mod sta bon la ni gnas par bgyi'o/ /bar gyi mda' bzhi ral gri bzhi/ me 
515.1(1): long bzhi dang rgyal mtshan gnyis/ me long bdag dang gzhan med gsal/ mda' 
515.2(1): dang ral gri rgyal mtshan rnams/ phyi mtshams rgya cher yongs su phyogs bcu de ring 
515.3(1): bcad/ ma chod bag la nyal ba las kyi bgegs/ grib la rten cing lus la 'khri ba 
515.4(1): rnams/ kho thag bcad kyin mtshams gcod phyir/ dbal gyi khro chen bcu yi zhal/
515.5(1): nangs par nang gin mtshams gcod phyir/ dkyil 'khor phyogs mtshams steng 'og 
515.6(1): tu dgod pas/ do mod ting 'dzin gsal ba'i dkyil 'khor du/ sta bon la gnas 
515.7(1): par bgyi'o/ /rin chen gtsang ma'i bum pa 'di/ rdul tshon ting 'dzin gnyis ka 
515.8(1): gsal ba'i phyir/ dpon gsas bdag gi sku dang ye shes sbyar ba dang ni gnyis su 
515.9(1): med/ bum pa lha yi gzhal yas khang / bdag kyang lha'i gzhal yas khang / kha rgyan

515.11(1): pa dbang po lnga/ sman lnga blugs pa nang grol lnga/ rin chen lnga blugs 'dod pa lnga/

515.13(1): cad spro bsdu gcig gi ngang / mi brjed gzungs kyi thag pas btags/ nangs par

515.15(1): nyungs lhag ma nam mkhar gtor/ gser rta g.yu mi mdzes pa bsam du med pa 
515.16(1): yis/ mchod sbyin mgron rnams spyan 'dren snyan gsan 'bebs par ting nge 'dzin 
515.17(1): gyis bzung / gtsang chu lhag mas yon bdag rnams gtsang zhing dag par khrus kyis 
515.18(1): bkrus/ pad shun gyi ras ma la yi ge dpa' bo 'bru lnga bris/ sog pa g.yas par 
515.19(1): btags te/ dpon gsas kyi tshigs su bcad de gsungs pa/ dug lnga'i dbang byas 
515.20(1): phung po lnga/ dug lnga'i gnyen po ye shes lnga/ dpa' bo 'bru lnga'i rgyu las byung / phung 
515.21(1): po lha lngar gyur pa'i phyir/ rgyu sbyor yon bdag 'khor bcas la/ dpa' bo 'bru lnga

520.21(1): 'gyur 'od gsal g.yung drung gdan/ rin chen 'bar ba mdzes pa'i gcal/ 'od

521.5(1): can kun la khyab/ ye shes lha chen gshen lha 'od dkar thugs rje can/ sku mdog mi

521.7(1): kyis brgyan/ rin chen bkra gsal stobs chen glang bsnol khri la bzhugs/ bdag

521.9(1): gnyis bsag pa'i don slad du/ lha chen nyis brgya lnga bcu 'khor dang bcas pa 
521.10(1): rnams/ deng gi gnas mchog dam pa pho brang yid 'ong 'dir/ bon nyid bden pa'i

521.12(1): cir yang sprul pa'i sku ni gzha' tshon bzhin du bkra/ bon sku nam mkha' bzhin du ye 
521.13(1): dag mkha' mnyam ste/ rdzogs sku nyi zla bzhin du gsal la rang bzhin med/ sprul sku 
521.14(1): gzha' tshon bzhin du so sor bkra la gsal/ 'gro ba sems can drang phyir gcig 
521.15(1): gis gcig bskyed nas/ gnas 'dir spyan 'dren nam mkha'i char bzhin gshegs 
521.16(1): su gsol/ sku gdung ring bsrel sku yi gzugs brnyan dang / gsung rab 'bum sde 
521.17(1): nges pa'i don rtags dang / sku gzugs spyan can bder gshegs zhal skyin gsum/
521.18(1): bder gshegs zhal skyin rten dang phyi rabs 'dren pa'i dpal/ gnyis med don du 
521.19(1): gcig gi ngang la gcig tu thim/ de mtshon phyi rabs drang pa dang / skyabs gsol 
521.20(1): bsod tshogs bskyed pa'i phyir/ dkyil 'khor lha yi gzhal yas bris/ bum pa lha'i 
521.21(1): gzhal yas bskyed/ bdag nyid lha yi gzhal yas bsgrubs/ tha mi dad pa'i gzhal 
522.1(1): yas su/ gdan yang don dang 'tshams par bting / skyon gyis ma gos pad ma'i 
522.2(1): gdan/ mi 'gyur 'od gsal g.yung drung gdan/ rin chen 'bar ba mdzes pa'i 
522.3(1): gcal/ 'od chen gzha' tshon bskor ba'i gling / gdan mchog gzhal yas chas pa ru/
522.4(1): 'gro ba drang phyir bzhugs su gsol/ mi 'gyur dbyings chen 'byams yas bon gyi 
522.5(1): dbyings dkyil te/ rang bzhin dkyil 'khor khyab bdal klong yangs dag pa nas/
522.6(1): 'gro ba'i don du 'od zer yig 'bru shin tu gsal/ thugs rje tshad med mtha' yas 
522.7(1): sems can kun la khyab/ thabs kyi mchog gyur sangs po 'bum khri sprul pa can/ sku 
522.8(1): mdog mi 'gyur dkar 'bar dngul gyi snying po 'dra/ rgyan dang cha lugs dngul la 
522.9(1): dngul gyi 'od kyis brgyan/ rin chen bkra gsal rlabs chen khyung bsnol khri la 
522.10(1): bzhugs/ bdag dang yon bdag mtha' yas sems can mang po yi/ sgrib gnyis 
522.11(1): sbyang zhing tshogs gnyis bsags pa'i don slad du/ srid pa nyis brgya lnga bcu 'khor 
522.12(1): dang bcas pa rnams/ deng gi gnas mchog dam pa pho brang yid 'ong 'dir/ bon 
522.13(1): nyid bden pa'i sku ni nam mkha' bzhin du stong / longs spyod rdzogs pa'i sku ni nyi zla 
522.14(1): bzhin du gsal/ cir yang sprul pa'i sku ni gzha' tshon bzhin du bkra/ bon sku nam 
522.15(1): mkha' bzhin du ye dag mkha' mnyam ste/ rdzogs sku nyi zla bzhin du gsal la rang 
522.16(1): bzhin med/ sprul sku gzha' tshon bzhin du so sor bkra la gsal/ 'gro ba sems 
522.17(1): can drang phyir gcig gis gcig bskyed nas/ gnas 'dir spyan 'dren nam mkha'i 
522.18(1): char bzhin gshegs su gsol/ sku gdung ring bsrel sku'i gzugs brnyan dang /
522.19(1): gsung rab 'bum sde nges pa'i don rtags dang / sku gzugs spyan can bder 
522.20(1): gshegs zhal skyin gsum/ bder gshegs zhal skyin rten dang phyi rabs 'dren pa'i 
522.21(1): dpal/ gnyis med don du gcig gi ngang la gcig tu thim/ de mtshon phyi rabs 
523.1(1): drang pa dang / skyabs gsol bsod tshogs bskyed pa'i phyir/ dkyil 'khor lha yi 
523.2(1): gzhal yas bris/ bum pa lha yi gzhal yas bskyed/ bdag nyid lha yi gzhal yas 
523.3(1): bsgrub/ tha mi dad pa'i gzhal yas su/ gdan yang don dang 'tshams par bting /
523.4(1): skyon gyis ma gos pad ma'i gdan/ mi 'gyur 'od gsal g.yung drung gdan/ rin 
523.5(1): chen 'bar ba mdzes pa'i gcal/ 'od chen gzha' tshon bskor ba'i gling / gdan 
523.6(1): mchog gzhal yas chas pa ru/ 'gro ba drang phyir bzhugs su gsol/ mi 'gyur 
523.7(1): dbyings chen 'byams yas bon gyi dbyings dkyil te/ rang bzhin dkyil 'khor 
523.8(1): khyab bdal klong yangs dag pa nas/ 'gro ba'i don du 'od zer yig 'bru shin tu 
523.9(1): gsal/ thugs rje tshad med mtha' yas sems can kun la khyab/ shes rab phul 
523.10(1): ldan ston pa gshen rab 'od zer can/ sku mdog mi 'gyur rin chen sna lnga bkra la 
523.11(1): gsal/ rgyan dang cha lugs rin chen nyid la nyid kyis brgyan/ rin chen bkra gsal 
523.12(1): dbang bsgyur 'khor lo'i khri la bzhugs/ bdag dang yon bdag mtha' yas sems 
523.13(1): can mang po yi/ sgrib gnyis sbyang zhing tshogs gnyis bsags pa'i don slad du/
523.14(1): gshen rab nyis brgya lnga bcu 'khor dang bcas pa rnams/ deng gi gnas mchog 
523.15(1): dam pa pho brang yid 'ong 'dir/ bon nyid bden pa'i sku ni nam mkha' bzhin du 
523.16(1): stong / longs spyod rdzogs pa'i sku ni nyi zla bzhin du gsal/ cir yang sprul pa'i sku ni 
523.17(1): gzha' tshon bzhin du bkra/ bon sku nam mkha' bzhin du ye dag mkha' mnyam ste/

523.20(1): gnas 'dir spyan 'dren nam mkha'i char bzhin gshegs su gsol/ sku gdung ring

524.1(1): sku gzugs spyan can bder gshegs zhal skyin gsum/ bder gshegs zhal skyin 
524.2(1): rten dang phyi rabs 'dren pa'i dpal/ gnyis med don du gcig gi ngang la gcig 
524.3(1): tu thim/ de mtshon phyi rabs drang ba dang / skyabs gsol bsod tshogs bskyed pa'i 
524.4(1): phyir/ dkyil 'khor lha'i gzhal yas bris/ bum pa lha'i gzhal yas bskyed/ bdag 
524.5(1): nyid lha yi gzhal yas bsgrub/ tha mi dad pa'i gzhal yas su/ gdan yang don dang 
524.6(1): 'tshams par bting / skyon gyis ma gos pad ma'i gdan/ mi 'gyur 'od gsal 
524.7(1): g.yung drung gdan/ rin chen 'bar ba mdzes pa'i gcal/ 'od chen gzha' tshon

524.9(1): su gsol/ mtshan brjod mi long bder gshegs bsam mi khyab/ ci snyed sa yi rdul 
524.10(1): bas grangs mang ba/ gnas 'dir spyan 'dren sprin bzhin gtibs nas su/ sems 
524.11(1): can sgrib sbyang don du rten la thim gyin gdan la bzhugs/ snying rje'i mgron du gyur 
524.12(1): pa'i rigs drug bar ma do dang bdun/ sbyin pa gtang gnas dmigs pa'i yul 
524.13(1): yin pas/ gnas 'dir spyan 'dren sprin dang rtsi bzhin gtibs te 'du/ bder 
524.14(1): gshegs mchod gnas mgron gyi byin brlabs kyis/ mi khom zhi nas 'ub 'ub la 'ur 
524.15(1): 'dus/ mgron gyi nang nas log byed bar gcod kun/ bder gshegs sprul pa gzi 
524.16(1): brjid khro bo'i skur phyung pas/ tshad bsgral nang nas mtshams bcad phyir 'byin pas/
524.17(1): mda' dang ral gri rgyal mtshan rnams/ rten la thim gyin gdan la bzhugs su 
524.18(1): gsol/ de nas ting nge 'dzin gyis spyan drangs bzhugs su gsol ba ni/ gong du 
524.19(1): smos pa'i bder gshegs sku mdog dang rgyan cha ma nor bar/ nam mkha'i khams 
524.20(1): nas bsam gyis mi khyab par byon nas/ sku gdung sku gzugs gsung rab dang /
524.21(1): dkyil 'khor bum pa la thim zhing gdan la bzhugs par ting nge 'dzin gyis bzung

525.3(1): las kyi don bstan pa'o/ /

525.20(1): gsal sgong phyi bltas nang gsal nang bltas phyi gsal 'di/ rgyal mtshan rtse la mi 
525.21(1): nub mtshan ma'i rtags su btags pa yis/ bder gshegs 'gro ba'i don la thugs

540.3(1): sbyang phyir/ phyag 'tshal mtshan bstod mchod pa 'bul/ 'od 'bar lha yi gzhal yas 
540.4(1): mchog /shar phyogs mi 'gyur g.yung drung gi/ gru khugs byang phyogs ljang khu la/ yig 
540.5(1): 'bru raM gyi klong dkyil nas/ 'khor ba'i sems can drang ba'i phyir/ 'od zer las su 
540.6(1): bkye ba yi/ ston pa gshen rab 'od zer las/ 'gro ba'i don du bkye ba yi/ gsung 
540.7(1): gi gshen rab lde gsang 'od 'bar ni/ sku mdog ljang 'bar lcags kyi snying po 'dra/
540.8(1): phyag mtshan rin chen lcags kyi chag shing bsnams/ dbang sgyur lcags kyi 'khor lo'i 
540.9(1): khri la bzhugs/ bder gshegs gshen rab 'od zer can/ bdag dang rgyu sbyor yon 
540.10(1): gyi bdag /mtha' yas sems can sgrib sbyang phyir/ phyag 'tshal mtshan bstod mchod 
540.11(1): pa 'bul/ 'od 'bar lha'i gzhal yas mchog /shar phyogs mi 'gyur g.yung drung 
540.12(1): gi/ gru khugs nub phyogs dmar po la/ yig 'bru khaM gi klong dkyil nas/ 'khor ba'i 
540.13(1): sems can drang ba'i phyir/ 'od zer las su bkye ba yi/ ston pa gshen rab 'od zer 
540.14(1): las/ 'gro ba'i don du bkye ba yi/ yon tan gyi gshen rab legs pa kun 'byung ni/
540.15(1): sku mdog dmar 'bar zangs kyi snying po 'dra/ phyag mtshan rin chen zangs kyi chag 
540.16(1): shing bsnams/ dbang sgyur zangs kyi 'khor lo'i khri la bzhugs/ bder gshegs 
540.17(1): gshen rab 'od zer can/ bdag dang rgyu sbyor yon gyi bdag /mtha' yas sems 
540.18(1): can sgrib sbyang phyir/ phyag 'tshal mtshan bstod mchod pa 'bul/ 'od 'bar lha yi 
540.19(1): gzhal yas mchog /shar phyogs mi 'gyur g.yung drung gi/ gru khugs lho phyogs sngon 
540.20(1): po la/ yig 'bru suM gyi klong dkyil nas/ 'khor ba'i sems can drang ba'i phyir/ 'od 
540.21(1): zer las su bkye ba yi/ ston pa gshen rab 'od zer las/ 'gro ba'i don du bkye 
541.1(1): ba yi/ 'phrin las kyi gshen rab snyoms par lhun grub ni/ sku mdog sngo 'bar g.yu 
541.2(1): yi snying po 'dra/ phyag mtshan rin chen g.yu yi chag shing bsnams/ dbang sgyur g.yu 
541.3(1): yi 'khor lo'i khri la bzhugs/ bder gshegs gshen rab 'od zer can/ bdag 
541.4(1): dang rgyu sbyor yon gyi bdag /mtha' yas sems can sgrib sbyang phyir/ phyag 'tshal 
541.5(1): mtshan bstod mchod pa 'bul/ 'od 'bar lha yi gzhal yas mchog /shar phyogs mi 
541.6(1): 'gyur g.yung drung gi/ dbus kyi snying po ser po la/ yig 'bru oM gyi klong dkyil nas/
541.7(1): 'khor ba'i sems can drang ba'i phyir/ 'od zer las su bkye ba yi/ ston pa gshen 
541.8(1): rab 'od zer las/ 'gro ba'i don du bkye ba yi/ thugs kyi gshen rab thang ma 'od 
541.9(1): rgyas ni/ sku mdog ser 'bar gser gyi snying po 'dra/ phyag mtshan rin chen gser gyi 
541.10(1): chag shing bsnams/ dbang sgyur gser gyi 'khor lo'i khri la bzhugs/ bder gshegs 
541.11(1): gshen rab 'od zer can/ dag dang rgyu sbyor yon gyi bdag /mtha' yas sems 
541.12(1): can sgrib sbyang phyir/ phyag 'tshal mtshan bstod mchod pa 'bul/ de ltar shar phyogs 
541.13(1): kyi gshen rab nyi shu rtsa lnga yo 'gre'o/ /
541.14(1): shar phyogs stong gsum 'jig rten dang / stong gsum 'jig rten phar 'das na/
541.15(1): 'jig rten khams kyang bsam las 'das/ bder gshegs sku yang bsam mi khyab/
541.16(1): ci snyed sa yi rdul bas grangs mang bas/ 'gro ba'i don mdzad bder gshegs sku 
541.17(1): rnams la/ lus ngag yid kyi sgo nas thang bcad nas/ sems can sgrib pa sbyang ba'i 
541.18(1): phyir/ phyag 'tshal mtshan bstod mchod pa 'bul/ de ltar yang bder gshegs la 
541.19(1): mchod pa phul te/
541.20(1): de nas mar sems can la sbyin pa don rnam pa lnga btang ste/ phyag rgya thal sbyor 
541.21(1): snying kar gtad/ ngan song dong sprugs snying po brjod/ yas stags rdzas kyi gtor 
542.1(1): ma btang / tshig bshad tshigs su bcad de brjod/ A+o~M bdag gi ting 'dzin stobs 
542.2(1): mchog dang / bder gshegs brgya yi byin rlabs dang / snying po sngags kyi nus mthu 
542.3(1): dang / yon bdag bsam pa dag pa yis/ 'dod pa lnga'i yas stags 'di/ dmyal 
542.4(1): ba'i gnas su phyin par shog /stobs mchog de rnams 'dus pa yis/ tsha grang sdug 
542.5(1): bsngal zhi bar shog /bla med go 'phang thob par shog /yi dwags gnas su phyin par 
542.6(1): shog /stobs mchog de rnams 'dus pa yis/ bkres skom sdug bsngal zhi bar shog
542.7(1): bla med go 'phang thob par shog /byol song gnas su phyin par shog /stobs mchog 
542.8(1): de rnams 'dus pa yis/ glen lkugs sdug bsngal zhi bar shog /bla med go 'phang 
542.9(1): thob par shog /mi yi gnas su phyin par shog /stobs mchog de rnams 'dus pa 
542.10(1): yis/ 'pho 'gyur sdug bsngal zhi bar shog /bla med go 'phang thob par shog /lha 
542.11(1): min gnas su phyin par shog /stobs mchog de rnams 'dus pa yis/ 'thab rtsod 
542.12(1): sdug bsngal zhi bar shog /bla med go 'phang thob par shog /lha yi gnas su phyin par 
542.13(1): shog /stobs mchog de rnams 'dus pa yis/ pham ltung sdug bsngal zhi bar shog /bla 
542.14(1): med go 'phang thob par shog /mchod sbyin rgyas pa'i byin rlabs kyis/ bar ma do yi 
542.15(1): sems can rnams/ gnas ngan len pa'i sgo chod nas/ mi lus gtsang mar skye bar 
542.16(1): shog /mi lus gtsang mar skyes nas kyang / ston pa'i zhal mthong gsung thos shog /de 
542.17(1): la sgrib gnyis sbyang tshogs gnyis rdzogs te/ bla med go 'phang thob par shog /de 
542.18(1): nas ting nge 'dzin gyis phyag 'tshal ba dang / mchod pa 'bul ba dang / sbyin pa 
542.19(1): btang bar mdzad de/ bder gshegs sems can gnyis ka mchod pas mnyes cing 
542.20(1): sbyin pas tshim par gyur nas/ gnyis med gcig la mnyam par ting nge 'dzin gyis 
542.21(1): bzung ngo / /mchod sbyin rgyas pa de yi yon tan gyis/ kong tse la sogs sems can 
543.1(1): bsam pa dag pa rnams/ sgrib byang mngon par shes pa gsal gyin rdzu 'phrul rkang 
543.2(1): pa thob/ me tog char dang gzha' tshon 'od kyang byung / de la sems can kun kyang 
543.3(1): dad pa skyes/ sku gdung rnams kyi mnga' yang thob/ sku gzugs rnams kyang bder 
543.4(1): gshegs zhal du lhag lhag ston// gsung rab rnams kyang zhal dro rang gsung rang 
543.5(1): gis sgrogs/ dkyil 'khor bum pa dpon gsas kyang / sa las 'phags nas 'od 
543.6(1): du gsal/ phyogs bcu'i 'jig rten kun tu gsal/ sgra snyan grags kyin 'od zer 
543.7(1): 'phros/ de ltar shar nas bzung nas/ byang dang nub dang lho dang steng dang / byang 
543.8(1): shar dang byang nub dang lho nub lho shar dang / 'og dang yo shar phyogs ci bzhin du 
543.9(1): 'gre'o/ /bder gshegs stong gi mtshan ni gong du le'u dgu pa'i nang du smos so/ /
543.10(1): bder bar gshegs pa la mchod pa 'bul ba dang / sems can rnams la sbyin pa 
543.11(1): btang pa dang / slad ma'i sems can rnams la dpe bstan pa'i 'phrin las kyi don 
543.12(1): bstan pa'o/ /
543.13(1): de nas yang dpon gsas mnga' bdag gis/ mchod sbyin rgyas pa'i rting la/
543.14(1): sems can sdig chen drangs pa'i phyir/ lha phyag 'tshal nas sdig pa bshags pa 
543.15(1): mdzad de/ de la yang don rnam pa lnga ste/ phyag rgya dang / snying po dang / rdzas dang /
543.16(1): tshig bshad dang/ ting nge 'dzin dang lnga'o/ /de la phyag rgyas sdig pa bshags pa 
543.17(1): ni/ gus pa mos btud kyi phyag rgya yi zhes bya ste/ thal mo sbyar nas dpral bar gtad 
543.18(1): do/ /de nas snying pos sdig pa bshags pa ni/ ngan song dong sprug gi snying po lan 
543.19(1): bzhi brjod/ de nas rdzas kyis sdig pa bshags pa ste/ lus ngag yid gsum gus 
543.20(1): pa'i phyag 'tshal/ de nas tshig bshad kyi tshigs su bcad de sdig pa bshags te/ skye 
543.21(1): ba dang po dpag tu med pa nas/ da lta 'khor ba'i sdug bsngal lus blang 'dir/ mi 
544.1(1): dge sdig pa'i las rnams ci bgyis pa/ bder gshegs lha gshen rnams la bshags 
544.2(1): pa 'bul/ bdag dang bdag 'dra'i sems can sdig po che/ zhe sdang me ltar 'bar 
544.3(1): ba'i rnam smin gyis/ dmyal ba tsha grang gnas su 'khyams su nye/ byams pa chen po'i 
544.4(1): thugs las byung ba'i lha/ 'od dkar gnas 'dzin thugs rje der ma chung / dmyal 
544.5(1): ba tsha grang gnas su 'khyams nas drongs/ gcod sbyong dmyal ba thams cad rgyun 
544.6(1): chad nas/ zhe sdang byams pa'i klong du zhi bar shog /skye ba dang po dpag tu med pa 
544.7(1): na/ da lta 'khor ba'i sdug bsngal lus blang 'dir/ mi dge sdig pa'i las rnams 
544.8(1): ci bgyis pa/ bder gshegs lha gshen rnams la bshags pa 'bul/ bdag dang 
544.9(1): bdag 'dra'i sems can sdig po che/ 'dod chags chu ltar 'khol ba'i rnam smin 
544.10(1): gyis/ yi dwags bkres skom gnas su 'khyams su nye/ sbyin pa chen po'i thugs las 
544.11(1): byung ba'i lha/ gar gsas btsan po'i thugs rje der ma chung / yi dwags bkres 
544.12(1): skom gnas su 'khyams na drongs/ bkres skom yi dwags thams cad rgyun chad nas/
544.13(1): 'dod chags sbyin pa'i klong du zhi bar shog /skye ba dang po dpag tu med pa nas/ da 
544.14(1): lta 'khor ba'i sdug bsngal lus blang 'dir/ mi dge sdig pa'i las rnams ci bgyis 
544.15(1): pa/ bder gshegs lha gshen rnams la bshags pa 'bul/ bdag dang bdag 
544.16(1): 'dra'i sems can sdig po che/ gti mug mun ltar sros pa'i rnam smin gyis/ byol song 
544.17(1): glen lkugs gnas su 'khyams su nye/ ye shes chen po'i thugs las byung ba'i lha/ rgod 
544.18(1): gsas khams pa thugs rje der ma chung / byol song glen lkugs gnas su 'khyams 
544.19(1): na drongs/ glen lkugs byol song thams cad rgyun chad nas/ gti mug ye shes klong 
544.20(1): du zhi bar shog /skye ba dang po dpag tu med pa nas/ da lta 'khor ba'i sdug bsngal 
544.21(1): lus blang 'dir/ mi dge sdig pa'i las rnams ci bgyis pa/ bder gshegs lha 
545.1(1): gshen rnams la bshags pa 'bul/ bdag dang bdag 'dra'i sems can sdig po che/
545.2(1): phrag dog sa ltar skyes pa'i rnam smin gyis/ mtha' 'khob mi yi gnas su 'khyams su 
545.3(1): nye/ yangs pa chen po'i thugs las byung ba'i lha/ gsas rje rmang po thugs rje der 
545.4(1): ma chung / mtha' 'khob mi yi gnas su 'khyams na drongs/ mtha' 'khob mi rnams 
545.5(1): thams cad rgyun chad nas/ phrag dog yangs pa'i klong du zhi bar shog /skye ba dang po 
545.6(1): dpag tu med pa nas/ da lta 'khor ba'i sdug bsngal lus blang 'dir/ mi dge sdig 
545.7(1): pa'i las rnams ci bgyis pa/ bder gshegs lha gshen rnams la bshags pa 'bul/
545.8(1): bdag dang bdag 'dra'i sems can sdig po che/ nga rgyal rlung ltar 'tshub pa'i rnam 
545.9(1): smin gyis/ lha min 'thab rtsod gnas su 'khyams su nye/ zhi ba chen po'i thugs las 
545.10(1): byung ba'i lha/ gnam gsas dbyings rum thugs rje der ma chung / lha min 'thab 
545.11(1): rtsod gnas su 'khyams na drongs/ gsod gcod lha min thams cad rgyun chad nas/
545.12(1): nga rgyal zhi ba'i klong du zhi bar shogag /'khor ba'i dug lnga de ltar rgyun chad nas/ mi 
545.13(1): 'khor ye shes lnga yi rtsal ldan te/ bon nyid dbyings nas thugs nyid mnyam pa'i lha/
545.14(1): mkha' dgying dkar po'i dbyings su thim gyur cig /de nas ting nge 'dzin gyis sdig 
545.15(1): pa bshags pa mdzad de/ bdag dang mtha' yas sems can rnams/ sprul pa'i sku 
545.16(1): ltar gzugs kyi phung po rdul phra rab kyi char phye ba tsam du gyes nas/ phyogs bcu'i 
545.17(1): bder gshegs rnams kyi spyan lam du/ lha phyag 'tshal zhing sdig pa bshags par 
545.18(1): ting nge 'dzin gyis bzung ngo / /lus ngag yid gsum dad pa yis/ dkyil 'khor 
545.19(1): las sogs lha rnams la/ lha phyag 'tshal zhing sdig pa bshags pa'i 'phrin las kyi 
545.20(1): don bstan pa'o/ /
545.21(1): de nas yang dpon gsas mnga' bdag gis/ mar me thogs nas sgo dbye bar 
546.1(1): mdzad de/ de la yang don rnam pa lnga ste/ phyag rgya dang / snying po dang / rdzas dang 
546.2(1): tshigs bshad dang / ting nge 'dzin dang lnga'o/ /de la phyag rgyas sgo dbye ba ni/ sgron 
546.3(1): ma 'od zer gyi phyag rgya zhes bya ste/ gung mo gnyis mdun gyi rtse mor sprad nas gnam 
546.4(1): du bstan/ phyi ma rnams thur du sa la phra le bstan to/ /de nas snying pos sgo dbye ste/
546.5(1): a lo spro a lo spros a lo spro spros 'bar lo gsal/ lan bzhi gar stabs kyis brjod 
546.6(1): do/ /de nas rdzas kyi sgo dbye ste/ yon bdag thams cad thal mo sbyar ba'i bar du 
546.7(1): mar me thogs te/ mdangs dang 'dzum bstan te/ shar phyogs nas bsgrigs so/ /
546.8(1): dpon gsas kyis nub phyogs nas bzhengs nas/ bar du dar dkar sa gzhi la 
546.9(1): gdan du btings/ nam mkha' la gur du brkyang ngo / /de nas tshig bshad kyi sgo dbye 
546.10(1): ba'i tshigs su bcad de gsungs pa/ 'khor ba'i sems can ma rig pa/ 'khor ba 
546.11(1): thog ma med pa na/ ming dang gzugs la brten pa 'dir/ ma rig mun pa'i klong na 
546.12(1): gnas/ bon la shes rab tshad sleb pa'i/ dpon gsas rig pa'i blo ldan ngas/ rig 
546.13(1): pa'i ye shes rtsal bskyed nas/ sems nyid bon la 'jug par shar/ shar gyi phyogs 
546.14(1): kyi sgo srung la/ dad pa'i stobs kyis mchod pa 'bul/ mar me sgron mas sgo dbye bas/
546.15(1): sems la rig pa shar bar 'gyur/ de skad ces dpon gsas kyis gsungs te/ yon 
546.16(1): bdag dar dkar phub brkyang ba'i bar nas yar phyung ste/ chu bur gyi mig btsum 
546.17(1): nas/ sems nyid kyi spyan gyis bltas pas/ rig pa'i lde mig gis shar phyogs zhe sdang 
546.18(1): gi sgo phyes te/ dbal gyi khro chen mi bzad brjid pa dang / mtshan dang ldan pa'i gto 
546.19(1): bu 'bum sangs nyid du gyur/ 'khor ba'i bon rgyu bzhi gzugs kyi phung po la brten 
546.20(1): pa thams cad/ mun pa la sgron me btegs pa ltar gsal bar gyur to/ /kong tse la 
546.21(1): sogs yon bdag dad pa can rnams kyang / zhe sdang byams par zhi bar shar nas 
547.1(1): rig pa shar ro/ /de nas byang gi phyogs kyi sgo srung la/ dad pa'i stobs kyis mchod 
547.2(1): pa 'bul/ mar me sgron mas sgo dbye bas/ sems la rig pa shar bar 'gyur/ chu 
547.3(1): bur gyi mig btsum nas/ sems nyid kyi spyan gyis bltas pas/ rig pa'i lde mig 
547.4(1): gis byang phyogs 'dod chags kyi sgo phyes te/ dbal gyi khro chen mi bzad brjid pa 
547.5(1): yang / mtshan dang ldan pa'i yid kyi khye'u chung nyid du gyur/ 'khor ba'i bon rgyu ming 
547.6(1): bzhi'i phung po la brten pa thams cad/ skyu ru ra lag mthil du bzhag pa nyid ltar 
547.7(1): gsal bar gyur to/ /kong tse la sogs yon bdag dad pa can rnams kyang / 'dod 
547.8(1): chags sbyin par zhi nas byang nas sgrib pa byang ngo / /de nas nub kyi phyogs kyi sgo srung 
547.9(1): la/ dad pa'i stobs kyis mchod pa 'bul/ mar me sgron mas sgo dbye bas/ sems 
547.10(1): la rig pa shar bar gyur/ chu bur gyi mig btsum nas/ sems nyid kyi spyan gyis 
547.11(1): bltas pas/ rig pa'i lde mig gis nub phyogs gti mug gi sgo phyes te/ dbal gyi khro 
547.12(1): chen mi bzad brjid pa yang / mtshan dang ldan pa'i rma lo skyin gyi ral ga can nyid 
547.13(1): du gyur/ mya ngan las 'das pa bon zag med la brten pa bar lha 'od gsal g.yung 
547.14(1): drung sems dpa' rnams/ rig pa ci ltar gnas bzhin me long la g.ya' dag pa 
547.15(1): ltar/ sa le ma rmongs gsal bar gyur to/ /kong tse la sogs yon bdag dad pa 
547.16(1): can rnams kyang / gti mug ye shes su zhi nas nub nas ma mthong pa mthong ba'i 
547.17(1): lam sgo phyes pa'o/ /de nas lho yi phyogs kyi sgo srung la/ dad pa'i stobs kyis mchod 
547.18(1): pa 'bul/ mar me sgron mas sgo dbye bas/ sems la rig pa shar bar 'gyur/ chu 
547.19(1): bur gyi mig btsum nas/ sems nyid kyi spyan gyis bltas pas/ rig pa'i lde mig 
547.20(1): gis lho phyogs phrag dog gi sgo phyes te/ dbal gyi khro chen mi bzad brjid pa yang
547.21(1): mtshan dang ldan pa'i g.yu lo g.yu yi lan phran can nyid du gyur/ 'jig rten khams 
548.1(1): nas bder gshegs sprul sku rnams sprin med mkha' la nyi shar ci bzhin gsal bar 
548.2(1): gyur to/ /kong tse la sogs yon bdag dad pa can rnams kyang / phrag dog yangs
548.3(1): par zhi nas lho ru sgrib gnyis byang tshogs gnyis rdzogs so/ /de nas dbus kyi bde 
548.4(1): bar gshegs pa'i zhal mngon sum du lhang nge gsal bar mthong ngo / /shin tu dang 
548.5(1): spro yid dga' sems la nyi ma shar/ de ltar 'khor ba thar pa gnyis ka dbu mar 
548.6(1): bde bar gshegs so/ /de nas ting nge 'dzin gyi mar me btegs nas sgo dbye bar 
548.7(1): mdzad do/ /de nas bdag dang mtha' yas pa'i sems can gyis kyang / ma rig 
548.8(1): pa'i sgo rig pa'i lde mig gis phyes nas/ sa le yongs su gsal bar ting nge 'dzin 
548.9(1): gyis bzung ngo / /sems nyid dag pa'i rtul zhugs kyis mar me thogs nas/ dkyil 
548.10(1): 'khor gyi sgo dbye ba'i 'phrin las kyi don bstan pa'o/ /
548.11(1): de nas yang dpon gsas mnga' bdag gis/ me tog thogs nas smon lam 
548.12(1): gdab par mdzad de/ de la yang don rnam pa lnga ste/ phyag rgya dang / snying po dang /
548.13(1): rdzas dang / tshig bshad dang / ting nge 'dzin dang lnga'o/ /de la phyag rgyas smon lam 
548.14(1): gdab pa ni/ sems dag dad ldan gyi phyag rgya zhes bya ste/ lus tsog pur yon bdag 
548.15(1): rnams 'dug nas/ thal mo sbyar nas dpral bar gtad do/ /de nas snying pos smon 
548.16(1): lam gdab ste/ A+o~M mkha' dbyings dag par a 'bar gsal/ A+o~M mkha' dbyings 
548.17(1): khyab par a lo bdal/ A+o~M mkha' dbyings rgod 'bar a he ho mu la rgyas/ lan 
548.18(1): bzhi brjod do/ /de nas rdzas kyi smon lam gdab ste/ me tog sna tshogs tshigs su 
548.19(1): bcad kyin gtor ro/ /de nas tshig bshad kyi tshigs su bcad de smon lam gdab 
548.20(1): pa ni/ 'jig rten gzugs ni sgyu ma ste/ sgyu ma'i gzugs la mi 'khor bar/ bon 
548.21(1): nyid sems nyid bdal pa ru/ mi 'gyur sku dang ldan gyur cig /'jig rten ngag 
549.1(1): ni sgyu ma ste/ sgyu ma'i ngag la mi 'khor bar/ bon nyid sems nyid bdal pa ru/ mi 
549.2(1): 'gag gsung dang ldan gyur cig /'jig rten yid ni sgyu ma ste/ sgyu ma'i yid la mi 
549.3(1): 'khor bar/ bon nyid sems nyid bdal pa ru/ g.yung drung thugs dang ldan 'gyur 
549.4(1): gcig /'jig rten yon tan skyon yin te/ skyon la yon tan mi zer ba/ bon nyid 
549.5(1): sems nyid bdal pa ru/ nges pa'i yon tan 'byung gyur cig /'jig rten 'phrin 
549.6(1): las log pa ste/ log pa'i phyogs su mi brtson par/ bon nyid sems nyid bdal 
549.7(1): pa ru/ dam pa'i 'phrin las spyod gyur cig /de rnams tshang par 'dzoms nas kyang /
549.8(1): las kyi khams gsum 'khor ba yi/ ma rig sems can nyon mongs kun/ bdag gis 
549.9(1): bde bar 'drong par shog /de nas ting nge 'dzin gyis me tog phul nas/ smon lam 
549.10(1): gdab ste/ bdag dang mtha' yas pa'i sems can rnams/ dus gcig la bder 
549.11(1): gshegs rnams kyi spyan lam du/ me tog gtor gyin smon lam 'debs par ting nge 
549.12(1): 'dzin gyis bzung ngo / /shes rab byang ba'i sems nyid kyis/ me tog gtor nas 
549.13(1): smon lam btab pa'i 'phrin las kyi don bstan pa'o/ /

558.20(1): ro/ /dngos po kha dog dbyings su grub pa rnams/ nges pa'i don du bstan pa ma yin 
558.21(1): pas/ bon nyid sems nyid nam mkha'i dbyings nyid rnams/ dngos po med pa'i 
559.1(1): thig le dbyings su bskyod/ gtan du de lta bu yang ma yin mi bzung ste/ dngos po 
559.2(1): mtshan ma snang ba'i sems can rnams/ 'khor ba'i gnas nas thar par drang ba'i

559.17(1): bskyod de/ A+o~M mkha' lding dbyings bdal mu ram 'od nam klong drung stong lam phyod 
559.18(1): lam gsal/ lan bzhi brjod do/ /de nas rdzas kyis gzhal yas khang dang gdan 
559.19(1): bskyod de/ g.yas su pad shun gyi ras dkar thogs/ g.yon du drum shing gi pad lo 
559.20(1): thogs/ de nas tshig bshad kyis gzhal yas khang dang gdan bskyod de/ tshigs su 
559.21(1): bcad de gsungs pa/ phyi'i snod stong ste 'byung ba rnam bzhi yang / mi rtag stong pa'i 
560.1(1): ngang la gnas pas su/ gzhal yas khang dang gdan yang mi rtag stong pa yin pas/

560.6(1): 'dzin gnyis ka'i yul las kyang ye nas 'das te/ gzhal yas khang dang gdan

560.10(1): dbyings su bskyod/ nam mkha'i mu la gcig pa gnyis med don la bstim/ rdul 
560.11(1): mtshon yang drum shing dang pad shun gyis bsdus nas gtor ro/ /de nas ting nge 
560.12(1): 'dzin gyis gzhal yas khang dang gdan bskyod de/ spyir bsdus pa snod bcud kyi 
560.13(1): bon dang / sgos su 'brel ba lus sems kyi bon ni/ snang la rang bzhin med pa nam 
560.14(1): mkha'i ngogs ltar ting nge 'dzin gyis bzung ngo / /thams cad khyab bdal thugs

560.16(1): don bstan pa'o/ /
560.17(1): de nas yang dpon gsas mnga' bdag gis/ gzhi brtan pa'i bkra shis gsol 
560.18(1): te/ de la yang don rnam pa lnga ste/ phyag rgya dang / snying po dang / rdzas dang / tshig

560.21(1): nas sa la bstan pa'i steng du/ g.yas pa'i thal mo gshibs nas steng du sbub pa'o/ /

568.3(1): kho yis bsdus/ gshen rab kha nas smra ba de/ don du nus pa'i stobs byung na/ da

568.5(1): bdud kyi rgyal khams kun/ gshen la lta nyan byed du 'ong / de skad ces 'khor la 
568.6(1): smras nas/ sngar sun phyungs pas dngos por ni 'byung ma nus par/ smig rgyu dang 
568.7(1): lho 'ur du sprul nas/ log byed bdud tshogs bsam 'das kyang / ston pa rab tu 
568.8(1): byung pa la/ phyogs bzhi kun nas bskor nas bltas/ de la ston pa gshen rab mi 
568.9(1): bo ni/ rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa yin pas/ log byed bdud la sogs pa yang /
568.10(1): shin tu spro la dga' dad nas/ mang po lta nyan byed pa yang / thugs la sa ler 
568.11(1): gsal bar mkhyen/ don ched de yi phyir na yang / gzhan dag dregs pa'i bdud 
568.12(1): 'dul na/ bdag nyid phung po gzhom par dgongs/ nyi ma shar ba'i zer ka la/
568.13(1): sprin ltar gtib pa'i 'khor nang du/ 'khor ba rgyun thag bcad pa'i phyir/ ston pas 
568.14(1): khyim spangs rab tu byung / tshigs su bcad nas bka' bstsal gyin/ dang la phyi'i 
568.15(1): rgyan rnams bcom/ ston pa gshen rab sku mchog la/ rin po che yi rgyan rnams ni/
568.16(1): ljon shing lo 'bras bzhin gnas pa/ sku la gser gyi zangs gris phyungs/ breg nas 
568.17(1): mdun du phung po spungs/ chags na 'khor bar ltung pa yi/ rgyan la chags pa'i skyon 
568.18(1): spangs te/ phyag gis blangs te phyogs bcur gtor/ dmigs med sbyin pa rgya cher 
568.19(1): btang / phyogs bcu rin chen char bzhin bab/ sbyin pa chags med stobs mchog 
568.20(1): des/ 'dod pas gdung ba'i sems can rnams/ rin po che yi gter dang 'phrad/
568.21(1): 'dod pa 'phrad kyin re ba bskangs/ rin chen rgyan spangs nus mthu des/ ye shes 
569.1(1): lha yi thugs rje las/ bar snang stong pa'i khams nas su/ rin chen blangs pa'i rgyan 
569.2(1): lnga bab/ hos ru bsil ba sgra snyan dang / spu gri ngar ldan rnon po dang / tshem khab 
569.3(1): dbal mo so leb dang / khrus bum gtsang ma pad ldan dang / gzhi skur bcud ldan 
569.4(1): pad gyes dang / de lnga yas mar mdun du bab/ ston pa rab tu byung nas su/ rin 
569.5(1): po che yi rgyan rnams spangs pas/ blang ba rin chen de lnga gnang / de nas yang ston 
569.6(1): pa gshen rab sku mchog la/ dud 'gro'i spu slubs dar zab la sogs dang / kha dog 
569.7(1): rnam lnga 'dres pa'i gos slag pa/ gzha' tshon gur bzhin sku la gsol ba ni/ phud 
569.8(1): nas mdun du phung por spungs/ chags na 'khor bar ltung ba yis/ rgyan la chags 
569.9(1): pa'i skyon spangs te/ phyag gis blangs nas phyogs bcur gtor/ dmigs med sbyin 
569.10(1): pa rgya chen btang / phyogs bcur gzha' tshon 'od du 'khrigs/ sbyin pa chags med 
569.11(1): stobs mchog des/ 'dod pas gdungs ba'i sems can rnams/ mdzes ldan kha 
569.12(1): dog sna drug gi/ gzugs kyi longs spyod gter dang 'phrad/ yi dga' sems dwangs 
569.13(1): spro ba skyes/ 'dod par 'phrad kyin re ba bskangs/ spu slubs gos spangs nus mthu 
569.14(1): des/ ye shes lnga yi thugs rje las/ bar snang stong pa'i khams nas su/ na bza' 
569.15(1): blangs pa'i gos drug bab/ pad zhu sul bu rtsa lnga dang / rmad gos gling snam rtsa lnga 
569.16(1): dang / rmad 'og gling snam rtsa lnga dang / smad sham sul bu rtsa lnga dang / stod gos 
569.17(1): sul bu rtsa lnga dang / pad lham pad rtseg gnyis sbyor dang / de drug yas mar mdun 
569.18(1): du babs/ ston pa rab tu byung nas su/ dud 'gro spu slebs gos spangs pas/ blang 
569.19(1): bar na bza' ris drug gnang / de nas yang ston pa gshen rab sku mchog la/ dbu 
569.20(1): skra lcug mnyen g.yu mdangs la/ dbang gi gtsug phud bcas pa dang / tshe'i lan 
569.21(1): phran bslas pa la/ phung po bcom gyin shed smad nas/ sems nyid zhi zhing gdul 
570.1(1): ba'i phyir/ thugs rje sprul pa'i byin rlabs kyis/ nam mkha' stong pa'i khams dkyil 
570.2(1): nas/ spu gri ngar 'jam rno dbal dang / phyag gis bzhar nas mdun du spungs/
570.3(1): chags na 'khor bar ltung pa yis/ rgyan la chags pa'i skyon spangs te/ phyag gis 
570.4(1): blangs te phyogs bcur gtor/ thugs rje chen po'i byin rlabs des/ phyogs bcu'i 
570.5(1): 'jig rten thams cad du/ mdzes ldan me tog char du babs/ sems can rnams 
570.6(1): kyi nyon mongs zhi/ nang gi rnam shes gdul ba'i phyir/ phyi yi phung po skra breg nus mthu 
570.7(1): des/ ye shes lha'i thugs rje las/ gzhal yas 'od kyi gdugs su 'thibs/ gtsang 
570.8(1): sbra khrus la zhugs pa'i phyir/ khrus bum gtsang ma pad gdan nas/ bdud rtsi rgyun gyi 
570.9(1): chu sbreng nas/ sgyu ma'i lus ni dag par bkrus/ de nas ston pa gshen rab mi bo yis/
570.10(1): rmad gos ris drug sku la gsol/ hos ru bsil ba sgra snyan phyag tu bsnams/ spu gri 
570.11(1): ngar ldan rnon po dang / tshem khab dbal mo so leb dang / khrus bum gtsang ma pad 
570.12(1): gdan dang / gzhi skur bcud ldan pad gyes rnams/ pad khug pad ma sngon po grub/
570.13(1): sprin spungs tsam gyi longs spyod la/ mi chags spang ba'i don ched kyis/ pad cha de 
570.14(1): rnams phrag la bkal/ 'khor dang rgyal srid phyir la bor/ ston pa gshen rab gcig 
570.15(1): pu nyid/ me tog gling la dka' thub mdzad du gshegs/
570.16(1): de'i dus de'i tshe na/ ston pa'i sku 'khor mang po la sde rigs gnyis su chad 
570.17(1): pa yang / grangs la mang nyung bsam 'das byung / ston pas sku'i bon ston dus/
570.18(1): sems can las la skal pa bzang po mang yang / 'khor ba spangs nas gcod pa 
570.19(1): ni/ shin tu yang ni grangs nyung la/ 'khor ba blangs nas spel ba ni/ shin tu yang ni 
570.20(1): grangs mang bas/ grangs mang shin tu kha drag shed che nas/ gshen rab 'khor ba'i 
570.21(1): khyim spangs dal 'byor rab tu byung / me tog gling la gcig pu gshegs pa la/ dad 
571.1(1): pa'i 'khor sde khyim spangs 'khor du 'gro dbang med pa ru/ mi dad pa'i 'khor sdes 
571.2(1): ston pa'i sku la 'jus/ sprin dpung bzhin du skur 'khor nas/ gshen bu kong tshas 
571.3(1): zhus pa'i mdo/ yab gcig ston pa gshen rab lags/ 'jig rten khams kyi sems 
571.4(1): can la/ bsod ldan 'khor mang rgyal srid yong bdal nas/ nyi shar 'od zer mun 
571.5(1): pa'i tshogs kyis g.yogs pa bzhin/ bar 'dir ston pa'i thugs la 'khrul pa 'dir

571.9(1): cig slad gang chas/ 'di ni longs spyod rgyal srid rin po che 'jigs pas/ 'khor 
571.10(1): 'dir mi rigs yang dag ston pa'i rting ma gnon/ de skad ces gshen bu kong tshas

571.15(1): 'khor rnams kyis zhus pa'i mdo/ ston pa gshen rab mi bo lags/ gnas mchog

571.18(1): nges/ me tog gling la ma gshegs par/ bzhugs yul dam pa'i dbus su bzhugs/

572.21(1): dgongs kyin 'phreng / shin tu dka' bas mi thub nges/ me tog gling la ma gshegs 
573.1(1): par/ sprin tshogs slob 'bangs rgyud bkrol 'tshal/ ston pas bka' bstsal pa/

573.3(1): 'khor ba spel ba 'chal ba'i blo/ bdag dang rab tu byung na rgyud khrol don la bsnyen/
573.4(1): zhen chags khyim la gnas pa rnams dang bdag mi 'grogs/ yang 'khor rnams kyis 
573.5(1): zhus pa'i mdo/ ston pa gshen rab mi bo lags/ yo byad yon tan rdzas spangs nas/

573.7(1): zas nor longs spyod dgongs kyin 'phreng / shin tu dka' bas mi thub nges/ me

573.9(1): bka' bstsal pa/ mi chags thar lam bsgrod pa dang / zang zing nor chags gnyis 
573.10(1): mi 'grub/ sdug bsngal zang zing spang ba'i phyir/ sgyu ma'i bslu brid zang zing spong /
573.11(1): yang 'khor rnams kyis zhus pa'i mdo/ ston pa gshen rab mi bo lags/ 'phrin 
573.12(1): las 'bangs 'khor g.yog spangs nas/ gcig pu gling la 'khyams tsam na/ skyo ngal 
573.13(1): sdug bsngal mtsho dang 'grogs/ sku rkyen 'bangs 'khor 'phreng gin bzhed/ shin tu 
573.14(1): dka' bas mi thub nges/ me tog gling la ma gshegs par/ mi 'bral g.yog 'khor 
573.15(1): rnams dang bzhugs/ ston pas bka' bstsal pa/ gcig pu mi yengs sems nyid 
573.16(1): rnyed/ 'khor g.yog tha dad sems nyid bslu/ ngang nyid klong nas bde ba'i phyir/ tha 
573.17(1): dad 'khor la mi chags spongs/ de nas 'khor rnams kyis gcig bur mi gshegs 
573.18(1): pa'i gros btab pas/ mi gshegs pa'i zhal mar ma gnang ngo / /der dgong gi nyi 
573.19(1): rgas dgong gi dro la bab nas su/ gzha' tshon ris kyi gdan bting nas/ ro mchog 
573.20(1): dang ldan pa'i dgong dro drangs nas/ gdan la bzhugs nas gsol tu ma gnang 
573.21(1): bar/ 'tshogs pa'i 'khor la bka' bstsal pa/ gcig pu gling la bde sgrub dang / che 
574.1(1): drag gdan bzhugs gnyis mi 'grub/ don la 'gal bas ris gdan spongs/ nyin 
574.2(1): mo rnam shes yul la g.yengs/ g.yem la 'dod chags de phyir rgyu/ nub mo rnam shes 
574.3(1): nang du 'du/ zhan pa'i 'dod chags skye ba'i rigs/ de phyir sems nyid log par 
574.4(1): rgyu/ 'dod chags skye ba shed smad gyin/ sems nyid don la gtad pa'i phyir/ dgong 
574.5(1): gi dro la chags mi bya/ dgong gi dro la chags pa na/ lus po shed che 'dod chags 
574.6(1): skye/ sems nyid don la gtad pa dka'/ de phyir dgong gi kha zas spongs/ de nas 
574.7(1): 'khor rnams kyis gshegs pa'i dbang med par/ mkhar bar po so brgyad kyi rtse mo 
574.8(1): la gzim par zhus nas/ ma gnang par 'khor rnams la bka' bstsal pa/ khri stan 
574.9(1): mthon po bya ba 'di/ che drag bdud kyi spyod yul yin/ dam pa'i don dang 'gal 
574.10(1): 'gyur bas/ mkhar gyi rtse la mi nyal spong / de nas 'khor rnams kyis rin po che'i 
574.11(1): bkod par/ gser khri g.yu khri'i steng du gzims su gsol nas/ gzims su ma 
574.12(1): gnang par 'khor rnams la bka' bstsal pa/ khri stan bzang po bya ba ni/ che drag 
574.13(1): bdud kyi spyod yul yin/ dam pa'i don la 'gal gyur bas/ rin po che'i khri gdan 
574.14(1): spongs/
574.15(1): de nas btsun mo hos bza' rgyal med kyis smras pa/ snang srid gsal ba'i ston pa 
574.16(1): lags/ bar chad gnod pa bdag mi bgyid/ mi lus thob pa'i dus 'di la/ ngan 
574.17(1): song rgyu skyed chad mi che/ de skad ces smras nas ston pa'i sku'i phyir ma 'khor ro/ /
574.18(1): btsun mo dpo bza' thang mo dang / btsun mo kong bza' khri lcam gnyis kyis ston 
574.19(1): pa'i sku'i g.yas dang g.yon du bzhugs nas/ mchid zhus pa'i mdo/ skyid rgyags 
574.20(1): mi lus thob pa'i dus 'di la/ skyid rtags longs spyod rol mo 'di lags na/ 'di 
574.21(1): la mi chags gcig pu gzim pa'i lugs ci mchis/ gzim maRa khri stan mdzad par 
575.1(1): zhu ba 'bul/ btsun mo gnyis kyis de skad ces gsol to/ /de la ston pas bka' 
575.2(1): bstsal pa/ sems can thams cad nyon mongs snying re rje/ thar lam mi phyed skye dang 
575.3(1): 'chi la rtag pa yang / chags pa'i las ngan sred len 'di las byung / ha la'i dug 
575.4(1): 'dam mi spyod spangs pa yin/ khri stan chen po bya ba 'di/ srin mo gdan du btings 
575.5(1): pa yin/ bla gab chen po bya ba 'di/ srin po gos su gon pa yin/ 'khor ba'i sems 
575.6(1): can pho mo dang / mtho ris thar pa'i gnas 'dod na/ pho rnams khri stan chen po 
575.7(1): spongs/ mo rnams bla gab chen po spongs/ de skad ces bka' bstsal pas/ gcig pu 
575.8(1): pad shun gyi gding ba btings nas/ bkad sa'i thang la gzims so/ /nangs par 
575.9(1): skar chen shar tsam na/ klong rgyas bder gshegs stong gi mtshan rnams brjod/ nam 
575.10(1): langs sham po lha rtser phog gsum bskor te/ gto bu dod de drangs pa'i lha gshen 
575.11(1): brgya la phyag 'tshal/ nyi ma'i rtse la khrus dang gtsang sbra dag par mdzad/ de nas snying 
575.12(1): po rnam gsum brgya dang lnga bcu bzlas/ de nas 'khor rnams kyis ro mchog dang 
575.13(1): ldan pa'i gsol zas bda' dgu drangs nas/ ston pas gsol ba'i zas la spong 
575.14(1): len bka' bstsal pa/ sha zhes bya ba'i kha zas 'di/ mi za spang ba'i rgyu yin no/ /mi 
575.15(1): spong bza' rgyu yin pa la/ khams gsum 'khor ba'i sems can zo chu'i bzhin du 
575.16(1): brgyud/ pha ma bu tsha tshang zla la sogs de/ gnyen gdung 'brel ba 'khor ba'i sha yin 
575.17(1): no/ /shin tu ya nga rab tu skyi 'jigs spongs/ bdag nyid sha khrag lus su 'dug pa 
575.18(1): la/ gzhan gyi sha dang khrag za rab tu ya re nga / srin po nying sha can dang dbye ba med 
575.19(1): pas spong / sha zhes bya ba'i mtshan nyid 'di/ sems can srog bcad rgyu las byung /
575.20(1): snying rje med par dmyal bar ltungs/ shin tu yang mi bza' spong / sha zhes bya ba'i 
575.21(1): rgyu rkyen 'di/ pha ma gnyis kyi dkar dmar yin/ mig gis mthong na skyi re 'jigs/
576.1(1): lag tu blang na ya re nga / sna yis dri tshor skyug re bro/ lce yis ro blangs nas su/ khong 
576.2(1): du gtim pa'i lugs ci yod/ 'dod chags bskyed pa'i rgyu yin pas/ shin tu spang 
576.3(1): ba'i rigs su gtogs/ sems can mi mthun rigs mang bas/ sha zos dri dang ldan 
576.4(1): pa shin tu dri nga bas/ gtsang ma'i lha rigs rnams kyang mi 'khor 'bros par 'gyur/
576.5(1): bdud rigs srin po rnams kyis 'ded kyin bskor bar 'gyur/ srin kyi grogs ngan 
576.6(1): grib ma 'gos pa yi/ dug lnga'i rgyu rkyen ngan song 'khyams pa'i rgyu/ zas su kha zas sha 
576.7(1): mi za bar bdag ni gtan du spong /

576.9(1): spang ba'i rgyu yin no/ /mi spong za rgyu yin pa la/ khams gsum 'khor ba'i sems 
576.10(1): can la/ lha rigs klu rigs gtsang ma rnams/ zos pa'i dri la ya nga nas/ dpag 
576.11(1): tshad gcig la 'khor mi nus/ lha klu bsod ldan ma 'khor skyon de yis/ 'jig rten 
576.12(1): mthu dbang bsod ldan dngos grub chung / de'i phyir yang sgog tsong mi za spong / sgog 
576.13(1): dang tsong 'di zos pa'i nyes skyon gyis/ 'du ba rnam bzhi nad dang mthun pa nyung /
576.14(1): tshe la bar chod mi 'ong ba'i phyir/ sgog tsong mi bza' spong bar bgyi/ bde bar 
576.15(1): gshegs pa lha yi pho brang du phyin nas dri des phog na yang / skye ba lnga brgya'i bar du 
576.16(1): bse dri can du skye/ de'i phyir yang sgog tsong kha zas mi za gtan du spong / sgog dang 
576.17(1): tsong zhes bya ba'i kha zas 'di/ sha khrag lus blang sems can thams cad la/ tshad du 
576.18(1): mnyam par srin gyi grong khyer brgyad khri bzhi stong yang / grang ba'i shas che rnams la 
576.19(1): grang tshad bsam las 'das/ sgog dang tsong gi kha zas zos pa na/ srin gyi grong khyer 
576.20(1): thams cad kun/ la la na yin la la 'chi bar 'gyur/ na dang 'chi ba'i sdug bsngal 
576.21(1): nyams su myong par byed pa yang / sgog dang tsong zhes bya ba'i kha zas zos pa'i skyon 
577.1(1): las byung / sems can phyi mas zos pas kyang rmongs gyin 'thibs pas bsrung ba'i 
577.2(1): skal dang mi ldan/smra bsam dbang dang ldan pa'i mi rnams kun/ sgog dang tsong 
577.3(1): gi kha zas bkag pa ni/bsod nams shin tu che bar bdag gis bstan/ de skad 
577.4(1): ces bka' bstsal nas/ 'bru dang dkar dang mngar dang gsum/ phyag gi 'khyor ba 
577.5(1): g.yon gang gsol/ dkar zas sna gsum kha zas las/ slad ma gtan du ma gnang 
577.6(1): spangs/ de nas 'khor rnams kyis 'bru shing sbrang la sogs pa'i skyems/ gser 
577.7(1): skyogs dngul skyogs nang du bkang / ston pa'i phyag tu drangs pa la/ phyag gis len 
577.8(1): du ma bzhed par/ 'khor rnams kun la bka' bstsal pa/ chang zhes bya ba'i kha zas 
577.9(1): 'di/ mi btung spang pa'i rgyu yin no/ /mi spong btung rgyu yin pa la/ sdug bsngal 
577.10(1): las kyis khams gsum 'khor ba yang / cha gcig 'di'i rgyu la byung bas so/ /de'i 
577.11(1): phyir yang spang ba'o/ /sems nyid don la mi mnyam par/ dran pa mang po skye ba yang
